Dear Friend,

I am running for governor to make Maryland _safe, steady, and prosperous._
**We have come so far from where we were a few years ago—when****nearly two-thirds of all Marylanders wanted to leave our state.**_**You read that right -- nearly two-thirds.**_ _We cannot go backward. And we must continue to move Maryland in the right direction._
While my Democratic opponents are focused on how quickly they can raise your taxes with pie-in-the-sky policy proposals, we're focused on the issues that matter most to Marylanders: public safety, education, jobs, and the economy.

As your governor, we'll make our state safer by supporting our brave men and women in law enforcement with the resources and training they need.

I'll fight to make sure criminals, especially repeat violent offenders, are behind bars where they belong.

As a mom, I value the importance of steady, consistent leadership in our education system so that our kids can find their own path to prosperity. I introduced a Parental Bill of Rights, which serves as a blueprint to ensure that parents are empowered and that every child has the opportunity to succeed.

The moment I step into the office as governor, we're going to fight every single day to make our state more affordable. _**That not only includes standing up to tax increases, but fighting for tax cuts every year I am in office. **_
And that starts with the retirement tax. Hardworking Marylanders and retirees should never be forced to leave the state they love because of reckless tax and spend policies.

I want to take some time over the next few days to explain my vision for Maryland and exactly why these issues are the core focus of my campaign.

I look forward to you joining me.

Sincerely,
---
---
---

subject: ADVISORY: Shaffer to File Over 2,700 Signatures to Qualify for May 17th Primary in PA-17
body:
Jeremy Shaffer, Republican candidate for Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District, will tomorrow morning become the first PA-17 candidate, Republica | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/2700-signatures?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Sunday, March 13, 2022
---
**CONTACT: Trevor Naglieri**
[Trevor@JeremyShaffer.com](mailto:Trevor@JeremyShaffer.com?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\))
---
| **First on the Ballot: Shaffer to File Over 2,700 Signatures to Qualify for May 17th Primary in PA-17**
---
| **Gibsonia, PA** – Jeremy Shaffer, Republican candidate for Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District, will tomorrow morning become the first PA-17 candidate, Republican or Democrat, to qualify for the May 17th primary ballot by turning in over 2,700 petition signatures to the Pennsylvania Department of State in Harrisburg.

"Thanks to our incredible team of volunteers, organizers, and supporters who collected nearly triple the number of signatures required, tomorrow morning we will become the first campaign to file our nomination petitions to appear on the ballot in PA-17," said **Jeremy Shaffer**. "It's been an absolute honor to earn the support of thousands of citizens across PA-17 who share our vision of bringing positive reform to D.C. that puts Western Pennsylvania families first. Our campaign will be incredibly well-funded and have a grassroots operations second-to-none, and we're looking forward to the election ahead!"

Quick facts about Jeremy's first-on-the-ballot nomination petition drive:
* Over 2,700 total signatures collected (just 1,000 required)
* Jeremy personally collected over 400 signatures
* Over 150 volunteers from across Western Pennsylvania were involved helping collect and organize the other 2,300+ signatures

###
---

name: Yesli Vega
subject: ALERT: Only 100 Days until the Election for Team Vega
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia
body:
|
---
Friend,

The primary election is exactly **_100 days away_** but Team Vega is already running full steam ahead to earn the Republican nomination and retire Abigail Spanberger.

Yet before we recap the last week on the campaign trail, it became clear over the last week on the world stage that American energy independence is a moral imperative. As gas prices continue to soar through the roof and the war in Ukraine rages on, American families are hurting and Ukrainians are losing their lives as consumers around the world are being forced to literally fuel Putin’s war machine.

I have called on the Biden Administration to get out of the way in allowing our businesses and workers to achieve American energy independently and urge Congresswomen Abigail Spanberger to do the same. We must, at a minimum, reopen the Keystone XL Pipeline and resume oil and gas drilling on federal lands as part of an “all of the above” energy portfolio to lower energy costs for Virginians and the world over. Never again must we find ourselves between enriching someone like Putin and $4.50-$5.00 a gallon gas on American families. We took too long to finally cut off Russian oil. But now that we’ve done it, let’s take full advantage to achieve American energy independence – immediately.
**Endorsement of Senator Ted Cruz**
In case you missed it, our campaign released a huge endorsement this week from Senator Ted Cruz. Senator Cruz was the first federal official to endorse Governor Youngkin last year and we’re honored that he similarly sees our campaign as not only the most conservative but also the most electable in this race to defeat Abigail Spanberger and take back the House of Representatives from Nancy Pelosi!
**Godfather of the Conservative Movement & First Release of County Chairs**

In addition to Senator Cruz’s endorsement, we were also excited to announce the endorsement of Richard Viguerie, longtime conservative activist and known as **The Godfather of the Conservative Movement.** Viguerie was a pioneer in direct mail marketing for Christian and conservative causes and has left an indelible mark on our movement for liberty. I’m honored to have his early and strong support as we build our coalition of conservative activists and supporters.
As more evidence to the momentum of our campaign we also released our first list of County campaign chairs in **Culpeper, Fredericksburg, Orange, Prince William, and Stafford.** These are well respected individuals within Republican circles and will serve as the central hub for our campaign within their jurisdictions.

This list includes longtime Republican activist and 7th District representative on Republican State Central Committee, **Dewey McDonnell** (Culpeper); Conservative activist and Faith Leader, **Shirley Green** (Fredericksburg); Wife, Youngkin Mama Bear, and Conservative School Board Member, **Chelsea Quintern** (Orange); Marine Corps **Veteran and 2021 Republican nominee for Delegate in the 31st District, Ben Baldwin** (Prince William County); and **Heather Mitchell** , former Senior Aide to Corey Stewart and Republican nominee in the former 2nd District (Stafford).
These individuals will be critical to our campaign’s success and we cannot thank them enough for volunteering their time and energy to take back the 7th District for the GOP. **They will join and work alongside our Campaign Chairman** , former Virginia Attorney General and Acting Dep. Secretary of Homeland Security for President Trump, **Ken** Cuccinelli. **On The Campaign Trail**

It was also another busy week on the campaign trail bringing our unapologetic conservative message to the voters of the 7th District, attending and speaking at the **Rappahannock Conservative Women’s Coalition** in Spotsylvania in addition to the **Culpeper County GOP**. Thank you to both groups for the invitation. I also had the pleasure of meeting with Laura Morris of the Spotsylvania Republican Women’s Club and speaking with Scott Samson, Chair of the Greene County School Board on the all-important issue of our children’s education.
**Fredericksburg Gun Show**

Yesterday, I had the privilege of joining the wonderful patriots who braved the inclement weather to attend the **Fredericksburg Gun Show**. Once more, the crisis in Ukraine is exposing the necessity for individual liberty. The taking up of arms by the Ukrainians against a tyrannical government is exactly why that right is enshrined second in our nation’s sacred governing document. As your representative to Washington, I will never waiver on defending your God-given, constitutional rights.

Afterward, I joined the Fredericksburg Tea Party Patriots for their March meeting, fielding questions from members and explaining why the government that governs least, governs best. As you’ll recall, prior to blue wave of 2018, the 7th District was represented by Tea Party hero, Congressman Dave Brat. Residents from Prince William to Culpeper **deserve to be represented by someone of similar beliefs** and I look forward to filling that void.

In addition, Team Vega also attended the Fredericksburg and Greene County GOP meetings.

The race to defeat Abigail Spanberger and take back the 7th is on! Until next week...see you on the campaign trail!

For Liberty,

Yesli Vega
_Conservative Republican for Congress_
_Virginia's 7th District_

[](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=90d973d673e04f669b5fcf365e4e7ee7&_e=mrArLeAx8uv0y4AxTZCqU_2yVo_x0CmXRmmHVJ50XRrmKJled10oI-DEKQEEo8gF8SmrGunkQJhzDsrSBCwqgbkAmg8lcBtOORvnUPaDM5iDEYWonj9K-bBYDz9hVby0ktrqh1yx6ifktb7qlYBMywpReZ97yNGw5QbzElNPrCG2bdF3RugEks9amwUpj778MYQcCPfkbmUdXcu5tdUkdn5wnXYxSKfpK5Ck8HoLCEcqXr1HSAOHpAf_W0nZ23nZaA_EmDSg15BkntAJ0xtRog%3D%3D)[](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=90d973d673e04f669b5fcf365e4e7ee7&_e=mrArLeAx8uv0y4AxTZCqU38EXhKUPj5oGHn9dFikN72fvMXkEkhpeTA6ipXRivlzLkyTLlVA1wBQKDCpV31svMXGjBmJgtq7eskE4Wj_wRelfhT4CYI_rX6JDbUOUrdiUuJkgnKUHiuSSfyNEGXnC4lWCYMWlHhxqjWDemWTlmaJ45YQC5KasXe9WrNnYWhANw0DWWZt2hPgLrg6QhSBEUADS1V9JTXX3KO98lTMDcjVUby4jssM2xvt6D0YoeVOlmKEmcAZpV-WR5OSrI3I0g%3D%3D) | **Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer.**

[Unsubscribe](http://links.yeslivega.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_s=90d973d673e04f669b5fcf365e4e7ee7&_t=nQ1Mxr9PkrqkWcUVyyns4SYTpqZsu8RjXF5E3rw9esnXNPoTO5R8xvN3vaPbHkbqKUZR1cLgrkwmCJtf-2-1wr21OieL1ooXJEGNvWbW1Ydj5TILWaY8yQ77YlcuhR9KXrNM0Qn_CSCKONHy4Ze7FZDeR1qPF5z9vXl3GqDICI0%3D)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Can I explain something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
The real power behind a winning campaign doesn’t come from a checkbook. It comes from a whole lot of people standing up for what’s right. In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate. All I need is a quick moment of your time to explain why this request is so important, especially as we approach our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2022:

Every three months, candidates for federal office are legally required to report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. Shortly after, the amount of money we raised and the number of people who contributed to help are made public.

Republicans will be checking to see if we actually have what it takes to defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat, and they’ll use our FEC report to verify that. Our race is expected to be the tipping point in this election, and they all know we’re in a strong position to win.

_The Washington Post_ already reported that our campaign “could be the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson” and a recent poll showed I’m the only Democrat who can beat him. But he has more cash on hand than anyone in the race, and national Republicans have raised over $200 million to take back the Senate.

When all of our numbers go public for the first time this year, right-wing groups and special interests will try to find any point of vulnerability they can use against us. We can’t give them an opening to attack us and block our momentum. So, I’m asking:

**Will you add a contribution of $10 or more to my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin? If we want to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this seat, then we need to report the strongest numbers possible on our first FEC report of this critical election year. The deadline ends on March 31. Please chip in today.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42933065/334977059/-1088791470?refcode=em22_220313_fec_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220313_fec_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzhhNWY1Yi0zOWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oThAie_Rh754VvnuY9tnxVDWG4bgyh2u_lpWg5DYL5k=)

The real power behind a winning campaign doesn’t come from a checkbook. It comes from a whole lot of people standing up for what’s right. For our campaign, that means tens of thousands of people giving small amounts of money to help us counter all the outside groups and corporate special interests who desperately want to keep Ron Johnson in Washington.

So long as you’re with me in this fight, I know we can take them on and get this Senate seat working for the people of Wisconsin. Thanks for standing with me every single day.

Forward!

— Sarah Godlewski

clean_body: The real power behind a winning campaign doesn’t come from a checkbook. It comes from a whole lot of people standing up for what’s right. In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate. All I need is a quick moment of your time to explain why this request is so important, especially as we approach our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2022: Every three months, candidates for federal office are legally required to report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. Shortly after, the amount of money we raised and the number of people who contributed to help are made public. Republicans will be checking to see if we actually have what it takes to defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat, and they’ll use our FEC report to verify that. Our race is expected to be the tipping point in this election, and they all know we’re in a strong position to win. The Washington Post already reported that our campaign “could be the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson” and a recent poll showed I’m the only Democrat who can beat him. But he has more cash on hand than anyone in the race, and national Republicans have raised over $200 million to take back the Senate. When all of our numbers go public for the first time this year, right-wing groups and special interests will try to find any point of vulnerability they can use against us. We can’t give them an opening to attack us and block our momentum. So, I’m asking: Will you add a contribution of $10 or more to my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin? If we want to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this seat, then we need to report the strongest numbers possible on our first FEC report of this critical election year. The deadline ends on March 31. Please chip in today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = The real power behind a winning campaign doesn’t come from a checkbook. It comes from a whole lot of people standing up for what’s right. For our campaign, that means tens of thousands of people giving small amounts of money to help us counter all the outside groups and corporate special interests who desperately want to keep Ron Johnson in Washington. So long as you’re with me in this fight, I know we can take them on and get this Senate seat working for the people of Wisconsin. Thanks for standing with me every single day. Forward! — Sarah Godlewski = Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat in the race who has won two statewide campaigns — she can beat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join us: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 576 Madison, WI 53701 United States

| | | Dear Fellow Republicans,

As a Republican candidate for governor,
I have the privilege of meeting many people across
the state who share our conservative values and are ready for a more prosperous Minnesota.

This past weekend my team reached conventions in - Lyon, Chisago, Wabasha, Todd, Benton, Steele, and Redwood Counties. In addition we visited Senate Districts 47, 57, 59, 40, and 60 - _earning delegates across the State of Minnesota_.

**Check back for a special announcement from the campaign this!**

[**Join with me and fellow Minnesotans by volunteering with our team!**](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=29ec52a781&e=9d6926af69)

subject: Weekly Update: Updates from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://ashleywardforcongress.com/ [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/]
Weekly Updates
A MESSAGE FROM ASHLEY
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/PRIDE_Hugs.jpg] One of the activities that I've missed the most since COVID is participating in PRIDE with Free Mom Hugs. Supporting LGBTQ youth is very important to me. Many groups face discrimination. LGBTQ people face a particular kind - rejection and discrimination from their families for being who they are. So every chance I get, I give out hugs. I've probably given thousands at this point. I do so to show members of the LGBTQ community that they are loved, that they are valued, and that they are worthy.
I think back on all of the hugs I've given and while I must admit that I don't remember every one of them, there are a few that stand out and will be with me always. Like the
woman in her late 50s or early 60s who squeezed me so tight then told me that her mother died before they ever reconciled. Or the young man who simply walked up to me, didn't say a word, hugged me, smiled, and walked away. Or the excited young woman who ran up to me and said, "My mom supports me but I want a hug from you anyway!"
Some of the most important people in my life are members of the LGBTQ community. So I take it personally when I see state legislatures passing laws that harm members of that community. Under the guise of "protecting kids" these pieces of legislation restrict teachers from talking about diverse families (sexual orientation in any way). That silence discourages children from talking about their same sex parents. Children will take this restriction to believe there is something shameful about their loving families. Make no mistake, laws like we are seeing are intended to restrict openness and protect intolerance. I believe we are seeing legislatures test the waters for more far-reaching roll backs of the rights that have been expanded over the last few years.
Now is the moment. We must fight at every level of government against these kinds of actions. I can assure you that I will be a warrior for those that I love. My family, and yours too.
SUPPORT ASHLEY'S CAMPAIGN
As early voting approaches, now is the time for the campaign to purchase outreach materials! Nearly 90% of my campaign budget goes to outreach. This means that your donation goes directly toward gaining votes. In order to reach voters in all FIVE counties of the district, we must have a robust outreach strategy.
Any donation you can give helps us reach that goal! Please consider donating today to help our campaign purchase the materials we need to reach voters!
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]
OUT AND ABOUT
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8043.JPG]
Another great volunteer event! Dedicated volunteers showed up this week to write postcards and staple walk cards. We had a great evening of fellowship as we worked together to prepare outreach materials. Thank you to all who came out! If you want to get involved, see information below for upcoming opportunities!
IMPORTANT DATES & UPCOMING EVENTS
Upcoming events: Mark your calendars!
Candidate Mixer
Hosted by: Durham People's Alliance
Wednesday, March 16th
6:30pm-8pm
Motorco Music Hall
723 Rigsbee Avenue
Durham, NC
Candidates for NC04 will be on site! Come out and show your support for my campaign. We need everyone to show up and show out! If you have a t-shirt, wear it or pick one up when you get there. We will also have hats and buttons available.
ABOUT THE EVENT: The event will take place at the Kerr Scott homestead. It is a kid-friendly event, and there are numerous things to do including playing with baby goats and chickens, touring the home, and of course talking with Ashley about what she will bring to Congress! Hope you can make it! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Farm%20Tour%20and%20Meet.png]
ABOUT THE HOME: The home is over 100 years old with quite an amazing history, and is on the National Historic Registry. Check out the links below for more information!
LET US KNOW YOU ARE COMING! [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Farm%20Tour%20and%20Meet%20the%20Candidate&body=I%27ll%20be%20there%21]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Virtual%20Meet%26Greet_Person.jpg] Join us for a virtual meet & greet! This is a great way to meet Ashley, learn about her priorities, and tell her about yours!
Registration is free but required to get the Zoom link. Register today!
REGISTER [https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJIldu6trTMtHtMUMdIuk7lelq13NqdhA996]
Hello Person County! Come out and have coffee and pastries with Ashley at 9am on Saturday, March 26th. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/PC_Kickoff.jpg]
Then stick around to help distribute literature around Roxboro, beginning at 10am. This is a great way to get your steps in!
Look forward to seeing you all!
SIGN UP [https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10c0f44aeaa22a6ffc43-persontoperson]
GET INVOLVED
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8035.JPG] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8017.jpg]
(Left) Postcard writing parties are a great way to volunteer. It really is wonderful to fellowship with other volunteers all working toward the same goal. We will have others coming up in April. Be on the lookout and sign up to attend! (Right) Have property on a main road? Who needs billboards when I can put up banners! This one recently went up on Hwy 49 in Person County. I also have banners on Hwy 57 and Hwy 15-501! I'm on the lookout for other locations, so reach out if you are willing to put up a banner or know someone who is!
If you'd like to get involved, consider joining us for a Lit Drop. A lit drop is distributing literature. It is no-contact, so COVID safe, and takes about 2 hours. We are out with volunteers every Saturday and Sunday!
You can also sign up to write postcards. We have thousands of postcards to write so we can do outreach to the areas of the district that are hard to reach with lit drops.
And finally, I hope you'll consider hosting an in-person or virtual event. These are a great way to introduce me to your friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
LIT DROP [https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10c0f44aeaa22a6ffc43-litdrop] POSTCARDS [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=PostCards&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20write%20postcards.%20Tell%20me%20how%20to%20get%20involved%21] HOST EVENT [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Host%20an%20Event&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20host%20an%20event%21%20Let%20me%20know%20how%20I%20can%20get%20involved.]
CAMPAIGN T-SHIRTS!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_2345.png] “Made in North Carolina from Dirt to Shirt!” from TS Designs.
TS Designs uses cotton grown in North Carolina, shirts are preshrunk, and use water-based inks. I am thrilled to work with a company committed to sustainability. Just like me, these shirts are “Made in NC!”
Donate $20 today and get your t-shirt. Minimum $20 donation required (shipping included). Limited quantities and colors available. Colors may vary slightly.
ORDER T-SHIRT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/arwardtshirts]
YARD SIGNS ARE HERE!
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Yard%20Sign%20%287%29.png] Yard signs are an effective way to get word out about my campaign. We need as many folks as possible to show their support and put a yard sign in their yard! Pick one up for you and your neighbor!
REQUEST A YARD SIGN [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/yard-sign]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/471f06d9-22a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/a7f3764f-90a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2YzNzY0Zi05MGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uy_sPoUkgtUJPz0dBAHYFwH2f2NkbDyCrCtqVlFTgxM=&id=107267475 .

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Alpharetta Mayor Pro Tem and Councilmen Endorse Jake
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Alpharetta Mayor Pro Tem and Councilmen Endorse Jake Alpharetta Mayor Pro Tem Dan Merkel and fellow council members Douglas DeRito and Donald Mitchell today announced their support for Jake Evans in the 6th Congressional District race. "Jake knows what makes the communities in the 6th Congressional District special and great places to live," Merkel said. "He'll fight to make sure Washington bureaucrats don't federalize local zoning decisions in cities like Alpharetta, he'll support our efforts to keep our streets safe by backing the blue and he'll ensure we get our fair share of the transportation dollars that we need in this growing region. Jake will be a great representative for Alpharetta and all of the 6th District." "Dan, Douglas and Donald are true public servants whose visionary leadership has turned Alpharetta into a premier place to live, work and play," Jake said. "I appreciate the faith they have placed in me, and I look forward to working with them as their member of Congress to ensure Alpharetta and all of North Fulton continue to thrive."
---

name: Allen Roth
subject: Iran sending uranium to Russia?!
body:
Peter, I need you to pay attention. If you think Joe Biden's foreign policy has been bad, it's about to get much, much worse. _First Afghanistan, now Ukraine, and soon, Iran._ The mainstream media has all eyes on Eastern Europe right now, while the Biden "administration" just handed the new Axis of Evil the deal of their dreams. **I don't know if you remember Obama's Iran Deal, but Biden's new Iran Deal is even worse,**[**and we have a short window of time to stop it.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59827449:6p_9wjoNr:m:1:3317145305:8FE04ED90D421770844322B925D26F15:r) [**DONATE NOW TO STOP IRAN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59827449:6p_9wjoNr:m:1:3317145305:8FE04ED90D421770844322B925D26F15:r) The most shocking part about the new Iran Deal is the Biden administration relied on Russia to negotiate this deal and allowed Russia to dictate the terms. _That's right._ While Joe Biden pretends to call the shots with Russia, he's depending on them to negotiate a deal for their allies. **An even more terrifying revelation is that the deal allows Iran to send enriched Uranium directly to Russia!** So let me get this straight. The left is obsessed with Russian disinformation, but Biden trusts Russia to lead the Iran negotiations? We've sanctioned Russia, but will give them an exception on Iran? US citizens are getting slammed at the pump, but we're going to give Putin and Iran a windfall? Meanwhile, the United States is less safe, not to mention sending YOUR hard-earned money to people that want to kill us. We have a chance right now to stop this deal but can't do it without you. [**Will you make an emergency donation of $25 or more to Secure America Now, and give us the ammunition to mount a grassroots campaign to bring Joe Biden's Iran Deal to a screeching halt?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59827449:6p_9wjoNr:m:1:3317145305:8FE04ED90D421770844322B925D26F15:r) Before I get too much further, I suppose I should introduce myself. My name is Allen Roth and I'm the Co-Founder of Secure America Now (SAN), the largest grassroots organization in the United States dedicated to keeping our nation safe. You may remember the last time the radical left tried to distract us with a war and force an Iran Deal down our throats. It was 2015, and Barack Obama was sending planes full of cash to Iran. When we found out, we called in a full court press from coast-to-coast, collecting petition signatures, showing up to Senator Manchin's townhall events, and making hundreds of thousands of phone calls telling our senators to stand up and oppose the deal. Famously, both Senators Manchin and Schumer opposed the Iran Deal because of our efforts. But this kind of grassroots action takes money, and lots of it.**If we're going to stop an even worse bill under an even worse "president", we need to raise it fast.** The media told us that President Trump was Putin's puppet, but the truth is, Joe Biden's the one Putin is playing like a fiddle. The Biden "administration" wants us to think they're laying down the law and putting the squeeze on Russia, but they're relying on them to broker a deal that makes our most powerful enemies even stronger. This isn't leadership, this is suicide. **And if you don't want our kids and grandkids growing up in a weak America ruled by our adversaries, you must act now.** [**Please make a generous, emergency donation to Secure America Now, and help us do what we do best.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59827449:6p_9wjoNr:m:1:3317145305:8FE04ED90D421770844322B925D26F15:r) Joe Biden wants us all focused on Ukraine while his people grovel to Russia and Iran in closed door meetings. As gas prices are soaring, Americans are paying more at the pump. We won't increase our domestic oil supply, but we'll pay the mullahs and terror supporters in Iran! Biden and the left want us distracted by the sensational headlines while he quietly castrates our country, so by the time we're paying any attention it's already too late. He could announce this deal ANY day now, and my team will need a war chest to stop this one like we stopped the last one. Please, don't hesitate, [**donate to Secure America Now, and stop this deal while we still have a fighting chance.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59827449:6p_9wjoNr:m:1:3317145305:8FE04ED90D421770844322B925D26F15:r) This deal would lift sanctions on some of the world's most horrific terrorists, and if it goes through, Iran WILL send enriched uranium stockpiles to Russia. I know I don't have to tell you what this would mean for America. Joe Biden has made us a laughingstock on the world stage, but even worse, he's put a target on our backs. Our enemies are circling us like vultures, and if our own "President" won't protect us, we'll have to do it ourselves. The new Iran Deal MUST come before the United States Senate because it changes the terms that President Trump imposed on Iran. We're building a grassroots army to call, petition and DEMAND that our senators vote NO on the Iran Deal, and we need your help to activate it. I hope I can count on you. | |
---
Sincerely
**Allen Roth**
President
Secure America Now
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59827449:6p_9wjoNr:m:1:3317145305:8FE04ED90D421770844322B925D26F15:r)
|
---
P.S. Every single day Joe Biden is in office is a gift to our enemies, but this one could be lethal. [**Please make an emergency donation of $25 or more and help us stop this Iran Deal in its tracks, just like we stopped the last one.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59827449:6p_9wjoNr:m:1:3317145305:8FE04ED90D421770844322B925D26F15:r)

P.P.S. A deal that makes Russia, China, and Iran stronger is a deal that makes America weaker. We can't let Joe Biden and his cronies get away with this.
[**DONATE NOW TO STOP IRAN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59827449:6p_9wjoNr:m:1:3317145305:8FE04ED90D421770844322B925D26F15:r)
|
---

|

Hello,
The courage we are seeing from President Zelensky is not the kind of instantaneous courage used to charge an enemy or the self-promoting false courage of Trumpian showmanship.
Zelensky’s courage is that of thought-through deliberation, choosing to sacrifice oneself to protect others, to do one’s duty in office. That is the definition of bravery.
**Imagine what Putin must be thinking when Russian citizens and besieged Ukrainians stand up to him more fiercely than senior Republicans like Chuck Grassley ever stood up to Donald Trump.**
The Javelin missiles that Ukrainians are now bravely using to repel Russian tanks are the same ones that Trump was impeached for holding hostage – and that Republicans refused to hold him accountable for.
When I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, the Democrats will have the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. That’s fitting in the shadow of January 6th, because it’s time we had more leaders in Washington who choose sacrifice and service – versus corporate donations and personal gain.
The polls show a close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are already queuing up millions to spend against me. I’m a hard target, but that won’t stop Fox News from fabricating some made-up tale.
**We need to raise another $250,000 before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow to fight back, but right now, we’re still $27,857 short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to urgently give $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our critical mid-month deadline at midnight tomorrow – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42939015/334991902/-42398318?refcode=em20220314am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWFhMDJiYi05NmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RXJDqYCIUFz0vG66UOj-CoFkYMYxpD0YzOohoVSaSA=)

clean_body: Hello, The courage we are seeing from President Zelensky is not the kind of instantaneous courage used to charge an enemy or the self-promoting false courage of Trumpian showmanship. Zelensky’s courage is that of thought-through deliberation, choosing to sacrifice oneself to protect others, to do one’s duty in office. That is the definition of bravery. Imagine what Putin must be thinking when Russian citizens and besieged Ukrainians stand up to him more fiercely than senior Republicans like Chuck Grassley ever stood up to Donald Trump. The Javelin missiles that Ukrainians are now bravely using to repel Russian tanks are the same ones that Trump was impeached for holding hostage – and that Republicans refused to hold him accountable for. When I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, the Democrats will have the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. That’s fitting in the shadow of January 6th, because it’s time we had more leaders in Washington who choose sacrifice and service – versus corporate donations and personal gain. The polls show a close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are already queuing up millions to spend against me. I’m a hard target, but that won’t stop Fox News from fabricating some made-up tale. We need to raise another $250,000 before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow to fight back, but right now, we’re still $27,857 short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you chip in now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The past few years have shown that democracy is a fragile thing; but it is always worth fighting for. Sign me up. “All engines ahead full.” Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Deb Finkenauer
subject: my daughter, Abby
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Abby is counting on this scrappy, passionate team to stand with her.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42939797/334995201/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk737-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTU4ZmE2Yy05N2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q97bGBz_3Z3UHeGP8q-MqUCwcHflxscKokUWDWTpIMc=)
Hi there, Peter – it's Deb, and you're looking at a photo of me and my daughter, Abby, enjoying cupcakes we baked together recently. You might be wondering: What the heck do cupcakes have to do with Abby's Senate race against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa? **Well, if you give me just a moment, I'd love to explain.**
In 2019, Abby agreed to host eight Democratic presidential candidates, multiple union presidents and hundreds of voters at her Finkenauer Fish Fry event. I knew this was an especially important moment for Abby and a valuable opportunity for Iowans to hear from these leaders. So when she asked for my help making the day a success, I happily agreed.
We knew that her guests would be eager to talk politics and just as eager to eat, so Abby tasked me with making dessert. **Over a few days, I baked nearly 1,000 cupcakes – chocolate, pumpkin, red velvet, a flavor for everyone!** I even ran out of space in my freezer to store them. (Thankfully, my husband's pickup truck and sub-freezing temperatures provided the perfect backup.)
**You see, our family understands the meaning of hard work and the importance of showing up for each other.** That's how we raised Abby, and it's how she won election to the Iowa House at only 25 and then became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from red to blue.
Now, thanks to that same work ethic, she's going to defeat Sen. Grassley, become the youngest woman elected to the Senate and give Iowa families the fighter in Washington that we need. **But this has never been a one-woman team. From cupcakes to grassroots donations, Abby is counting on this scrappy, passionate team to stand with her.**
**Iowa is ready for Abby – nearly two-thirds of likely voters here don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley![That's why today I'm asking you to make a contribution to my daughter's campaign of $5, or whatever you can spare, so that she has the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley, bring new leadership to Iowa and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42939799/334995222/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk737-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTU4ZmE2Yy05N2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q97bGBz_3Z3UHeGP8q-MqUCwcHflxscKokUWDWTpIMc=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42939801/334995242/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk737-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTU4ZmE2Yy05N2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q97bGBz_3Z3UHeGP8q-MqUCwcHflxscKokUWDWTpIMc=)

– Deb Finkenauer (Abby's mom)

body:
Peter,

Busted.

On an undercover video, a New York Times reporter admitted what you and I know to be true...

**...FBI informants infiltrated the crowd on January 6.**

The Deep State staged a "_FEDSURRECTION_ " that day to frame the America First movement.

_And the only way to expose this massive scandal is to elect an America First Majority in Congress so I can vote for Donald J. Trump as Speaker of the House_.

Can you imagine Speaker Trump dragging the head of the FBI before Congress and forcing him to answer under oath how many FBI informants were in the crowd that day and if they incited any acts of violence?

**_I know I can._**

But I need your help to fire Nancy Pelosi and cast my vote to replace her with Donald Trump.

**[Can I count on you to chip in a contribution of $10, $25, or $50 to help elect America First conservatives that will join me in voting for Donald Trump as Speaker of the House](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59795253:sylMGtHZN:m:1:2365227053:9E25A191DEF1BBF0D65A5BB8B2B53226:r)?** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59795253:sylMGtHZN:m:1:2365227053:9E25A191DEF1BBF0D65A5BB8B2B53226:r) [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59795253:sylMGtHZN:m:1:2365227053:9E25A191DEF1BBF0D65A5BB8B2B53226:r) >From the Russian collusion hoax to Democrats trying to impeach Donald Trump to hide Joe and Hunter Biden's corruption, to the obvious fraud in the 2020 election, to the "FEDSURRECTION" on January 6, the Deep State's covered up one crime against the constitution after another.

**The cover-up ends the day an America First majority led by Speaker Donald Trump sweeps Nancy Pelosi and her allies out of power.**

You and I can finally pry answers from the FBI to questions like who is Ray Epps?

The phony congressional select committee thanked Ray Epps despite video capturing him urging people to enter the Capitol.

When Republicans take control, we'll put Epps under oath in front of America and ask the real questions.

**I've been saying for MONTHS that we need a real investigation into what happened on January 6.**

We don't need a sham witch hunt spearheaded by Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney with only one goal -- to kick Donald Trump and other America First conservatives like me off the ballot.

Now, this bombshell undercover video shows the New York Times knew the truth about FBI informants in the crowd on January 6 and hid the fact from the American people.

**But none of this will matter if I don't win re-election as part of an America First majority.**

**[So please help me fire Nancy Pelosi and vote for Donald Trump as Speaker of the House by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59795253:sylMGtHZN:m:1:2365227053:9E25A191DEF1BBF0D65A5BB8B2B53226:r).**

clean_body: Peter, Busted. On an undercover video, a New York Times reporter admitted what you and I know to be true... ...FBI informants infiltrated the crowd on January 6. The Deep State staged a "FEDSURRECTION " that day to frame the America First movement. And the only way to expose this massive scandal is to elect an America First Majority in Congress so I can vote for Donald J. Trump as Speaker of the House. Can you imagine Speaker Trump dragging the head of the FBI before Congress and forcing him to answer under oath how many FBI informants were in the crowd that day and if they incited any acts of violence? I know I can. But I need your help to fire Nancy Pelosi and cast my vote to replace her with Donald Trump. ? >From the Russian collusion hoax to Democrats trying to impeach Donald Trump to hide Joe and Hunter Biden's corruption, to the obvious fraud in the 2020 election, to the "FEDSURRECTION" on January 6, the Deep State's covered up one crime against the constitution after another. The cover-up ends the day an America First majority led by Speaker Donald Trump sweeps Nancy Pelosi and her allies out of power. You and I can finally pry answers from the FBI to questions like who is Ray Epps? The phony congressional select committee thanked Ray Epps despite video capturing him urging people to enter the Capitol. When Republicans take control, we'll put Epps under oath in front of America and ask the real questions. I've been saying for MONTHS that we need a real investigation into what happened on January 6. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW9-pwtHAN

State of education

I don't believe the majority of the public really knows
what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They
assume they are taught the same
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW9-pwtHAN

From the
Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:
Hello,
I don't
believe the majority of the public really knows what is being
taught to our children and grandchildren.
They
assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing
up-that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone
has a chance at success.
From what
I've seen, this isn't always the case. However, I want to know
what you've seen.

Dr. Ben
Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute
I believe
that children as young as elementary age are being taught to
reject our American values.
They are
told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it
overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our
Constitution is "out of date" and needs to be "modernized."

Progressives are rewriting our nation's history and they are
doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let
this happen!
At the
start of 2022, I'm going to be meeting with political leaders and
educational "experts" across the country. I'm going to make sure
people know what is really happening in our schools.
I want to
be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest
to the issue. Specifically, I would like to include your
thoughts.
The
American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded,
has created a unique survey. We're trying to gauge the state of
America's Educational System by surveying people like you.
I'd like
to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better
understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You
can access the survey here...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59795598:W9-pwtHAN:m:3:2532013465:1CF19C9B802BDDC1882408D62AFFB0E4:r
Thank you
for your consideration.
Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: Release: The Truth About Biden's Gas Prices That Facebook Doesn't Want You To See
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 14, 2022
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo [michael@ascent-strategic.com](mailto:michael@ascent-strategic.com), 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| The Truth About Biden's Gas Prices That Facebook Doesn't Want You To See
---
| Athens, GA \- Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates nationwide, recently produced a satirical graphic highlighting Joe Biden's role in rising gas prices. After being posted on social media, this graphic became the latest target of big tech censorship. Shortly after the ad buy for the graphic went live, the ad buy was suddenly and unfairly canceled by Facebook for "misinformation."
---
|
---
| The graphic above was flagged by Facebook for "misinformation."
---
|
---
| The following notice was found in our ad account once the advertisement was removed by Facebook
---
| Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"People all around our country are suffering heavily from the worst gas prices we have ever seen. The purpose of this piece was to draw attention to this ongoing problem, but big tech decided that they didn't like our criticism of Biden. Without any detailed explanation, our organization's social media post was flagged for 'misinformation,' and then, shortly after that, our ad was shut down.
"The reality is that the American people have every right to criticize Joe Biden over these outrageous gas prices. During the Trump administration, we achieved energy independence for the first time in nearly 70 years, and we were a net exporter of energy. Americans were paying less at the pump, and American business and our economy were thriving. Under Biden, gas prices have surpassed the highest numbers we have ever seen, and Biden and his administration have failed to address this situation adequately. body:

---
Friend -- Jay's birthday is today, and I hope you'll join the Meet Our Moment team in wishing him a happy birthday! With Meet Our Moment's second candidate training right around the corner on Saturday, April 2nd, it would mean the world to Jay if you would chip in $33 today in honor of his 33rd birthday so we can train our Commonwealth's next generation of leaders. **[Meet Our Moment is free (!!!) to all participants so we hope you will support our efforts with a contribution of $33 today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/NecCSEpaLt8T9uppEHora7DQtsxGFr-Dx5CcYJzC6-w=/KWiLJTAPZonnfk07BCMDzaO3VAKkVGr-sa2zh1DD_tc=)** We first launched Meet Our Moment in August and held our first training session in December with the aim to create a pipeline for minority candidates who are prepared to run for state and local offices across the Commonwealth by providing them with the necessary resources and tools to run effective campaigns and win. Check out the highlights from our first session [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NecCSEpaLt8T9uppEHora7DQtsxGFr-Dx5CcYJzC6-w=/NBrrBl3pDVZTqREAdlAXglHXdRAO9HBjP5pjCcDwgeM=?app=desktop&v=Psaa7E5-oS0)! | | | Hello, As I’ve been traveling across Ohio, I’ve seen firsthand how fired up people are to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. The energy is growing every day and I know folks are ready for a change here in our state. Just take a look at our phenomenal slate of candidates running statewide: Jeff Crossman for Attorney General Taylor Sappington for Auditor of StateChelsea Clark for Secretary of StateScott Schertzer for Treasurer **I know we can win these races, but Jeff, Taylor, Chelsea, and Scott are up against a massive GOP fundraising machine. They need resources ASAP to help counter the attacks and win their races.** [**That’s why we’re launching an emergency 24-hour $20,000 goal to help these candidates kickstart their campaigns. Make a donation right now to help us flip Ohio blue >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42934144/334980907/176967131?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTUwYmVmYS04NWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYUJ9DfWJuPyotZyK5EJ0mHvkh_FbZquRvKzrvQ_5mY=)

| | Raised by a single mom, Jeff worked nights to pay his way through college and law school. He knows that for most Ohioans, nothing is given and everything is earned. **That’s why I know Jeff will fight for all Ohioans as our next Attorney General. ** As Nelsonville Auditor, Taylor started an investigation on day one which led to the largest theft and fraud bust in Nelsonville history. And he’s breaking barriers as the first openly gay candidate for statewide office in Ohio. **He balanced the books and caught the crooks in his hometown, which is exactly what he’ll do for all of Ohio as Auditor of State. ** Chelsea grew up in rural Ohio as a 6th generation farmer, which instilled in her the values of perseverance, grit, and advocacy. As a small business owner, she learned about entrepreneurship in a way that you only can from behind the wheel. **Now, she’s ready to put that knowledge to work as Ohio’s next Secretary of State. ** Scott grew up in Marion, Ohio and served his community as a teacher for 13 years. He knows that when the people in power in Columbus spend their time playing politics, it’s people in towns across Ohio who pay the price. That’s why Scott is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for you. **You deserve a treasurer you can trust, and that’s exactly what you’ll get with Scott. ** [**I know we have what it takes to win these races, but only if Jeff, Taylor, Chelsea, and Scott have the resources to compete against their GOP opponents. Please, make a donation to help us raise $20,000 in the next 24 hours >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42934146/334980909/176967131?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTUwYmVmYS04NWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYUJ9DfWJuPyotZyK5EJ0mHvkh_FbZquRvKzrvQ_5mY=)

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: The Green New Deal is an economy killer and threatens our national security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I've been very clear and consistent on the issue of American Energy Independence since I announced my first candidacy for Congress in 2019. The Green New Deal is an economy killer and threatens our national security. Joe Biden and his radical allies in Congress must immediately reverse course with their Green New Deal agenda if we are to lower domestic gas prices, decrease home heating and cooling energy costs, and reduce our allies' reliance on Russian, Iranian, and Venezuelan oil. [Find a video clip below with some of my previous comments on the importance of America's Energy Independence! ](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=188ad721cd56473a856f2ac153ed5362&_e=oN84vB2PlWj4d3dOzOgjQlrD_z695wz0JMnO6bzR6DdRKiuMX7dRrJqhnYFEFFrvcBqiXcqrf74qw05V5X5xCwPbhS4eSU7Aug5IWYAFUjRmw3f20gO3yxElK-_yXCPH0wIzrL-8uI-62nnKq4XEhHTtNPCTREtO9tZtLba2OsQ0x71SjtrbZwWgdy_sis9y_cs3be9XBO35y76HhOsCSCshr0MRST1YEYZIYUjgtIHT8JxmBjlPEQjhDB6NqyxV0npLWEcTTs3LxNSmWL0WZsJROix-yXL2DMPjQ73FFTk3h_G8fwVKLSIoJ1gt7vJt)

name: Demings, Val
subject: Senate control hinges on Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
This is urgent.
| | |
---
**This is urgent.**
**As of 11 a.m. ET, I'm short of my mid-month fundraising goal – and I can't afford to fall behind now that Election Day is rapidly approaching. So I'm coming to you personally, friend:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950124/335041624/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2614-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzBmZDg2Mi1hY2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uVq9SiZeSQlOv25bI8t_kxao117Xj3XB6SoNSPP-L48=)
Senate control hinges on what happens here in Florida, and we have a real chance to flip this seat blue. Florida's last Senate race was one of the closest in the country. That's why Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are spending _millions_ to defeat me and prop up Marco Rubio. If I'm going to have the resources to win, I must reach my midnight goal.
**The next donation could be the one that closes my fundraising gap. So with p****olls showing Marco Rubio and me neck and neck,**** I've got to ask: [Will you donate $5 or more to help me flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic majority? Every single grassroots donation is absolutely crucial ahead of my upcoming mid-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950125/335041625/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2614-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzBmZDg2Mi1hY2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uVq9SiZeSQlOv25bI8t_kxao117Xj3XB6SoNSPP-L48=)**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950675/335045319/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE1ZGNlMC1hZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=np5xtSWPA0XDCPPOmugvw0sYkPIG8kS4mf0oSUA5Wzg=)
[_**Hey there — we’re respectfully asking: will you make a $5 donation to help us defend the Senate and keep Republicans out of the majority?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950676/335045320/117627974?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220314_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE1ZGNlMC1hZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=np5xtSWPA0XDCPPOmugvw0sYkPIG8kS4mf0oSUA5Wzg=) | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950678/335045322/117627974?amount=5&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220314_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE1ZGNlMC1hZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=np5xtSWPA0XDCPPOmugvw0sYkPIG8kS4mf0oSUA5Wzg=)
---
Here’s a little bit more you should know about why your $5 is so important and what it will go towards this year:
First and foremost, your $5 is so important because Republicans are already raising record-breaking amounts of money as they work to take back Senate control. Last month alone, the Senate Republican fundraising arm raised a record-setting $11.7 MILLION.
Now we know what you might be thinking, _how is $5 going to help vs. $11.7 million?_
And at face value you’re right, it’s not a fair fight. But it’s also not just your $5. It’s $5 from a teacher in Atlanta. It’s $5 from a Nurse in Tucson. It’s thousands of $5 donations from folks across the country, and when added together it’s how we will take on the Republican campaign machine.
**This team has already shown we can come together and defy the odds to secure this Senate majority — and this year, we are going to do it again.**
It isn’t going to be easy, but very few things worth fighting for are, which is why today we have to ask:
[_**If you are able, will you be 1 of 1,000 people to donate $5 before tomorrow’s deadline to help defend our Senate majority? It’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goal and defend our Senate majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950686/335045328/117627974?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220314_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE1ZGNlMC1hZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=np5xtSWPA0XDCPPOmugvw0sYkPIG8kS4mf0oSUA5Wzg=)

clean_body: | = = | = Here’s a little bit more you should know about why your $5 is so important and what it will go towards this year: First and foremost, your $5 is so important because Republicans are already raising record-breaking amounts of money as they work to take back Senate control. Last month alone, the Senate Republican fundraising arm raised a record-setting $11.7 MILLION. Now we know what you might be thinking, how is $5 going to help vs. $11.7 million? And at face value you’re right, it’s not a fair fight. But it’s also not just your $5. It’s $5 from a teacher in Atlanta. It’s $5 from a Nurse in Tucson. It’s thousands of $5 donations from folks across the country, and when added together it’s how we will take on the Republican campaign machine. This team has already shown we can come together and defy the odds to secure this Senate majority — and this year, we are going to do it again. It isn’t going to be easy, but very few things worth fighting for are, which is why today we have to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s come together again this year and do all we can to fight for our Senate majority. name: Emily Mellits
subject: Support Jocelyn against dark money interests
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

Last month, I asked Team Benson supporters to donate to our campaign with the average grassroots contribution we’re receiving: $23.97.
The response was overwhelming. In fact, we had one of our best fundraising months of this year thanks to an average contribution of $23.97.
This outstanding fundraising support got us thinking! We know that we can support our campaign by calling on you, our grassroots donor network. But what is the other side doing to raise money?

We did some digging, and we found that the DeVos family and their network of special interest groups have been supporting partisan conspiracy theorists in Michigan for years. We know they have personally spent millions bankrolling dark money political action groups and couldn’t care less about preserving democracy in Michigan.

So that’s what we’re up against, friend. A network of ultra-rich special interests that spread election lies for their own partisan gain.

Our campaign is not united by wealth or partisanship. We are a movement of concerned citizens who want to ensure that democracy remains alive in Michigan. Now that also means for our campaign to exist, we need you all to occasionally support Jocelyn with a grassroots donation.
WIll you donate $23.97 today to support Jocelyn’s re-election campaign and defeat the dark money interests that are lined up against her? [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=031422]

secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=031422&amount=23.97 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=031422&amount=23.97] secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=031122 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=031422]Thank you for your time and support.
Emily

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: 🚨Jacobs Campaign Update🚨
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress.com/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6178997?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| Welcome to the Jacobs Campaign Update. This week I was in Jefferson and Oswego Counties.

I have always believed best way to represent my constituents is to get out into the community, and hear directly from them about their needs.

I had an excellent time this week meeting with elected officials, farmers, small business owners, and community organizations.

Additionally, I held a press conference in Watertown on the rising gas prices facing millions of Americans - I called for the President to reverse his bad policies and allow for American energy production to be unleashed. You can read the media coverage here:

[WWNYTV](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=ad4c3ced64&e=13f35c4add)
[Watertown Daily Times](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=976e22c2c0&e=13f35c4add)

Here are some other highlights from my week:
---
|
---
| _Gas prices press conference in Watertown. _
---
|
---
| _Answering questions from voters __and_ _ elected officials in __Jefferson County. _
---
|
---
| _Touring Renzi Foodservice in Watertown._
---
|
---
| _Touring Agbotic and learning about __their_ _ innovative agriculture systems in Sackets Harbor._
---
|
---
| _Visiting Yardley Maple in Mexico. _
---
|
---
| _Touring Curious Kidz in Oswego. _
---
|
---
| _Stopping by the new Riverwalk Coffee in Oswego. _
---
|
---
| _Grabbing lunch at Riverwalk Pizza. _
---
|
---
| _Meeting with __residents_ _ in charge of the __effort_ _ to designate a __National_ _ Marine __Sanctuary_ _ in Lake Ontario._

These were my second trips to Jefferson and Oswego Counties - each time I have learned more about these incredible communities.

I am looking forward to representing these counties in Congress to make sure their families, farmers, and small businesses thrive!

Stay tuned for more updates from the campaign trail!

Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs
---

subject: Make America red
body:

Businesses are booming, families are thriving, and _people are freer_.

I have been serving the great people of Florida for many years.
**Our mid-month deadline is TOMORROW at 11:59 PM, and this is a _critical moment_ to take Florida’s conservative values nationwide.**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg4t1vlmrfg70b1jddrua7op3l3v1eonvj7186vo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jm6p76cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfddbkcpi78ohhe3jj7d9i6hp62t3hmsojfd3i61gj6p9hmhrm4c9mmjgncd36c1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8rmcd72mmpm0tr3cooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7sn3v86m6hosavvf70a19lbf0imjf132dom1h68_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jm6p76cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg5oh05d82s55q8350acnm1852con2ki27mc29o0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jm6p76cdh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztpf0p9eojf1bklugmui5p40bdgc5lmfue68oib0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jm6p76cdh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi69hfcd0ikec475e63t7od7rj2hc8afoo3jb6bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jm6p76cdh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoib9uh8nrvicp8svilgp6orvjk2r570b35ke1g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jm6p76cdh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj868lil4a8a2o4k8v30tdaqsq2mt9a43aj82t30_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jm6p76cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: A behind the scenes story from the Trump Administration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I want to share a story with you about a topic that is so important to me: religious freedom.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgpftfteffhb83pp80qh3l66k2b0g5trnam22t90_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrj4c5gcmrreoj1mqom6dhhm5hbcslhchp31dbk6gpb6ddl6th75dj56lim7d30sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj39ollmgrr4cb664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jm4pr5c5i66oh5u)

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z28cvd8rmlmv4j29kmhsm2n3vjadl9uvhun4phh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jmaob4cdh2bs)
---
I want to take you back to my time as President Trump's Director of the Central Intelligence Agency. I was America's most senior spy, leading the world's finest intelligence service.

On this occasion, I was climbing out of a plane in the dark of the night. I can't tell you exactly where I was, but I can tell you it was a very challenging part of the world.

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi28gg0kuhfqq5cf9scup3abmdq29a4g09t4qhk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jmaob4cdh2bs)
---

I'm greeted by a member of the ground crew whose name I never knew. Imagine my surprise when he welcomed me, reached out to shake my hand and placed in it a palm-sized, tattered Bible.

When I got in my vehicle, I read the hand-written note inside it: _**" Mr. Director, you have been a light to me and to the world. Bless you." **_

I later learned that this gentleman worked for the U.S. State Department.

I had no idea I would one day become America's 70th Secretary of State, having led him and his colleagues. But I did know that, for at least one person, I had been a light.

_**This little story is not about me though.**_ This story is about each of us and the mission we have to manifest reverence for our Lord in every single thing we do.

The challenge for each of us is to be that light, no matter where you are or what you do.

**_In order to be that light, we need to ensure that the federal government does not limit our ability to live out our faith. _**

I know some people in the media will break out the pitchforks when they hear that I ask God for direction in my work. But that isn't a new idea.

_**Let's be clear: any nation that disregards the essential right of religious freedom cannot claim to be good in any other measure. Full stop.**_

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm2e79dedle7tajkitcal37bmp0gdku8qf1u9nk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jmaob4cdh2bs)
---

Our founders regarded religious freedom as an absolutely essential right of mankind and central to our founding. Religious freedom is the first freedom according to the Constitution.

Sadly, religious freedom, especially for followers of Christ, is under increasing attack right here in the United States from our own government. We've seen government mandates that have forced churches to close their doors and new laws that make it harder for Americans to live out their faith.

Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, _**[I'm asking you to chip in today to help us elect more principled leaders who will always protect religious liberty.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3a7v0um4s09husjajp9eefdig622vvqrmu5n35o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jmaob4cdh2bs "I’m asking you to chip in today tohelp us elect more principled leaders who will always protect religious liberty.")**_

---
| | [STAND FOR RELIGIOUS LIBERTY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo20cn472h9n109c2ilheihlgm2927ugqd95llng_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jmaob4cdh2bs)
---

I'm calling on you to join me in defending religious freedom - both here at home and abroad.

Let us renew our commitment to putting our faith and America and our values first--because when we do, we prosper and the whole world prospers and is peaceful. When America leads from the front and not from behind, we are a better nation.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf3v0dhiil6jh4qltliem5j3v4lnsmc0733k3sq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9jmaob4cdh2bs)
---
Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

clean_body: I want to share a story with you about a topic that is so important to me: religious freedom. | | | | | | I want to take you back to my time as President Trump's Director of the Central Intelligence Agency. I was America's most senior spy, leading the world's finest intelligence service. On this occasion, I was climbing out of a plane in the dark of the night. I can't tell you exactly where I was, but I can tell you it was a very challenging part of the world. | I'm greeted by a member of the ground crew whose name I never knew. Imagine my surprise when he welcomed me, reached out to shake my hand and placed in it a palm-sized, tattered Bible. When I got in my vehicle, I read the hand-written note inside it: " Mr. Director, you have been a light to me and to the world. Bless you." I later learned that this gentleman worked for the U.S. State Department. I had no idea I would one day become America's 70th Secretary of State, having led him and his colleagues. But I did know that, for at least one person, I had been a light. This little story is not about me though. This story is about each of us and the mission we have to manifest reverence for our Lord in every single thing we do. The challenge for each of us is to be that light, no matter where you are or what you do. In order to be that light, we need to ensure that the federal government does not limit our ability to live out our faith. I know some people in the media will break out the pitchforks when they hear that I ask God for direction in my work. But that isn't a new idea. Let's be clear: any nation that disregards the essential right of religious freedom cannot claim to be good in any other measure. Full stop. | Our founders regarded religious freedom as an absolutely essential right of mankind and central to our founding. Religious freedom is the first freedom according to the Constitution. Sadly, religious freedom, especially for followers of Christ, is under increasing attack right here in the United States from our own government. We've seen government mandates that have forced churches to close their doors and new laws that make it harder for Americans to live out their faith. Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? If so, "I’m asking you to chip in today tohelp us elect more principled leaders who will always protect religious liberty." | | I'm calling on you to join me in defending religious freedom - both here at home and abroad. Let us renew our commitment to putting our faith and America and our values first--because when we do, we prosper and the whole world prospers and is peaceful. When America leads from the front and not from behind, we are a better nation. Unapologetically American, | Mike Pompeo 70th Secretary of State | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. body:
I want to know what you think [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=922e818756ed4079846838f21363e0ae&_e=ACk955S_2BBJTLWGOOCZDaQ1DKZ0Hh7_WJx_aji7ypz5VQCHbMoe7tqyopkzivudF1bihYf-2BXU2lwqiaqkZZyjosgCdgxQQUlg6VGhNcRepA48S5XqxzCGg1kpIc-4tJiipxkE15GvDd-j_mJDZ56Gsy3t0txA9yZrnTXoCNoQfR7MiblwE2y3Nh0c90z-akPMs8fgf_u3JXZwYcU0dk0hqqaru_24MPw35HmQv8_NFdZSCEYed9Yw2QNAVMNydk5AfZo2S9a-PJtKc_k0X4tnnPbK20E6UaZ4eMn8hBoLkJn9U-lSlmS44Lmg6nDONsB0AxGEEKKGjLwPX2i8sA%3D%3D) I can't imagine where we would be as a country without the bravery and sacrifice of our servicemen and women. **](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=922e818756ed4079846838f21363e0ae&_e=ACk955S_2BBJTLWGOOCZDaQ1DKZ0Hh7_WJx_aji7ypz5VQCHbMoe7tqyopkzivudF1bihYf-2BXU2lwqiaqkZZyjosgCdgxQQUlg6VGhNcRepA48S5XqxzCGg1kpIc-4s8d3XGcWdWxfhld14euciH19vDVStXc3dxPoIoL0838S69-MYMqA04LJk_kiPBfxXctJ7KEVw45VbvjLLMmiRNPcMyNIfPTswX21T_NDzsxEi-7BuRVwrvMcHjVsy2bE6wCQVVCKQVKV1eFB31x9MexBFwYdw9UmBHop_0x0WSf7mwJUD9gF3KJbGRUgr6lEBMgUp3V6Tg4r3PdpG0j_uA%3D%3D) A kind word goes a long way. By signing this petition, you are letting our veterans know you appreciate their service and care about their well-being. body:
| | | | Peter, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one - so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump 's successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That's the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59832075:JNoFcjoNy:m:1:3317145305:3CC281E7FBFF6FA02C158ED8C5E66465:r "By ordering your
copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi's targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I've signed won't last long, so order yours immediately.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59832075:JNoFcjoNy:m:1:3317145305:3CC281E7FBFF6FA02C158ED8C5E66465:r "So please

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

Jim Jordan
