clean_body: Together, we can flip Ohio blue. Team, You already know how important it is that we defeat Mike DeWine and elect a Democratic governor in Ohio. But it’s also essential that we elect Democrats up and down the ballot, especially: Jeff Crossman for Attorney General Taylor Sappington for Auditor of State Chelsea Clark for Secretary of State Scott Schertzer for Treasurer = Raised by a single mom, Jeff worked nights to pay his way through college and law school. He knows that for most Ohioans, nothing is given and everything is earned. That’s why I know Jeff will fight for all Ohioans as our next Attorney General. As Nelsonville Auditor, Taylor started an investigation on day one which led to the largest theft and fraud bust in Nelsonville history. And he’s breaking barriers as the first openly gay candidate for statewide office in Ohio. He balanced the books and caught the crooks in his hometown, which is exactly what he’ll do for all of Ohio as Auditor of State. Chelsea grew up in rural Ohio as a 6th generation farmer, which instilled in her the values of perseverance, grit, and advocacy. As a small business owner, she learned about entrepreneurship in a way that you only can from behind the wheel. Now, she’s ready to put that knowledge to work as Ohio’s next Secretary of State. Scott grew up in Marion, Ohio and served his community as a teacher for 13 years. He knows that when the people in power in Columbus spend their time playing politics, it’s people in towns across Ohio who pay the price. That’s why Scott is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for you. You deserve a treasurer you can trust, and that’s exactly what you’ll get with Scott. = Thanks for supporting Democrats across Ohio, Nan Whaley **= Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401 This campaign is powered by supporters like you, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, .

But we have a plan to win in November, and we want to share it with you: **Our dedicated team is ready to knock on doors, make phone calls, and register thousands of new voters to make sure Democrats win up and down the ballot in 2022.** Election Day is less than eight months away, team! subject: POLL: Dems are gaining momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950770/335045542/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220314newpoll_ec4c_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmJiZDZlNi1hZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SjC3T8g8zbYga8_Qo1gCWogIa-7mrvSfV3dHntztQws=)
---
If you’ve been feeling pessimistic about this election year, I’ve got some good news for you, Peter. As of late last week, according to FiveThirtyEight, _all six of the most recent Congressional generic ballot polls show Democrats ahead_. Look at this: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950771/335045570/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220314newpoll_ec4c_allop_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmJiZDZlNi1hZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SjC3T8g8zbYga8_Qo1gCWogIa-7mrvSfV3dHntztQws=)
---
**Democrats nationally are gaining ground, and we need your help to turn those gains into momentum for our campaign.**
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950772/335045571/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220314newpoll_ec4c_allop_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmJiZDZlNi1hZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SjC3T8g8zbYga8_Qo1gCWogIa-7mrvSfV3dHntztQws=)
---
These poll results are huge! And I think it’s for two main reasons.
First, President Biden’s State of the Union speech reminded voters that **Democrats are the party of solutions.** Getting Americans vaccinated, ending the pandemic’s stranglehold on our daily lives, investing in infrastructure, and creating _6.6 million jobs_ (the most _ever_ in a single year): the hard work is paying off. Next up is lowering prescription drug prices and taking on corporate greed; we’re ready for those fights.
Second, **Americans are horrified and embarrassed by the Republican Party’s refusal to forcefully condemn Vladimir Putin’s invasion of Ukraine.** Madison Cawthorn called Ukraine’s President Zelenksy a “thug.” Donald Trump thinks Putin is a “genius” and “savvy” for starting Europe’s first land war since WW2. That’s only the loudest and most visible sentiments, and unfortunately there are plenty more where they came from.
Look, we’re running our own campaign here in the 8th District, addressing the issues that matter most to Dr. Caraveo’s community — but the Republicans that Dr. Caraveo is running against here are just as extreme and divisive, and are more interested in waging culture wars than helping ordinary Americans.
The stakes are incredibly high, and we’re going to need all the help we can get to beat the extreme GOP candidate in November. [**Can you chip in whatever you’re able TODAY to show your support and send a solution-oriented Democrat who will fight for working families to Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42950773/335045607/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220314newpoll_ec4c_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmJiZDZlNi1hZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SjC3T8g8zbYga8_Qo1gCWogIa-7mrvSfV3dHntztQws=)

| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. clean_body: | = If you’ve been feeling pessimistic about this election year, I’ve got some good news for you, Peter. As of late last week, according to FiveThirtyEight, all six of the most recent Congressional generic ballot polls show Democrats ahead. Look at this: | = Democrats nationally are gaining ground, and we need your help to turn those gains into momentum for our campaign. = These poll results are huge! And I think it’s for two main reasons. First, President Biden’s State of the Union speech reminded voters that Democrats are the party of solutions. Getting Americans vaccinated, ending the pandemic’s stranglehold on our daily lives, investing in infrastructure, and creating 6.6 million jobs (the most ever in a single year): the hard work is paying off. Next up is lowering prescription drug prices and taking on corporate greed; we’re ready for those fights. Second, Americans are horrified and embarrassed by the Republican Party’s refusal to forcefully condemn Vladimir Putin’s invasion of Ukraine. Madison Cawthorn called Ukraine’s President Zelenksy a “thug.” Donald Trump thinks Putin is a “genius” and “savvy” for starting Europe’s first land war since WW2. That’s only the loudest and most visible sentiments, and unfortunately there are plenty more where they came from. Look, we’re running our own campaign here in the 8th District, addressing the issues that matter most to Dr. Caraveo’s community — but the Republicans that Dr. Caraveo is running against here are just as extreme and divisive, and are more interested in waging culture wars than helping ordinary Americans. The stakes are incredibly high, and we’re going to need all the help we can get to beat the extreme GOP candidate in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Elana Schrager Campaign Manager Caraveo for CO-08 | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. name: Adam Altendorf
subject: Our Plan to Take Back Tennessee 🗣
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

Hi Peter,

I’m Adam, the new Coordinated Campaign Director for TNDP, and I’ve been hired to help Democrats Take Back Tennessee. I was born and raised in Memphis and have since organized and turned out Democrats across the South, Midwest and Northeast, including leading Andy Kim's race (NJ-03) to victory, which was 1 of 7 incumbent House districts won by Democrats in districts Donald Trump carried.

I grew-up in the Shelby County public school system. That is why I am in this fight. Because our public school system is under attack by a governor who wants to take money away from our children who deserve a quality education. We can’t let that happen.

With our plan to Take Back Tennessee, we will take the fight directly to Bill Lee by:

- Registering 200,000 New Democrats
- Building a Sustainable and Long-Lasting Volunteer Infrastructure
- Increasing Democrat Turnout
- Supporting our Candidates and Campaigns

This is the most ambitious plan to reclaim our state that's ever been attempted. And we plan to win — not just in this cycle, but for the long haul. But we need your help. In order to hire the organizers and staff needed to scale with our goals, we need to raise money — a lot of it.

We need you with us. Can you chip in $25 now to our Victory Fund to help us Take Back Tennessee together? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

Tennessee isn't a red state, it's a purple state that's been heavily gerrymandered and voter suppressed into oblivion. Democratic voters are here. We just have to find them and mobilize them. And that's exactly what we intend to do this year.

We can do this — but only if we do it together. Can I count on you to chip in $25 now to support our plan for victory in 2022? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]
Yours in solidarity,

Adam Altendorf
he/him
Coordinated Campaign Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Tim Ryan
subject: re: 24-hour goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2775%2E3611125%2EQbI_Ec ][IMG]

Hello,

As I’ve been traveling across Ohio, I’ve seen firsthand how fired up
people are to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. The energy is
growing every day and I know folks are ready for a change here in our
state.

Just take a look at our phenomenal slate of candidates running statewide:

* Jeff Crossman for Attorney General
* Taylor Sappington for Auditor of State
* Chelsea Clark for Secretary of State
* Scott Schertzer for Treasurer

I know we can win these races, but Jeff, Taylor, Chelsea, and Scott are up
against a massive GOP fundraising machine. They need resources ASAP to
help counter the attacks and win their races.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8927?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2775%2E3611125%2EQbI_Ec ]That’s why we’re launching an emergency 24-hour $20,000 goal to help
these candidates kickstart their campaigns. Make a donation right now to
help us flip Ohio blue >>

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8927?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2775%2E3611125%2EQbI_Ec ]DONATE

Raised by a single mom, Jeff worked nights to pay his way through college
and law school. He knows that for most Ohioans, nothing is given and
everything is earned. That’s why I know Jeff will fight for all Ohioans as
our next Attorney General.

As Nelsonville Auditor, Taylor started an investigation on day one which
led to the largest theft and fraud bust in Nelsonville history. And he’s
breaking barriers as the first openly gay candidate for statewide office
in Ohio. He balanced the books and caught the crooks in his hometown,
which is exactly what he’ll do for all of Ohio as Auditor of State.

Chelsea grew up in rural Ohio as a 6th generation farmer, which instilled
in her the values of perseverance, grit, and advocacy. As a small business
owner, she learned about entrepreneurship in a way that you only can from
behind the wheel. Now, she’s ready to put that knowledge to work as Ohio’s
next Secretary of State.

Scott grew up in Marion, Ohio and served his community as a teacher for 13
years. He knows that when the people in power in Columbus spend their time
playing politics, it’s people in towns across Ohio who pay the price.
That’s why Scott is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for you.
You deserve a treasurer you can trust, and that’s exactly what you’ll get
with Scott.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8927?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2775%2E3611125%2EQbI_Ec ]I know we have what it takes to win these races, but only if Jeff,
Taylor, Chelsea, and Scott have the resources to compete against their GOP
opponents. Please, make a donation to help us raise $20,000 in the next 24
hours >>

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8927?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2775%2E3611125%2EQbI_Ec ]DONATE

Thanks for your help. We’re building a strong grassroots team to give
Ohioans leaders they can trust to do what’s right. Your donations have a
direct impact on our ability to do just that.

Let’s keep it rolling.

—Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2775%2E3611125%2EQbI_Ec ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=2775%2E3611125%2EQbI_Ec ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Session Update Jan 2022 Week 9
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
Navy SEAL Father Business Owner
---
| | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 9
---
| VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner)
---
|
---
| On March 12th, the General Assembly adjourned Sine Die, marking an end to the two months of session. However, we stand without an agreement on our budget, our parole board, and we have several other pieces of legislation still in conference. Governor Youngkin will convene a special session to address these items soon.
---
| We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for our conservative values in Richmond. Inflation, rising gas prices, taxes, public safety, education, School Choice, Ukraine, election integrity, infrastructure, rural broadband, healthcare, protecting the sanctity of life, protecting our 2nd amendment, and more are on the minds of fellow Virginians. Governor Youngkin and the rest of us in the General Assembly are working hard to address your concerns. Here is an update from our last week of session.
---
| Hanover Delegate Frank Hargrove
---
|
---
| As a friend of the Hargrove family and someone who has deep roots in Hanover, I was honored to be part of the Center Isle Presentation in Memory of the distinguished Hanover Delegate Frank Hargrove. Frank was part of the greatest generation and joined the Army Air Corps after finishing at Virginia Tech. I've had the privilege of working with his daughter, Dale, since 2017. My friend, and Delegate Hargrove's long-time aide, Delegate Buddy Fowler, spoke from the heart in honoring Frank. Frank DuVal Hargrove, Sr. served in the Virginia House of Delegates from 1982 to 2010, representing the 55th district in the northeast suburbs of Richmond, in and around Hanover County. Delegate Fowler said, "Frank Hargrove didn't just represent Hanover County; Frank Hargrove was Hanover County."
---
| Rising Gas Prices
---
|
---
| The cost of gas began climbing when Biden was elected and has more than doubled since Trump was in office. Trump policies made the United States energy independent. Biden policies are wrecking our country and making the world less safe. We should unleash American energy production and stop buying oil from countries who hate us. We should open the keystone pipeline, allow drilling on federal lands, and allow drilling in ANWR.
---
| Rural Broadband
---
|
---
| Many parts of our district are without broadband. Connection to the internet is important for business, law enforcement, and for families to stay connected, especially when the Democrat's COVID policies forced our children to learn from home. We cannot allow our children to fall behind, and I have been fighting for them to increase broadband access across the district. We have a commitment minimum goal of $750 million state dollars plus we assume the feds will try to at least match that amount so we can get broadband that last mile to your home. I will continue fighting to make good use of that money to give our communities access they need.
---
| Throw Back Trump Meme
---
|
---
| In 2019 during my re-election to the Virginia House of Delegates, a fellow Republican told me I better not put a Trump flag on my truck as it could hurt my chances of winning. Instead, I put two Trump Flags on my truck. I drove around like this for 6 months supporting his re-election, and I ended up with the 2nd largest win in Virginia. America Right News took this photo off my FB page and made this meme. Lately, President Trump has been engaging in more rallies and media time to call on President Biden to lower gas prices and to stand firm on Russia. I support President Trump's call of action and echo it in our district. We need to put America first!
---
| ERA Ended in Virginia
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H4TZpTmUusMaeEmLJWewNHai2jZtHdt8kjB7xEGehMYakIfRcVb43Ep3Uldo2VrD4yvBy_voQm5KCB3h-xI4gtbHLy8J-eraSVLmOSnlwP9rgA9sKNTfzU4CiI37wQKQKTn3tcD_HC6-ujoDETAm1Tm9B8zzeVIXi_BbJYCQnabUw1LSEgK94VC4rVKwLHLxAGlLjWk3asor1QX7IOB3JWQRPStRMlbakoMcLfX5Yl9W8Sy0rx1Es0Nht-T-o0MDhFlFtRq0KDrjJErqSi0okigUX1R1T3x4_L8wrtPIOBqH6nAT8zVGx1xOO73nreE-rexGu14DqLgkCGtpiDOGGc5__LLdcQng&c=opMI8M0hp7nJFtPhjZubTYtyKSTpBbgQKKa0GHkcN7JDB867oxp1cQ==&ch=yFdI6vZbJWw2dhHOQIhF8RwTyVbdnLjfcpS4xbBYDGMCNvEi38EpTQ==)
---
| Isn't it great we live in a country where a man or a woman can work hard and achieve just about anything! I voted NO 8 times on the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) as a Republican Member of the Virginia House of Delegates because the bill is broadly written and could be loosely interpreted to justify the use of taxpayer funded dollars to pay for abortions. It expired in 1979 and is not a necessary bill. We do not need loose, needless legislation which could be interpreted by lawyers how they deem fit. The good news is Virginia Republican Attorney General Jason Miyares moved to withdraw the state of Virginia from a lawsuit that seeks to force the federal government to recognize Virginia's 2020 vote to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) and add the text to the Constitution. This means Virginia is no longer part of the lawsuit, and we will not support unnecessary changes to our Constitution.

| Veteran Retirement Pay Tax Reduction
---
|
---
| My bipartisan bill, HB 1128 to Reduce Taxes on Veteran retirement pay, is still alive and will continue in conference during the upcoming special session. As a reminder, only three states fully tax veteran retirement-pay; we need to fix that. I completed and turned in a conference report with all signatures in the Senate and the House. Unfortunately, two Democrat senators decided to change their mind and remove their signatures. So, I've started a second conference report and I've been working with Democrat Senators Locke, Deeds, Lucas, and Howell to get it done. I will keep you posted as we progress!
Details: My bill, HB 1128 to reduce taxes on Veteran Retirement Pay, passed the House with 98 yes votes. This bill had an emergency clause, no age requirement, and would reduce taxable retirement pay for retired Veterans 20k year one, 30k year two, and 40k the third year on. Unfortunately, the Senate would not accept my bill that passed the House. The Senate version, carried by Senator Reeves, had no emergency clause, an age requirement of 60, and reduced taxes on retired Veteran pay 5k year one, 10k year two, and 15k the third year on. Delegate Barry Knight helped us work out a compromise. The compromise bill will have no emergency clause, has an age 55 requirement, will reduce taxable retirement pay for retired Veterans 10k year one, 20k year two, 30k year three, and 40k the fourth year on.

clean_body: Navy SEAL Father Business Owner | | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 9 | VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner) | | On March 12th, the General Assembly adjourned Sine Die, marking an end to the two months of session. However, we stand without an agreement on our budget, our parole board, and we have several other pieces of legislation still in conference. Governor Youngkin will convene a special session to address these items soon. | We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for our conservative values in Richmond. Inflation, rising gas prices, taxes, public safety, education, School Choice, Ukraine, election integrity, infrastructure, rural broadband, healthcare, protecting the sanctity of life, protecting our 2nd amendment, and more are on the minds of fellow Virginians. Governor Youngkin and the rest of us in the General Assembly are working hard to address your concerns. Here is an update from our last week of session. | Hanover Delegate Frank Hargrove | | As a friend of the Hargrove family and someone who has deep roots in Hanover, I was honored to be part of the Center Isle Presentation in Memory of the distinguished Hanover Delegate Frank Hargrove. Frank was part of the greatest generation and joined the Army Air Corps after finishing at Virginia Tech. I've had the privilege of working with his daughter, Dale, since 2017. My friend, and Delegate Hargrove's long-time aide, Delegate Buddy Fowler, spoke from the heart in honoring Frank. Frank DuVal Hargrove, Sr. served in the Virginia House of Delegates from 1982 to 2010, representing the 55th district in the northeast suburbs of Richmond, in and around Hanover County. Delegate Fowler said, "Frank Hargrove didn't just represent Hanover County; Frank Hargrove was Hanover County." | Rising Gas Prices | | The cost of gas began climbing when Biden was elected and has more than doubled since Trump was in office. Trump policies made the United States energy independent. Biden policies are wrecking our country and making the world less safe. We should unleash American energy production and stop buying oil from countries who hate us. We should open the keystone pipeline, allow drilling on federal lands, and allow drilling in ANWR. | Rural Broadband | | Many parts of our district are without broadband. Connection to the internet is important for business, law enforcement, and for families to stay connected, especially when the Democrat's COVID policies forced our children to learn from home. We cannot allow our children to fall behind, and I have been fighting for them to increase broadband access across the district. We have a commitment minimum goal of $750 million state dollars plus we assume the feds will try to at least match that amount so we can get broadband that last mile to your home. I will continue fighting to make good use of that money to give our communities access they need. | Throw Back Trump Meme | | In 2019 during my re-election to the Virginia House of Delegates, a fellow Republican told me I better not put a Trump flag on my truck as it could hurt my chances of winning. Instead, I put two Trump Flags on my truck. I drove around like this for 6 months supporting his re-election, and I ended up with the 2nd largest win in Virginia. America Right News took this photo off my FB page and made this meme. Lately, President Trump has been engaging in more rallies and media time to call on President Biden to lower gas prices and to stand firm on Russia. I support President Trump's call of action and echo it in our district. We need to put America first! | ERA Ended in Virginia | == | Isn't it great we live in a country where a man or a woman can work hard and achieve just about anything! I voted NO 8 times on the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) as a Republican Member of the Virginia House of Delegates because the bill is broadly written and could be loosely interpreted to justify the use of taxpayer funded dollars to pay for abortions. It expired in 1979 and is not a necessary bill. We do not need loose, needless legislation which could be interpreted by lawyers how they deem fit. The good news is Virginia Republican Attorney General Jason Miyares moved to withdraw the state of Virginia from a lawsuit that seeks to force the federal government to recognize Virginia's 2020 vote to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) and add the text to the Constitution. This means Virginia is no longer part of the lawsuit, and we will not support unnecessary changes to our Constitution. | Del John McGuire for Senate District 10 | | In case you missed it, I announced my candidacy for the Senate of Virginia's 10th District for 2023. I am committed to taking back our Senate and representing my community. I have fought to take back our House of Delegates and support our members there, giving hundreds of thousands to new members to help their re-election succeed. I will continue the fight for you in the Senate to knock down the Democrat's so called 'brick wall'. I could use your support. Here is a list of the new VA Senate District 10 Counties: Hanover Powhatan Louisa Fluvanna Goochland Buckingham Appomattox Amelia Prince Edward Cumberland Sign up to be a volunteer, get involved, and consider supporting us financially. Every small bit helps! I invite you to join Team McGuire at mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com | Russia-Ukraine War | == | Despite overwhelming odds, the people of Ukraine are putting up one heck of a fight. Please pray for the people of Ukraine. Would you fight this hard if our country was invaded? The Red Cross is helping. For a Red Cross Ukraine update click == | Final Session Speaker's Bible Study | | We attended the final Speaker's Bible Study this week. It was great to see Governor Glenn Youngkin and other fellow legislators there, starting the day in prayer. Carlos Brown delivered the message...Satan tries to tell us we are not worthy enough, not smart enough, and not strong enough to do what God wants us to do. At one point, prior to becoming King, David, anointed by God, hid in caves from King Saul. How do we fight negative thoughts? Pray for clarity in purpose during impossible times. Sing your way through it like David did....you can't give up now; just sing your way through! | Get Virginia Back to Work | | | It's time to get back to work and rebuild Virginia's small businesses. Congratulations Pine Bluff basketball for winning the state championship in Wyoming. This is the first team my company SEAL Team Physical Training, Inc. has worked with in 2 years due to the Pandemic. It is amazing what we can achieve when we work as a team! The coach wrote: "Thanks for helping us this year!! Ended up with a state title in basketball. E1H was a point this team empathized. " Before the pandemic, my company SEAL Team PT helped 18 Division 1 teams win championships. Under Governor Youngkin's leadership we will get Virginia back to work and help small business build a "rip roaring economy". Let's go Virginia! | Veteran Retirement Pay Tax Reduction | | My bipartisan bill, HB 1128 to Reduce Taxes on Veteran retirement pay, is still alive and will continue in conference during the upcoming special session. As a reminder, only three states fully tax veteran retirement-pay; we need to fix that. I completed and turned in a conference report with all signatures in the Senate and the House. Unfortunately, two Democrat senators decided to change their mind and remove their signatures. So, I've started a second conference report and I've been working with Democrat Senators Locke, Deeds, Lucas, and Howell to get it done. I will keep you posted as we progress! Details: My bill, HB 1128 to reduce taxes on Veteran Retirement Pay, passed the House with 98 yes votes. This bill had an emergency clause, no age requirement, and would reduce taxable retirement pay for retired Veterans 20k year one, 30k year two, and 40k the third year on. Unfortunately, the Senate would not accept my bill that passed the House. The Senate version, carried by Senator Reeves, had no emergency clause, an age requirement of 60, and reduced taxes on retired Veteran pay 5k year one, 10k year two, and 15k the third year on. Delegate Barry Knight helped us work out a compromise. The compromise bill will have no emergency clause, has an age 55 requirement, will reduce taxable retirement pay for retired Veterans 10k year one, 20k year two, 30k year three, and 40k the fourth year on. | Cut the Grocery Tax | | Governor Glenn Youngkin is keeping his promises to cut taxes! We are ready get to the Special Session and finish the job. My friend and fellow Delegate Joe McNamara are carrying the HB 90 bill which will cut grocery taxes for Virginians by approximately $500 million per year which equals about $300 savings per family per year! Furthermore, Republicans supported a complete elimination of the Gas Tax. The Democrats will not even support a decrease on taxes at our pump as their failed policies hike up the price. This is intentional, and do not be fooled by their calls to action. Republicans bring the results! | Parole Board | | Promise Kept: Governor Youngkin promised to fire the parole board due to corruption which he did. This week Democrats in the senate refused to accept 4 new parole board appointees essentially temporarily ending the ability to review parole in VA. Now, they are stalling our government to spite the Republicans. This will not happen with John McGuire in a Republican State Senate! | SB 36: Repeal "Predator Protection Act" | | Many of you remember the boy who attacked a girl in the bathroom in Loudon County, and the superintendent tried to cover it up. The Senate version to repeal HB 257, "Predator Protection Act", passed the House and is headed to the Governor. Police and parents should be informed on stalking, abduction, and sexual battery cases. Our children are number one and must be protected. Governor Youngkin now has a deadline: 11:59 p.m., April 11, 2022, to sign this bill into law. | Final Session Education Committee | | Monday, we had the final Education committee. Chairman Delegate Glenn Davis, his team, and other fellow Delegates have done an incredible job moving legislation forward to support Governor Glenn Youngkin's agenda to improve education for all students in Virginia. Unfortunately, the Democrat controlled Senate is known as the place where "good bills go to die". We will fix this with next year's State Senate election. | Fentanyl Overdose Bill Killed in Senate | == | There is a fatal overdose epidemic in our country and our Commonwealth. Democrats in the Senate killed my bill HB 108 Felony homicide; certain drug offenses, penalties. This bill would have gone after dealers and made it a felony if someone overdosed and died from fentanyl and other controlled substances. Let's win the VA State Senate next year and get this done! | Final Session Military Caucus | | I attended the final General Assembly Military & Veterans Caucus with U.S. Marine and Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, fellow veterans, and other fellow legislators. We discussed legislation and military fiscal impact military bases in Virginia have on our economy. | Teacher Hotline | | Governor Glenn Youngkin is working hard to get politics and dangerous divisive ideologies out of the classroom. Children should be taught how to think not what to think. Democrats are losing it over the teacher hotline. Interesting how they call on unreasonable accountability on our police but lose it at the thought of keeping our teachers accountable. Our children are number one and we must keep them safe. We ran on fighting for parents in 2021, not the public school bureaucracy. Their first demand in their letter is that we listen to them. We will not. We are beholden by parents! | Women's History Month | | This Women's History Month, we honor Winsome Earl Sears born March 11, 1964. Happy belated birthday to our president of the senate Lt. Gov Winsome Earl Sears. We celebrate our successful women in the General Assembly. They are reflections of the women we represent. I am proud of them and look forward to their many accomplishments and careers! | AG Jason Miyares | | Fellow legislators and I met with Attorney General Jason Miyares at the Barbara Johns Building. The AG and his team are working hard to support victims, fully fund our police, and keep dangerous criminals in jail and off our streets. | MLB Hall of Famer Ryan Zimmerman | | Fellow Delegate Karen Greenhalgh presented a proclamation on the House Floor for Major League Baseball World Series Champion, Ryan Zimmerman. Ryan, who had a long time commitment to the Washington Nationals, retired a few days ago. Mr. National, Congratulations on your amazing career! | House Page Resolution | | Our House Pages (age 13-14) presented a "Thank You" Resolution to Speaker Todd Gilbert thanking everyone in the General Assembly for an educational session. #virginia | Team Lunch Fellow Legislators | | This year session has been nonstop meeting with constituents and working on legislation. For the first time this session we had enough time for a lunch break with fellow legislators in between conference reports. | Thank You Bob Brown | | We started Saturday morning in the General Assembly by passing a House Joint Resolution HJR 449 commending Bob Brown, a senior photographer with the Richmond Times Dispatch. Bob has been covering the General Assembly and telling our story through photos since 1970. Bob and I immediately became friends when I was elected in 2017. He is that way with everyone. Speaker Todd Gilbert said "many of us are replaceable, Bob is not". Thank you Bob for your service to Virginia! | 2022 McGuire LEGISLATION McGuire Legislation as Chief Patron: == == taxes on military retirement pay. | McGuire Legislation as Chief Co-Patron: == == This bill includes HB59 and passed the floor 59-40. Now headed to the senate. == == This bill includes my bill HB 187 and is headed to the senate. == == | McGuire Legislation as Co-Patron: == for list == for recent Joe Thomas radio interview. | | | | THANK YOU! | I am committed to adhering to the principal duties of Government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you in the District. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1056. | | | | | God Bless, Delegate John McGuire Virginia House District 56 900 East Main Street Pocahontas Building, Suite E213 Richmond, VA 23219 Phone: 804-698-1056 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA | | | STAY CONNECTED | == == == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, 11357 Nuckols Road # 156, Glen Allen, VA 23059 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

Peter, please don’t delete this email — __I promise this will be short.__

**I ran in 2020 to take down Devin Nunes and end Trump’s corruption. Now, I’m running to clean up the mess they left in our communities.**

**Unlike those guys, I’m committed to fighting for working people.** I know our neighbors deserve clean water, access to health care, and lower costs.

**Unlike those guys, I don’t take a penny from corporate dark money donors.** That’s why every small dollar donation from folks like you, Peter, makes an impact.

It’s going to be an uphill battle to turn this open seat blue and protect our House majority. clean_body: Now, I’m running to clean up the mess they left us. | = Peter, please don’t delete this email — I promise this will be short. I ran in 2020 to take down Devin Nunes and end Trump’s corruption. Now, I’m running to clean up the mess they left in our communities. Unlike those guys, I’m committed to fighting for working people. I know our neighbors deserve clean water, access to health care, and lower costs. Unlike those guys, I don’t take a penny from corporate dark money donors. That’s why every small dollar donation from folks like you, Peter, makes an impact. It’s going to be an uphill battle to turn this open seat blue and protect our House majority. = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Your support makes all the difference, — Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to win this race. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them. subject: Campaign Update – March 14, 2022
body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=b153683199&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Team,

With only 71 days until the primary election on May 24th, here are some key updates from our campaign. We hope to see you on the trail soon!

* * *
**_President Trump Holding Rally For Perdue_**

President Trump will be in Commerce, Georgia on March 26th at 7:00 PM to rally support for David Perdue. The event is [FREE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=7b3b3b17b4&e=89fb4d5220) and open to the public, so invite your friends, family, and neighbors to attend and hear an important message from President Trump.

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=436cc32d96&e=89fb4d5220) to get your tickets!

**_Officially On The Ballot_**

On Wednesday, David officially qualified to have his name on the ballot in the Governor's race.

Watch a clip from Fox 5 Atlanta [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=f7610cd4eb&e=89fb4d5220). _"I'm concerned about our state. I want to make sure we don't turn it over to the liberal Democrats. I believe I'm the only one who can pull our party together and beat Stacey Abrams in the fall."_
– David Perdue
_**Kemp Sold Us Out**_
David sat down with Neil McCabe from The Georgia Star and discussed how Governor Kemp sold us out.

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=df77733b6e&e=89fb4d5220) to watch. [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=511dc0c91e&e=89fb4d5220) David is focused on uniting conservatives and stopping Stacey Abrams and her radical agenda.

**_New Video: Donald Trump Jr. In Georgia_**

Last week, Donald Trump Jr. held rallies in Cumming and Tifton and urged Georgians to get out and vote for David Perdue.

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=8ef32e5dd7&e=89fb4d5220) to watch a highlight video. [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=8e06b92041&e=89fb4d5220) _"I need you guys to get out there and vote for David Perdue. Do not sit out the primaries!"_
– Donald Trump Jr.
_**Mark Your Calendars**_

Join David in West Central Georgia tomorrow to learn more about his vision for Georgia.
* Tuesday, March 15th @ 12:00 PM – Troup County GOP Meeting, 1001 Country Club Drive, LaGrange, GA 30240
* Tuesday, March 15th @ 5:30 PM – Muscogee County Meet & Greet, 5351 Sidney Simons Boulevard, Columbus, GA 31904

_**Volunteer Opportunities**_

Visit [www.VotePerdue.com](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=3d60e16ff1&e=89fb4d5220) to sign up to make phone calls or knock on doors on behalf of our campaign. Our strong grassroots network will make the difference in this race!

---
| [JOIN TEAM PERDUE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=80645f976d&e=89fb4d5220 "JOIN TEAM PERDUE")

Peter,

In a recent interview, Ron Johnson said that if Republicans regain control of Congress, **they will again push to take away health insurance from tens of millions of Americans.**

Nothing has changed since he first ran for office. Ron Johnson is again vowing to repeal the Affordable Care Act (ACA), just like he did in 2010. But his official campaign platform won’t explicitly say it this time around because he knows that the tens of millions of Americans rely on the ACA for their own health coverage.

While repealing the ACA might seem like a campaign promise that fizzled out, Ron Johnson is ready to revive it, full steam ahead.

clean_body: Nothing has changed since he first ran for office. | | = Peter, In a recent interview, Ron Johnson said that if Republicans regain control of Congress, they will again push to take away health insurance from tens of millions of Americans. Nothing has changed since he first ran for office. Ron Johnson is again vowing to repeal the Affordable Care Act (ACA), just like he did in 2010. But his official campaign platform won’t explicitly say it this time around because he knows that the tens of millions of Americans rely on the ACA for their own health coverage. While repealing the ACA might seem like a campaign promise that fizzled out, Ron Johnson is ready to revive it, full steam ahead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Unlike Senator Johnson, Alex Lasry believes that healthcare is a human right, and we need to ensure that everyone has access to quality, affordable healthcare. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: America in Crisis: The Southern Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
I visited the southern border, and I saw scared children, overcrowded facilities, overwhelmed border patrol agents, and evidence of Mexican cartels... | | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

I’m reaching out today to discuss a major crisis area for America, and invite you to [**_join me_**](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=88e898cfec&e=a9d1410029) in the fight to take our country back. Today, I want to talk about our Southern Border.

Make no mistake about it – the Biden administration and Washington D.C. Democrats have created a humanitarian crisis _and_ a national security threat at our southern border. Thousands of illegal immigrants are crossing the border every day because our southern border is wide open for people who would like to do our country harm.

**_I visited the southern border in Texas, _**and I saw scared children, overcrowded facilities, overwhelmed border patrol agents, and evidence of Mexican cartels trafficking people and drugs into the United States. This situation is completely out of control and action must be taken now. President Biden halted construction of the border wall, which the majority of border patrol agents believe would help them do their jobs better, and House Democrats are making this humanitarian crisis worse every day by their refusal to act.

This administration and the Democratic Party as a whole are ignoring the obvious: our southern border is a complete disaster. I want to take steps to fix this problem, which is why I’m working to help Republicans take back the House in the upcoming election, and I need your help.

_Please kick in $100.00 today and invest in the fight to secure our southern border_

([Donate here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=814cf334df&e=a9d1410029))

With you in the fight,

Tracey Mann

P.S. I will continue to stand for Kansas as we move forward, and I will do everything in my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. Please _[(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=c4907de973&e=a9d1410029)_ to donate today and help take our country back

name: Tara Crenshaw
subject: A special day for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PAXhXZKo7AKqV2Fe4tNrk4F3vUHTdhC80LqRp3a5dBZ7dt-Qjc4CSCCg7FP6Ci8Gaf1Slfscery7t0mCwVR6Fpo8_EbHkxD2aUQTJXxaI7EfZ-rq3DolS3MIwI0GlGkEDbtZJpyxPbU_xrwvb3rIrJ37jrE1EAa6BeDKjq_5srvz8TlmTeb6-sKdV8N2FXUd-1Pj44Gi8OdfAkX_YSdIziu3gQ9SuGEzBXjrKYVKfZa1HF_8V6wIjeLtpU0aTZAxnTPK2hNaMeihfj3J8pUBPvOjY9IBXxv9IbQmcA39Wh8LuMT4dpN65uxofieftgM-PmOTzgxp7ILkyqndwq3pxpDBaCm5z-YJEXWKbskXsGTb3qfVFJXogw==&c=DtUmWyfnJoPcAO9eHTnAM9l5yJLZrvGis50i7V2-fre7Eo6oejGOQA==&ch=q5_Pu-s5dbjMDpuhzXprsffXd5dMO4P8DlHUQQIulI6kFfxwubxAEA==)
---
| |
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot -
I don't do this often. My husband Dan Crenshaw - the former Navy SEAL and Texas Congressman - is usually the one sending these emails.
But today is a special day for me - it's Dan's 38th birthday and I want to surprise him.
I've been with Dan since the beginning of his journey of service to our country - through five deployments as a Navy SEAL, through his life-altering injury in Afghanistan, and now as he fights for the issues that matter most to you in Congress.
Even when Dan was deployed overseas, he would find a way to make my birthdays special. It might be a surprise party with old friends, a trip with my sister, or tickets to the set of Dancing With The Stars (one of my favorite shows). Whatever the surprise might be, he always puts in the thought to make each birthday wonderful and memorable in its own way.
Dan brings that same dedication to his work in Congress. He's a policy nerd who loves research and talking to every expert he can find. He doesn't reach a conclusion on legislation until he understands it inside and out, always guided by the principles and moral foundation that America is built upon.
And Dan cares deeply about bringing more young people into the Republican Party. Events like his annual youth summit attract thousands of high school and college students from across the country to learn from thought leaders like Jordan Peterson, Ben Shapiro, and Nikki Haley.
Because Dan is a leader who comes to his own conclusions on the issues, without fear of challenging the status quo. No matter what, truth remains his North Star. He's always going to do what's right for our country.
So, for Dan's 38th birthday I want to show him how much support he has from all of us. I committed to raising $38,000 for Dan's congressional campaign, and [your contribution of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, $2,900, or some other amount will give Dan the resources he needs to grow our conservative movement.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PAXhXZKo7AKqV2Fe4tNrk4F3vUHTdhC80LqRp3a5dBZ7dt-Qjc4CSCCg7FP6Ci8Gaf1Slfscery7t0mCwVR6Fpo8_EbHkxD2aUQTJXxaI7EfZ-rq3DolS3MIwI0GlGkEDbtZJpyxPbU_xrwvb3rIrJ37jrE1EAa6BeDKjq_5srvz8TlmTeb6-sKdV8N2FXUd-1Pj44Gi8OdfAkX_YSdIziu3gQ9SuGEzBXjrKYVKfZa1HF_8V6wIjeLtpU0aTZAxnTPK2hNaMeihfj3J8pUBPvOjY9IBXxv9IbQmcA39Wh8LuMT4dpN65uxofieftgM-PmOTzgxp7ILkyqndwq3pxpDBaCm5z-YJEXWKbskXsGQXXHeTerMbqVVHcmfoW3Hv&c=DtUmWyfnJoPcAO9eHTnAM9l5yJLZrvGis50i7V2-fre7Eo6oejGOQA==&ch=q5_Pu-s5dbjMDpuhzXprsffXd5dMO4P8DlHUQQIulI6kFfxwubxAEA==)
---
| | | [DONATE. STAND WITH DAN CRENSHAW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PAXhXZKo7AKqV2Fe4tNrk4F3vUHTdhC80LqRp3a5dBZ7dt-Qjc4CSCCg7FP6Ci8Gaf1Slfscery7t0mCwVR6Fpo8_EbHkxD2aUQTJXxaI7EfZ-rq3DolS3MIwI0GlGkEDbtZJpyxPbU_xrwvb3rIrJ37jrE1EAa6BeDKjq_5srvz8TlmTeb6-sKdV8N2FXUd-1Pj44Gi8OdfAkX_YSdIziu3gQ9SuGEzBXjrKYVKfZa1HF_8V6wIjeLtpU0aTZAxnTPK2hNaMeihfj3J8pUBPvOjY9IBXxv9IbQmcA39Wh8LuMT4dpN65uxofieftgM-PmOTzgxp7ILkyqndwq3pxpDBaCm5z-YJEXWKbskXsGRBwGlHllGyJpiKq6s--9qQ&c=DtUmWyfnJoPcAO9eHTnAM9l5yJLZrvGis50i7V2-fre7Eo6oejGOQA==&ch=q5_Pu-s5dbjMDpuhzXprsffXd5dMO4P8DlHUQQIulI6kFfxwubxAEA==)
---
| I hope you will consider joining our team today and supporting Dan's mission. We will be proud and grateful to have you with us.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Tara Crenshaw
---
| |
---
|

If you prefer to donate by check, please make your check payable to: Dan Crenshaw For Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007.

He's always going to do what's right for our country. So, for Dan's 38th birthday I want to show him how much support he has from all of us. I committed to raising $38,000 for Dan's congressional campaign, and == | | | == | I hope you will consider joining our team today and supporting Dan's mission. We will be proud and grateful to have you with us. Sincerely, | | Tara Crenshaw | | | If you prefer to donate by check, please make your check payable to: Dan Crenshaw For Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | | | | | Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:info@crenshawforcongress.com

The GOP is targeting children.

| |

Hi Peter – 11 states have recently passed transgender youth sports bans – all led by Republican representatives. These laws ban transgender girls from playing in leagues that align with their gender identity.**And all of these laws have been passed in Republican, heavily rural states** like Arkansas, Idaho, Iowa, Mississippi, Montana, Texas, and West Virginia. name: Laurel Imer
subject: Join me tomorrow night!
body:
I will be at the Log Cabin Republicans meeting Tuesday night.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xHk-Xt3smwKJompLg5RiWWOR4OS4O5r4qm0kIieuQHa0W8ePAurlbUOA5UKopQrlFkPifUV4quqa4sK73mVrkehv5GtXuLuZPb0gD5pcwu4utUGlfgXR521yFZiVHMCChAO8gKKOxWXsDn6SLPjjLzDAVg2rQVne&c=Z1S13TdeNEvwBSzMe-qyeyMSCcsejOEeldSjCmLbeFvGI_qVKAvSTA==&ch=9U5flZGiye4qk9sAevKKx0v0OqLAOVOsB4c808jlpOv2tZXEadAEHw==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| Friend, As many of you have noticed, I will not be attending the CD7 Candidate debate tomorrow in Evergreen. That is because I was already scheduled to appear at the Colorado Log Cabin Republicans monthly Board Meeting.
That being said, I wanted to personally email you and let you know about this event and encourage you to join us!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xHk-Xt3smwKJompLg5RiWWOR4OS4O5r4qm0kIieuQHa0W8ePAurlbUOA5UKopQrltw7SyPxyv9V2xXPiRfnaCKxwTNb624PQliq2j1n6U6E3DOUSOYuhPrgSxMmBqvRIMEaLyS_9k43_oNjspT62VLlDd4sR4eJU-EWnnZtDzvI=&c=Z1S13TdeNEvwBSzMe-qyeyMSCcsejOEeldSjCmLbeFvGI_qVKAvSTA==&ch=9U5flZGiye4qk9sAevKKx0v0OqLAOVOsB4c808jlpOv2tZXEadAEHw==)
---
| If you are already planning on attending the debate in Evergreen I ask that you vote for me in the straw poll they are taking after the debate. This will ensure that our campaign is represented even though I am not able to attend.
I hope I can continue to count on your support in this race and at the upcoming assemblies across the district.
On another note, I would like to highlight a local grassroots organization that is sending care packages to our troops that have been affected harshly by the vaccine mandates imposed on them.
Fortitude Boxes has been doing so much for our troops and I felt that they deserved recognition for all their hard work. You can learn more about them and support their effort by visiting https://fortitudeboxes.com/.
P.S. Tonight 3/14/22 at 7:00 PM I will be attending the one-night-only screening of Whose Children Are They at the Colorado Mills Screening location and I would love for you to join me. Please note that this does not at all indicate an endorsement of any candidate or candidates committee.
Sincerely,
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xHk-Xt3smwKJompLg5RiWWOR4OS4O5r4qm0kIieuQHa0W8ePAurlbUOA5UKopQrlFkPifUV4quqa4sK73mVrkehv5GtXuLuZPb0gD5pcwu4utUGlfgXR521yFZiVHMCChAO8gKKOxWXsDn6SLPjjLzDAVg2rQVne&c=Z1S13TdeNEvwBSzMe-qyeyMSCcsejOEeldSjCmLbeFvGI_qVKAvSTA==&ch=9U5flZGiye4qk9sAevKKx0v0OqLAOVOsB4c808jlpOv2tZXEadAEHw==)

clean_body: I will be at the Log Cabin Republicans meeting Tuesday night. | | | | | | | == | | | | Friend, As many of you have noticed, I will not be attending the CD7 Candidate debate tomorrow in Evergreen. That is because I was already scheduled to appear at the Colorado Log Cabin Republicans monthly Board Meeting. That being said, I wanted to personally email you and let you know about this event and encourage you to join us! | == | If you are already planning on attending the debate in Evergreen I ask that you vote for me in the straw poll they are taking after the debate. This will ensure that our campaign is represented even though I am not able to attend. I hope I can continue to count on your support in this race and at the upcoming assemblies across the district. On another note, I would like to highlight a local grassroots organization that is sending care packages to our troops that have been affected harshly by the vaccine mandates imposed on them. Fortitude Boxes has been doing so much for our troops and I felt that they deserved recognition for all their hard work. You can learn more about them and support their effort by visiting . P.S. Tonight 3/14/22 at 7:00 PM I will be attending the one-night-only screening of Whose Children Are They at the Colorado Mills Screening location and I would love for you to join me. Please note that this does not at all indicate an endorsement of any candidate or candidates committee. Sincerely, | == Laurel Imer Republican Candidate, CO-07 == | | | | | == | == == == | == | | | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization from Laurel Imer for Congress and approval by Laurel Imer | | Laurel Imer for Congress | PO Box 17747, Golden, CO 80402 | | Sent by mailto:contact@laurelimerforcongress.com powered by

name: Keystone Pipeline Petition (via House GOP)
subject: We saw this coming. Did you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must restore American energy independence.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuj9l2j3maviu4rdtshclc0mdt2m4860ono4cun0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s74mqprbddm68q76o3hekon1pphe8rr2tjnmaoreoljmmoecpr1miq33chlmsrjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3ephkssqj9ptnc9j35c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

| |
---
| | | President Trump predicted this disastrous energy crisis back in 2020. He warned us all that Joe Biden would destroy the oil industry and continue to gut American energy and leave our country at the mercy of foreign oil.

Now gas prices continue to keep going up under President Biden's watch! $4.. $5... even $6 now!

**We 've had enough, haven't you? **

It's time that Joe Biden brings back the Keystone Pipeline _and_ restores American energy independence.

Help us send a clear message to Biden and add your name to our petition to demand Biden bring back the Keystone Pipeline.

---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn5dq5gvglcv41t7frngnpof1f1uo8c7u65i8ge8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: House GOP Alert
Date: Wed., March 09, 2022 at 1:29 PM
Subject: Tell Joe Biden: Bring Back the Keystone Pipeline
To: _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq5dklkqle0cd5c1lom63pi36n66isf5gf9dtpv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**_

Joe Biden has announced a ban on Russian oil and gas in response to Putin's war on Ukraine.

_**Now, instead of turning to American energy to fill the gap, Biden wants to buy oil from Iran, Venezuela, or Saudi Arabia. **_

Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT! Now, Biden has launched an all-out war on American energy and American jobs.

On Day One of his Administration, Joe Biden **GUTTED** American energy independence by shutting down American energy production. Then he worsened our dependence on oil from hostile countries by **CANCELING** the Keystone XL Pipeline.
---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg1vvrp5ekkd72dcf4mvj68etfnob84gaikt6r7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
To make things worse, Biden greenlit Russian pipelines, allowing foreign energy to thrive while Americans faced higher prices at the pump.

**Joe Biden would rather buy oil and gas from foreign countries who hate us than create American jobs and restore our energy independence --_let that sink in._ **

Americans are sick and tired of Biden putting America LAST. Biden MUST bring back the Keystone XL Pipeline and restore American energy independence.

Biden won't listen unless the American people raise their voices and speak out against his war on American energy. Tell Joe Biden: _**[BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE and RESTORE AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrp31t2fvdi0233lurbbhb6gcg338cfrbern0kbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE and RESTORE AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE!")**_
---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3jvad4n39mrrf7rf9sb37t072ndcjqu3k89g4rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
We have a clear choice: 1) We can either let Joe Biden continue to gut American energy and leave our country at the mercy of foreign oil, or 2) We can send a clear message to Joe Biden: _**[Bring back the Keystone Pipeline and restore American energy independence.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb1fqqe6s8doijpob9lpv8q0ptqrpm7lsgp7omco_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "Bring back the Keystone Pipeline and restore American energy independence.")**_

Thank you for standing with us in this critical moment.

-House Republicans
---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z878aruj57b6ggurqmtbthqmeloj7ivi3a7l30io_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
| |
* * *

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhtserk3jm2sqrjkdi1prsuq0dk87guukmo2tq8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zemu16j15ucukjib3laiu7kb1g6lirrf4q500618_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ln036q2aea8t83alf06n467lp0k13u7kdsjpc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ge9o72cjh2bs "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

subject: Give us a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Turn on Fox News every night and you’ll see Tucker Carlson parroting Russian disinformation to the American people.
#
Derek —
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make your first contribution to VoteVets before our mid-month fundraising drive ends tomorrow at midnight. Please let us explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
Turn on Fox News every night and you’ll see Tucker Carlson parroting Russian disinformation to the American people.
Go online and you’ll see it specifically targeted to America’s veterans.
Because Russia — and Republicans — know that those who signed up to defend our democracy are the most effective messengers when it comes to defending democracy abroad.
That’s where we come in.
VoteVets is running the largest, comprehensive campaign fighting disinformation targeting our veterans. But we cannot do this alone. So please:
[**Can you make a contribution - $3 or whatever you can afford - to VoteVets today? We’ll put it right to work fighting back against Russian and Republican disinformation targeting American veterans.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-disinfo?refcode=em220314-1-15&t=1&refcode2=4563_3013755_IsbPod&akid=4563%2E3013755%2EIsbPod)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: I Know What it Means to Not Feel Safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=703b82ff58&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
_“‘The old school method of, they would call Deja Alvarez, Deja calls me, I would reach out to our attorneys or our charging unit to see what’s going on with these cases,’ said Kelly Burkhardt of the District Attorney’s Office.” ([PGN, Feb. 16, 2022](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=a0917df26f&e=3f8e2ea1e3))_

For years, I have been the “go-to” person for marginalized communities, helping to both navigate and make changes within the Philadelphia Police Department and the District Attorney’s office.

As someone who knows what it’s like to not feel safe in your home, at your school, at your workplace, and in your neighborhood, **I am acutely aware of the importance of public safety. **

Over the past few decades, we have seen a significant uptick in crime and a deterioration of our communities.

My work as a victim advocate and police liaison informs my ability to address the safety concerns of the citizens of the 182nd district and underlines my track record of solution-oriented work.

**Safe streets cannot simply be a slogan. **The 182nd is home to some of the most walkable neighborhoods and tourist attractions in Philadelphia.

When elected, I will work to bring back clean, safe streets and bustling business corridors.

[Can you chip in today for historic representation in Harrisburg?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=0be948f9a1&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | |
**Help Get My Name on the Ballot**
We need to collect hundreds of petition signatures in the 182nd District in order to get my name on the ballot – and we need your help!

**[Sign Up Here](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=109c49ec3d&e=3f8e2ea1e3)** for a quick tutorial on signature collection - even a couple of hours of your time would go such a long way in helping us in our movement for historic representation!
---
| **Ban Hypocrisy Not Democracy** We’ve got some new swagger in our swag.

**Ban Hypocrisy Not Democracy.**

Check out our [Swag Shop](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=5600645193&e=3f8e2ea1e3) for stickers, buttons, T-shirts, and masks to show your support of our historic campaign!
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=b40e62b8a8&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
### [Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=25d1af7b22&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=fede794258&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_
---

| | [](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=943ecc1b77&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | [](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=245282d59a&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

clean_body: I am hours away from my mid-month fundraising deadline | | I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio. My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my mid-month fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short. While national Republicans are funneling upward of $10 million into this race to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly: = | | = Thank you, thank you, thank you. Val Demings \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Rep. My race in Florida is most likely to determine Senate control, so I cannot fall behind on resources. Please, take a look at your supporter record: | | SUPPORTER RECORD EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com DONOR STATUS: PENDING SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5 DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m. | = The timing – and the sheer consequences – of falling short right now couldn't be more serious. I don't say that lightly. Polling has me down 2 points behind Marco Rubio, just as he and the GOP hauled in more than $28 million to dismantle our Senate majority. If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell. With a grassroots team this strong, I know that if we dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. Point-blank, friend: That means hitting my fundraising goal. It's truly the only path we have to fighting back against GOP megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Val Demings | | | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. BREAKING FROM NPR: | | | | | [ You are [1] of [8] Democrats chosen from Cresco to participate in this urgent poll. Republicans want to BAN books across the country, so we need to know whether Democratic voters support public libraries and their librarians. Your completed response is DUE by 11:59 PM!]() Listen – Republicans are launching a new culture war. They’re trying to BAN books that discuss race, LGBTQ+ issues, and women’s issues. It’s part of their goal to rewrite history! Luckily, librarians in many states are fighting back and refusing to ban books! | | | Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Nancy Navarro
subject: Black & Brown
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]\

Friend,
I was recently asked if I thought Maryland was ready for a Black & Brown top of the ticket. My answer - I believe Maryland is ready for the Baker-Navarro ticket because it's the most diverse AND the most qualified.
There are Black and Brown communities across our state, and throughout the entire country, that are consistently and systematically being left behind. From access to education, jobs, and housing, to a criminal justice system and voting laws designed to keep us down – these are Americans whose voices go unheard and it’s time we listen.
This ticket, with Black & Brown candidates, is going to change Maryland’s future. If we don’t cease the moment now, when will we?
Right now our biggest hurdle is fundraising. Our mid-month deadline is tomorrow, and we’re still $4,895 behind our goal. Can you help? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
Nancy
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker & Navarro for Maryland
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States

body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
We have a little more than 2 months until the election, which means the campaign is REALLY heating up.
NOW IS THE TIME when we need all hands on deck as we enter this final stretch. Our chorus is large and diverse, we all have unique talents and strengths — when we put them all together, there’s nothing we can’t do!
What would you like to bring to the table?

name: Peter Franchot
subject: My plan for education
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Education remains one of our best tools for leveling the socioeconomic playing field, but much work remains to ensure that all Marylanders, regardless of ZIP code, have access to the high quality education that they deserve.
Far too many of our schools continue to suffer from crumbling infrastructure, lack of climate control, undrinkable water, and mold. The joy of teaching has been stripped from our teachers due to an excessive focus on standardized testing and unhelpful bureaucracy. And our students continue to shoulder the burden of higher and higher levels of student loan debt.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/Vb0w2dq9d0-LNzObgVUCwQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Vb0w2dq9d0-LNzObgVUCwQ2]
If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, tackling the many challenges faced by our education system will be a top priority for my administration. I’ll ensure that no school building suffers from mold, undrinkable water, or lack of climate control. I’ll reduce standardized testing and make sure our curriculum equips students with real-world skills like financial literacy. And I’ll pilot innovative debt free paths to a vocation or a college degree.
As part of my plan to tackle the student debt crisis, I’ll pilot a student loan debt forgiveness program for all students who live, work, and pay taxes in Maryland for at least five years after graduation. This program won’t just expand access to higher education for Marylanders, but will help attract new residents who seek to utilize the program.
If you think the next Governor needs to take urgent action to address the issues facing our students, then I urge you to stand with me. Add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to my plan for education. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Vb0w2dq9d0-LNzObgVUCwQ2]
Together, we can improve educational outcomes for all Marylanders, and ensure that every student has access to the high quality education that they deserve.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: My grandparents' story:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42956642/335058161/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzc3ZTY0MC1iOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yk_1sHz0ygjc-mt1vY2EXL1jWi4PgAfOnzHN94xpnVk=&emci=43edbea6-a1a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9777e640-b8a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Both of my grandfathers were sons of immigrants, grew up poor, and fought in World War II. Neither graduated from college but they were able to find good, middle-class jobs.

Grandpa Bob was a union steelworker in Worcester. Grandpa Louis was a bookkeeper at a fruit canning company in New York. With those jobs, they started families, sent their kids to college, and, with the help of the GI bill, bought homes.
|
---|---
Their kids, my parents, met in college and started a business together in Rhode Island. In turn, they built a life for me and my siblings that my grandparents never could have imagined.

**This was the American Dream that was so common a generation ago – the promise that with hard work and perseverance, each generation can leave a better life for their kids than they had for themselves.**

But today, people are working harder and harder just to keep up with the rising cost of living and they are worried about the kinds of lives their children will have.

I’m running for Congress because my wife Julia and I want our child to grow up in a country where the American Dream is possible for every child regardless of their zip code.
I've spent the last seven years as Treasurer, working to build a stronger and more equitable economy for all Rhode Islanders. In Congress, I’ll fight for policies that help restore the American Dream. I’ll work to help families keep up with the rising cost of living by taking concrete actions like lowering the price of prescription drugs, ensuring every child has access to free pre-k, making higher education and job training more affordable, and investing in the clean energy jobs that will reduce utility costs while helping to combat climate change.

**But to build a winning campaign, I need a grassroots team by my side.**

[**We're quickly approaching the first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of our campaign. If you're ready to rebuild the American dream in our state -- and our country -- will you chip in $10 or more to support my campaign for Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42956655/335058178/1898913647?refcode=em22_220314_MM1_fnd_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220314_MM1_fnd_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzc3ZTY0MC1iOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yk_1sHz0ygjc-mt1vY2EXL1jWi4PgAfOnzHN94xpnVk=)

clean_body: Peter, Both of my grandfathers were sons of immigrants, grew up poor, and fought in World War II. Neither graduated from college but they were able to find good, middle-class jobs. Grandpa Bob was a union steelworker in Worcester. Grandpa Louis was a bookkeeper at a fruit canning company in New York. With those jobs, they started families, sent their kids to college, and, with the help of the GI bill, bought homes. | ---|--- Their kids, my parents, met in college and started a business together in Rhode Island. In turn, they built a life for me and my siblings that my grandparents never could have imagined. This was the American Dream that was so common a generation ago – the promise that with hard work and perseverance, each generation can leave a better life for their kids than they had for themselves. But today, people are working harder and harder just to keep up with the rising cost of living and they are worried about the kinds of lives their children will have. I’m running for Congress because my wife Julia and I want our child to grow up in a country where the American Dream is possible for every child regardless of their zip code. I've spent the last seven years as Treasurer, working to build a stronger and more equitable economy for all Rhode Islanders. In Congress, I’ll fight for policies that help restore the American Dream. I’ll work to help families keep up with the rising cost of living by taking concrete actions like lowering the price of prescription drugs, ensuring every child has access to free pre-k, making higher education and job training more affordable, and investing in the clean energy jobs that will reduce utility costs while helping to combat climate change. But to build a winning campaign, I need a grassroots team by my side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 40993 Providence, RI 02940 United States
