_**“I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.”**
- Matthew Hennessey_
Fellow Conservative,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; **my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission.**

clean_body: How is it possible that 52% of Democrats say that they would just surrender to enemy forces if an invasion of the United States occurred? We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | “I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.” - Matthew Hennessey Fellow Conservative, Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. The polling firm found that when asked “What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?” Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded? 52% Yep - 52% of Democrats - including grown men - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. How pathetic. Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled. I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic. Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. Bush and Jimmy Carter - who willingly went to war in defense of not only their country, but for Democracy itself? What has happened to American Democrats in the 75 years since the end of WWII that has led to a majority of them to say that if a foreign force invaded the United States they would cut and run? I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week. And in case you were wondering – 70% of Republicans polled said that they would stay and fight. Thanks for your consideration, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Peter, As you read this email, America is being ravaged by runaway inflation, near-record-high gas prices, and tyrannical vaccine mandates. _As if that wasn’t enough, Joe Biden is also embarrassing our nation on the world stage._ His botched withdrawal from Afghanistan last year was the worst foreign policy humiliation in living memory. He willfully ignored the warnings of countless military experts and forged ahead with a disastrous exit strategy that endangered thousands of Americans. **The Afghanistan debacle put Biden’s weakness on full display for all the world to see. It emboldened our enemies in Beijing, Moscow, and Tehran. And it was likely a major factor in Russian tyrant Vladimir Putin’s decision to launch an unprovoked attack on Ukraine.** Now, with 40-year-high inflation and skyrocketing fuel costs, Americans are paying the price for Biden’s weakness–and we MUST put the brakes on his failed foreign policy agenda before it’s too late. **[Please chip in $5, $10, $25, $50 (or more, if you can) to help Mark keep this seat red, take back the U.S. Senate, and build a firewall to PROTECT North Carolina from Biden’s destructive policies.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/40c30f06e504fea5/2c916a226807ba68c3d6b838967d376c/35903)**

clean_body: We still have the time to protect our Constitution | My re-election campaign is ramping up to be a fight. Despite the challenge, I am not deterred in the slightest. While some running for public office will deceive voters and perpetuate lies, I will keep my head held high and tell people the truth. I know that if we are going to move forward in strength - both in Wyoming and nationally - we have to be rooted in substance and ideas. That is what my campaign will be about. | I will never waver in my determination to fight for an America that adheres to our fundamental principles and honors the Constitution. Your support has not gone unnoticed and I’m deeply appreciative of all your help. Thank you, Liz Cheney | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming Our mailing address is: PO Box 3167 Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

subject: How the “Big Lie” could become a “Big Coup”

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Friends, DASS has a massive $35,000 deadline at midnight tomorrow. We’re only $7,505 away with less than 48 hours to go. Can you rush just $20 to help us save democracy from far-right extremists? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031422_B3_AC_30D]
RUSH $20 TO SAVE DEMOCRACY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031422_B3_AC_30D]
Here’s the Big Problem with the Big Lie: it will never end. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031422_B3_AC_30D]
First [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031422_B3_AC_30D] , Trump tried to rig 2020 before a single person voted, slashing USPS budget to interrupt mail-in voting.
Then [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031422_B3_AC_30D] , he incited a coup and lied about losing the election all the way up to Biden’s inauguration. Oh, and afterwards too! He still hasn’t conceded. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031422_B3_AC_30D]
And now , with the midterms fast approaching, Trump’s lies are bigger than ever! A majority of the GOP still believes the 2020 election was “stolen”. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031422_B3_AC_30D]
They will never give up. They will never accept reality. But if their hand-picked extremists win Secretary of State races this November, they could use the lie to ‘justify’ overturning the 2024 election!
We cannot let extremists corrupt our democracy by taking over elections! Rush $20 RIGHT NOW towards tomorrow’s $35,000 mid-month goal to keep fighting back and keep democracy alive! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_031422_B3_AC_30D]

Peter,
Joe Biden has a problem taking responsibility for his disastrous administration. Remember when he tweeted this?
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=3e167148f2904abd96bfcb7c46c6a7e3&_e=pkn_OIypSGsssc0_tKYh8D3d_wmMfdVHmVHypz62dqOw_j5abu_wTja4R1xhWTP5AJX-_aSghLKhQL93K7nHfXIyhUzwmedJhwUpM3mDeiqZbVv4uP6ndaZ38rl9zpEpRzsz8BIvAeu-onNcJpL3wGUOk7X8UXFtv5RIt4AH26ljV0GqknHK_J3jGfmpZD3t0T4F5p5by6qHRTA1x021iCn2-johIjfe6ggGxdQLOWtYd6Rrpsg72hydnkZ4r7VUnDEFHdntdAUf0uxwJbE5KkeLj4hg8qELyYRWFDuO1fg08P8lRTBjN316YxMMfv-a8I_c2OGwumlI2HIp1e5skN9GeMM7nCNn7bxxRUSLd-bB8YFfVN5hxSjgaqpJOM8qZ4wc8dobr3tlt79ux3JXWjDeMmujh9frjhoXtcIaMNQ%3D)
That seems like a looooong time ago. Now, Biden plays the blame game — he blames rising gas prices on the pandemic, then blames inflation, and now is blaming Putin.

Why can't Joe Biden just admit he was WRONG to allow Putin's pipeline while killing America's pipeline? He is incapable of owning up to his blunders, and it's time he is held accountable!!

Stand with me as I fight for our energy sector — [**add your name to the petition**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=3e167148f2904abd96bfcb7c46c6a7e3&_e=pkn_OIypSGsssc0_tKYh8D3d_wmMfdVHmVHypz62dqOw_j5abu_wTja4R1xhWTP5AJX-_aSghLKhQL93K7nHfXIyhUzwmedJhwUpM3mDeiqZbVv4uP6ndaZ38rl9zpEpRzsz8BIvAeu-onNcJpL3wGUOk7X8UXFtv5RIt4AH26ljV0GqknHK_J3jGfmpZD3t0T4F5p5by6qHRTA1x021iJgWpxNRqLV3QBPkGWjs3KBi2yZO8lryrjR9jjk-tiiBnT47mLm1ux2rry5XZ9zCufhQosf7rQcHqe3y8V33d16woCFMwZ1kewe-B42P3oB1pPmfUfCLIO4nYQ5isEN-lsPlj68yJxifiFo3nNXDDFZOWMEF2QWDoLeNN3RojqlURuRgJSfoTFQL2P5sAcbU_8yX0OAQtfow9DZC5YxdfjI%3D) and tell Joe Biden, "Don't import oil from dictators. Drill it here at home!"
[**SIGN THE PETITION ➟ ✍️**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=3e167148f2904abd96bfcb7c46c6a7e3&_e=pkn_OIypSGsssc0_tKYh8D3d_wmMfdVHmVHypz62dqOw_j5abu_wTja4R1xhWTP5AJX-_aSghLKhQL93K7nHfXIyhUzwmedJhwUpM3mDeiqZbVv4uP6ndaZ38rl9zpEpRzsz8BIvAeu-onNcJpL3wGUOk7X8UXFtv5RIt4AH26ljV0GqknHK_J3jGfmpZD3t0T4F5p5by6qHRTA1x021iKdUH9aqH4DjW_dsxsR3f8wgCS7ryHsv_SohMsIYiIad3JNZ6JBuw_36l3EstU7t3H7S7MvrX9nhvuDD3KBU7tJnhEiMhx51l1VSXlEcoHFN6llettIkzXMgg1ZmlE6kM_ZOXI0HLC5S3-z25mWc5EhCHKrG_VzaTclguD_XABMnlxM1UuaHk-L9SCmfwxYz6PIwDCK9vPfJjIT969_E2Fc%3D)

clean_body: | | Peter, Joe Biden has a problem taking responsibility for his disastrous administration. Remember when he tweeted this? That seems like a looooong time ago. Now, Biden plays the blame game — he blames rising gas prices on the pandemic, then blames inflation, and now is blaming Putin. Why can't Joe Biden just admit he was WRONG to allow Putin's pipeline while killing America's pipeline? He is incapable of owning up to his blunders, and it's time he is held accountable!! Stand with me as I fight for our energy sector — and tell Joe Biden, "Don't import oil from dictators. Drill it here at home!" In Liberty, TEAM HAWLEY | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Murray HQ
subject: Republicans are targeting Washington state
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
It’s absolutely essential that we maintain our momentum and not let the GOP gain on us.
#
Peter,
Around the country, Republicans are feeling emboldened. And they only need _**ONE SEAT**_ to retake the Senate this fall.
In fact, last week Fox News started pushing out an article claiming Republicans could have a chance in Washington state. When just one flipped Senate seat means putting Mitch McConnell back in power, it’s absolutely essential that we maintain our momentum and not let the GOP gain on us.
**[Peter, this is the moment to fight back and show the GOP we won’t back down, especially here in Washington state. Will you chip in $5 now to help us stay on track to meet our March mid-month fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42965393/335099716/2004369102?refcode=pm_em_220314_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGEwNmFhMy1kY2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6BJrPQq7jhzvfP9RB3RAq1xyVIjh0lezOw2_BMZoVk=)**
From the right to abortion and strengthening federal voting rights protections to combating the climate crisis – the outcome of the midterm elections will determine our future on issues like these and so many more. With Republicans expanding their scope and targeting this Senate race in Washington state, we’ve got to come out strong in every single race.
Like every midterm election, 2022 is going to be tough. Every day and every dollar matters when it comes to defending and expanding our Senate majority – it’s why we set a $30,000 mid-month fundraising goal. If we can hit our goal, we can stay on track to keep Washington state and the Senate blue.
**[Make a $5 contribution now to help keep Democrats on track to win in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42965394/335099717/2004369102?refcode=pm_em_220314_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGEwNmFhMy1kY2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6BJrPQq7jhzvfP9RB3RAq1xyVIjh0lezOw2_BMZoVk=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty

Peter,

Our team was going through some emails and came across one from our Democrat opponent that made us do a double take.

In the first paragraph of the email our opponent writes, “shady megadonors poured nearly $10 million into his {Hershel Walker’s} campaign.”

**WRONG.**

Our campaign is fueled by small-dollar donors from across Georgia and the other forty-nine states. In the last two months, **we’ve received online contributions from more than 40,000 people; the average online contribution is $44.**

**So much for megadonors.**

_**But then again, in the Biden-Warnock economy, anybody who can afford a tank of gas these days is a megadonor!**_

Peter, when the left misleads you, it’s often because they’re trying to distract you from something else. **In this case, my opponent’s campaign is the one taking tens of thousands of dollars from Hollywood megadonors, which was documented in a recent report by _The Hill._**

We can't hold the House majority without winning in Washington's 8th District, and that's why Republicans are going all-in to defeat Kim.

**The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just announced they're launching a new set of digital attack ads attacking their top ten Democratic targets – including Kim.** They'll say – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat Kim and retake the House majority.

From now through Election Day, attacks will continue to flood our district. Kim doesn't accept a dime of corporate PAC money, so she's counting on the help of this grassroots team to fight back right away.

This year, Team Holly has been in the district – talking to voters, going to events, meeting with County Dem parties. We know that the drive for change is working and the excitement we’re feeling is going to turn into a victory. But we know that to win, we need to continue ramping up our voter outreach efforts, planning more district tours, and making sure our communities' voices are felt on Election Day. From training volunteers, paying staff, and printing campaign materials — **there’s a lot of expenses ahead for our campaign.** On top of that, we need _significant_ resources and funding to compete with the MAGA and special interest money that has protected Marjorie Taylor Greene. **Marjorie raised nearly $8 million** for her re-election campaign. Trump’s friends, white nationalist supporters, and dark money donors across the country are ramping up to make sure she is untouchable. **Team Holly doesn’t need $8 million** from dark money donors in order to bring change to Northwest Georgia. This isn’t a race to see who can make the most money. Our campaign is focused on using our grassroots donations to register voters, outreach everyone - especially our forgotten communities, and give back to GA-14. We don’t need to compete with Marge’s raising, but we do need to hit our goals so that we can continue doing the good work. **We can unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene, but it’s going to take a village**. **[That’s why we’re asking for your support. Can you rush a donation of $20.22 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42965871/335101636/-804235033?refcode=em0314&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDA3NDhjNi1kZWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hkCzFOpu41odPCeUx59f-A0CyQudDYTECBlPrwAn9t0=)** Thanks so much,Team Holly.

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, our campaign is $15,000 short of where we need to be for our mid-month fundraising deadline. And during a critical end-of-quarter month like March — when political media and our GOP opponents will be waiting to see how our fundraising looks during the first months of 2022 — this is especially important. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = This year, Team Holly has been in the district – talking to voters, going to events, meeting with County Dem parties. We know that the drive for change is working and the excitement we’re feeling is going to turn into a victory. But we know that to win, we need to continue ramping up our voter outreach efforts, planning more district tours, and making sure our communities' voices are felt on Election Day. From training volunteers, paying staff, and printing campaign materials — there’s a lot of expenses ahead for our campaign. On top of that, we need significant_ resources and funding to compete with the MAGA and special interest money that has protected Marjorie Taylor Greene. Marjorie raised nearly $8 million for her re-election campaign. Trump’s friends, white nationalist supporters, and dark money donors across the country are ramping up to make sure she is untouchable. Team Holly doesn’t need $8 million from dark money donors in order to bring change to Northwest Georgia. This isn’t a race to see who can make the most money. Our campaign is focused on using our grassroots donations to register voters, outreach everyone - especially our forgotten communities, and give back to GA-14. We don’t need to compete with Marge’s raising, but we do need to hit our goals so that we can continue doing the good work. We can unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene, but it’s going to take a village. = Thanks so much,Team Holly. | | | = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42965788/335101294/-420428835?refcode=20220314_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzdkNi1kZGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moJurd8KC2byDmj9QxOR1Ag9ZwflPlYdC2cYGeKVvRI=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42965789/335101295/-392698372?refcode=20220314_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzdkNi1kZGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moJurd8KC2byDmj9QxOR1Ag9ZwflPlYdC2cYGeKVvRI=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42965790/335101296/-420428835?refcode=20220314_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzdkNi1kZGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moJurd8KC2byDmj9QxOR1Ag9ZwflPlYdC2cYGeKVvRI=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42965791/335101297/-392698372?refcode=20220314_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzdkNi1kZGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moJurd8KC2byDmj9QxOR1Ag9ZwflPlYdC2cYGeKVvRI=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42965792/335101298/-420428835?refcode=20220314_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWZlYzdkNi1kZGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moJurd8KC2byDmj9QxOR1Ag9ZwflPlYdC2cYGeKVvRI=)

name: Rick Scott
subject: We have laws. Let’s enforce them.
body:
Peter,
Democrats seem to have forgotten that we have laws for a reason.

While they’re trying to “defund the police” and “re-imagine policing,” crime is rising throughout our country.

_**Violent crime is NOT OK.**_

It’s time for America to have a zero tolerance policy for attacking police officers, looting businesses, and burning down our cities.

_Riots aren’t protests. They’re attacks on our country and our citizens._

**I put together an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA, and enforcing our laws and respecting our police officers is a CRITICAL point of our plan.**

subject: Watch our first TV ad before it goes live →

body:
Today, we are officially releasing our first TV ad of the campaign and wanted you to be one of the first to see it. **Big news:** Today, we are *officially* releasing our first TV ad of the cycle!

It’s simple. Wisconsinites don’t need Ron Johnson’s conspiracy theories and disregard for the problems they’re facing. We need commonsense solutions that will actually help people. That’s what Sarah is all about, and it’s why she’s running for U.S. Senate.

**Now, we’re launching this statewide TV ad buy to introduce Sarah to as many Wisconsin voters as possible and put our campaign in an even stronger position to defeat Ron Johnson.**

We’ve said it from the start: When voters meet Sarah, she wins them over every time. So we’re making our first impression just as people are starting to tune into the race.

This ad campaign will help us share why Sarah is the person Wisconsinites can trust to fight for them and their families in the U.S. Senate — because, at the end of the day, voters want someone who will get things done.

Voters also want someone who can beat Ron Johnson, which is why Sarah’s track record of winning tough statewide elections is so important. _The Washington Post_ has called her our “best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson,” and Sarah’s the only Democrat beating him in the most recent head-to-head poll.

We're in a moment of crisis, Peter Willis. But I’m here to tell you that the solutions are staring us right in the face.
We have a crisis in healthcare, where Big Pharma and the healthcare industry view people’s lives as dollar signs on a spreadsheet. **The solution is universal healthcare** , because no one should die or go into debt simply because they can't afford care.
We have a climate crisis. The fossil fuel industry and polluters are destroying our planet with zero accountability and aided by taxpayer subsidies. **The solution is policies that realize a Green New Deal** , which would put us on the path to protecting our children’s future and restructure our economy into one that’s responsible and sustainable (not to mention the creation of _millions_ of jobs).
We have a growing inequality crisis, where the rich just keep getting richer, while the rest of us live paycheck to paycheck, facing stagnant wages and fewer opportunities. **The solution is to make the uber-rich pay their fair share** , because working class families cannot thrive under the financial burdens they face.
These policies _are. not. radical_. You want to know what’s radical? Doing nothing. [Chip in $15 today to help us reach more voters with our common-sense message.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpAQxiuS5eoDII_oFNId3AMKnryfmCRGo56XfKvoUixOgyTSApW1KQ0mHmneV3oKpoloT4HaU5IZh0ghFxSenpEUMTDua2h-w2Be4NPeSNjS3-ElxbKeCn_wh21LVFtWHwg87K-ov7M_ewWPrir9jdwPsI6vRNEZTrICYJyF7IS20-3O0i5AjKHsHICWh3aq3mamZZM9Rc95sfCX_V7ggiR1UjlLleJsw7PXhhBfNqC9KS8opR6O8GiFGAKrWdRumEzYSGmKYVKRm1hfboz3Dvnt-xmEYdIJOKsfBXL_BIbQHyxILPQqe_jwmp5FVjSWwaL5lYbHd9zNv9-mPlSZiZWj0rIOqwqXLnVJJ1AvCNsBpvg/3kc/tENUYAifRJiXTaJT5kxOCg/h1/HXhkgB2zFEGtgR8SV3shHQAoFnIMKSwUl6H7Sp1zTUY)

Last week, I spoke to a voter who considers herself a Republican-leaning Independent. She told me that she’s had trouble voting for Democrats lately.
But we were able to have a substantive conversation about the issues that matter to her. After discussing healthcare, public safety, and corruption, she was horrified to learn that her values and policy positions are actually those of a very left-leaning progressive Democrat!
**Progressive policies are common-sense policies**. That’s a fact.
That’s the message we’re getting out to NY-03 voters in every spare moment between now and the June 28 primary. clean_body: | | | | We're in a moment of crisis, Peter Willis. But I’m here to tell you that the solutions are staring us right in the face. We have a crisis in healthcare, where Big Pharma and the healthcare industry view people’s lives as dollar signs on a spreadsheet. The solution is universal healthcare , because no one should die or go into debt simply because they can't afford care. We have a climate crisis. The fossil fuel industry and polluters are destroying our planet with zero accountability and aided by taxpayer subsidies. The solution is policies that realize a Green New Deal , which would put us on the path to protecting our children’s future and restructure our economy into one that’s responsible and sustainable (not to mention the creation of millions of jobs). We have a growing inequality crisis, where the rich just keep getting richer, while the rest of us live paycheck to paycheck, facing stagnant wages and fewer opportunities. The solution is to make the uber-rich pay their fair share , because working class families cannot thrive under the financial burdens they face. These policies are. not. radical. You want to know what’s radical? Doing nothing. Last week, I spoke to a voter who considers herself a Republican-leaning Independent. She told me that she’s had trouble voting for Democrats lately. But we were able to have a substantive conversation about the issues that matter to her. After discussing healthcare, public safety, and corruption, she was horrified to learn that her values and policy positions are actually those of a very left-leaning progressive Democrat! Progressive policies are common-sense policies. That’s a fact. That’s the message we’re getting out to NY-03 voters in every spare moment between now and the June 28 primary. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks, Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. ** | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. And we just found out he outraised Brad last quarter. He’s raised over $2,000,000 to win this election. Look, Brad is relying on grassroots supporters like you to power his campaign, and I’m reaching out to make sure we start to close the gap between his campaign and Brad’s. His mid-month deadline is TOMORROW and he still needs to raise $1,500 more to hit his goal. = | = = = = = = The truth of the matter is that Derrick Van Orden is dangerous. He believes in lies -- including that the 2020 election was stolen -- and was on the grounds of the Capitol on January 6. But he’s a major threat -- he came within a few votes of winning last time he ran for Congress against me. So that’s why I need your help. I know with supporters like you, Brad can defeat him and represent western Wisconsin with the dignity and respect it deserves. But we need to make sure he can compete with Derrick Van Orden’s resources. = Thanks for your help, Ron Kind Congressman, WI-03 | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

subject: P.A. gubernatorial race is “Tilt Democratic”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Now that the GOP sees they have a target on their backs this year, we have to fight even harder to expand the electorate.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42959380/335069961/1975269225?refcode=EM_FR_220314Battleground1_B_BF_90DO_7_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkYjg3N2ZkLWMwYTMtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FjRykuucGgdvUu_9zMlxymoRELKHQMFfyDI08SwdBV4=)

We’ve hit the halfway point in March, and our numbers aren’t where they need to be – BUT did you see that Inside Election issued a nonpartisan analysis rating the Pennsylvania gubernatorial race as **“Tilt Democratic?"**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42959381/335069962/1975269225?refcode=EM_FR_220314Battleground1_B_BF_90DO_7_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkYjg3N2ZkLWMwYTMtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FjRykuucGgdvUu_9zMlxymoRELKHQMFfyDI08SwdBV4=)
Now that the GOP sees they have a target on their backs this year, we have to fight even harder to expand the electorate. We have to hit our fundraising goal every month in order to direct our field team to the streets in our targeted regions across the Commonwealth to register voters in 2022 and beyond. May is just around the corner, and we need to ramp up our field program.

**[Can you help us fight for democracy by giving $15 right now? That will knock three doors – and potentially register three brand new voters. We need to raise $1,000 – that’ll knock 5,000 doors – by tomorrow night to stay on track.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42959382/335069963/1975269225?refcode=EM_FR_220314Battleground1_B_BF_90DO_7_G_N_L2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkYjg3N2ZkLWMwYTMtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FjRykuucGgdvUu_9zMlxymoRELKHQMFfyDI08SwdBV4=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [$15 = help us knock 3 doors](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42959383/335069964/1975269225?refcode=EM_FR_220314Battleground1_B_BF_90DO_7_G_N_EB15&express_lane=true&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkYjg3N2ZkLWMwYTMtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FjRykuucGgdvUu_9zMlxymoRELKHQMFfyDI08SwdBV4=) [$20 = help us knock 4 doors](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42959384/335069965/1975269225?refcode=EM_FR_220314Battleground1_B_BF_90DO_7_G_N_EB20&express_lane=true&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkYjg3N2ZkLWMwYTMtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FjRykuucGgdvUu_9zMlxymoRELKHQMFfyDI08SwdBV4=) [$25 = help us knock 5 doors](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42959385/335069966/1975269225?refcode=EM_FR_220314Battleground1_B_BF_90DO_7_G_N_EB25&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkYjg3N2ZkLWMwYTMtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FjRykuucGgdvUu_9zMlxymoRELKHQMFfyDI08SwdBV4=) [$30 = help us knock 6 doors](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42959386/335069967/1975269225?refcode=EM_FR_220314Battleground1_B_BF_90DO_7_G_N_EB30&express_lane=true&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkYjg3N2ZkLWMwYTMtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FjRykuucGgdvUu_9zMlxymoRELKHQMFfyDI08SwdBV4=) The stakes couldn't be higher when you think about who’s running for governor. Here are just two of the fourteen GOP candidates:
* Doug Mastriano, current state senator in Pennsylvania’s 33rd Senate District, who was involved in the January 6th insurrection and attack on our U.S. capitol and asked for a so-called ‘forensic audit’ of the 2020 election results, pushing the lie that the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump in PA.
* Shawn Berger calls critical race theory a “prejudiced fairy tale” and wants to ban it from being taught in our public schools, and instead wants to ensure our children learn how to handle firearms.

_Imagine what our state will look like if either of them wins. “Tilt Democratic” means we can’t stop fighting._

**[Fight with us to ensure we expand the electorate and elect leaders we can count on – like Attorney General Josh Shapiro, a defender of democracy and protector of voting rights. clean_body: Now that the GOP sees they have a target on their backs this year, we have to fight even harder to expand the electorate. | = We’ve hit the halfway point in March, and our numbers aren’t where they need to be – BUT did you see that Inside Election issued a nonpartisan analysis rating the Pennsylvania gubernatorial race as “Tilt Democratic?" = Now that the GOP sees they have a target on their backs this year, we have to fight even harder to expand the electorate. We have to hit our fundraising goal every month in order to direct our field team to the streets in our targeted regions across the Commonwealth to register voters in 2022 and beyond. May is just around the corner, and we need to ramp up our field program. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = The stakes couldn't be higher when you think about who’s running for governor. Here are just two of the fourteen GOP candidates: Doug Mastriano, current state senator in Pennsylvania’s 33rd Senate District, who was involved in the January 6th insurrection and attack on our U.S. capitol and asked for a so-called ‘forensic audit’ of the 2020 election results, pushing the lie that the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump in PA. Shawn Berger calls critical race theory a “prejudiced fairy tale” and wants to ban it from being taught in our public schools, and instead wants to ensure our children learn how to handle firearms. Imagine what our state will look like if either of them wins. “Tilt Democratic” means we can’t stop fighting. = = Fight for voting rights with us, The Battleground Fund via Team NPP The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents, and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 17, 2022 GENERAL: November 8, 2022 || || || New Pennsylvania Project 717 Market Street #295 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. subject: Will we see you tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
An important event! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mattbirk.com/will-we-see-you-tomorrow?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter.

I hope to see you tomorrow night! We have a "Give Anything" fundraiser at the Hamel VFW. If you can't make, that's not a problem. Scott Jensen and I will be traveling the state from now until November. We'll have plenty of opportunities left!
**Here's what you need to know about tomorrow:**
RSVP to [Barbara@DrScottJensen.com](mailto:Barbara@DrScottJensen.com)
March 15th, at 6 PM!
Hamel VFW Post 5903
19020 Hamel Rd
Hamel, MN 55446
You can also click the flyer below to RSVP. Our campaign is at a pivotal moment; we need to show a strong war chest against Tim Walz and Peggy Flanagan. Please [consider attending](mailto:Barbara@DrScottJensen.com?subject=RSVP%20to%20March%2015th) if you can!
---
| [ ](mailto:Barbara@DrScottJensen.com?subject=RSVP)
---
|
I’m not a politician, nor is Adrianna. After a long and satisfying career in the NFL, we both assumed that business ventures and the kids would be what we settled into. Fairly quickly, we’re both realizing that if we don’t get engaged then we cannot complain about the outcome. We could live somewhere else, but most Minnesotans don’t have that option. Besides, I’m not one to leave when the going gets tough. I want to be part of the solution and contribute to the state that has given me so much.

**We refuse to do nothing. In fact, we will do everything we can to listen to the voices of all Minnesotans and translate their messages into real actions.** We will help shape this administration and work to fix Minnesota. Will you join us and [attend this event](mailto:Barbara@DrScottJensen.com?subject=RSVP)? If you're unable to make it, you can always [donate to this campaign onlin](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=27b1943083&e=33b11688c1)[e](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=7981a7bbcf&e=33b11688c1). WE NEED YOU!

In Freedom,

Matt Birk
Republican Lt. Governor Candidate - Minnesota
---
|
---

name: Team Mondaire
subject: This isn’t the best news...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hey team,
Since his first day in office, Mondaire has championed legislation to bring families high-quality, affordable child care, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and create millions of good-paying, union jobs.
Because of Mondaire’s work, our communities are becoming stronger, safer, and more equitable — and we need to keep him in office if we want to continue making progress.
Since a new opponent has jumped in the race, our work to protect Mondaire's seat just got harder.
With so much on the line, we can’t afford to slow down. Right now, we’re falling behind on our March mid-month fundraising goal.
**[This isn’t the best news, but we’re hoping that you and the rest of our grassroots team can help us kick it into high gear by chipping in a contribution before tomorrow night’s deadline. Peter Willis,
This past week has been infuriating. Due to Joe Biden’s weak “leadership” and his shadow puppet, Josh Shapiro, it now costs an arm and a leg at the gas pump.

With record-high gas prices, we as Americans, need to question the integrity and intention of Joe Biden and Josh Shapiro.

The Biden administration’s advice to Americans struggling with rising energy prices – which took hold before Russia invaded Ukraine – has been to switch to electric cars. This is like telling homeless people to just buy a house. If people can’t afford to fill their gas tanks, how will they buy electric vehicles, which sell new for an average of over $50,000?

The truth is that Biden attacked our energy industries from the first day he took office because it was always part of his agenda, as dictated to him by the extreme environmental left, but now he doesn’t want to deal with the predictable consequences. We see steadily rising fuel prices, which, again, began before Russia attacked Ukraine, and the resulting impact on inflation. This hurts everyday Pennsylvanians as they struggle to meet their family budgets.

Pennsylvania’s purposeful kneecapping of our own energy industries is an act of self-harm, which also feeds the national problem. Pennsylvania could be a leader in energy production, which would help America drop its reliance on foreign sources of oil once again. But Shapiro and his Harrisburg allies won’t allow it because they are beholden to the Radical environmental lobby and they don’t care if they step on us in the process.

[_If we want to lower gas prices, bring back jobs, and restore Pennsylvania’s energy dominance, I need your support. clean_body: | | | | When I am governor, we will unleash PA’s energy resources. | Peter Willis, This past week has been infuriating. Due to Joe Biden’s weak “leadership” and his shadow puppet, Josh Shapiro, it now costs an arm and a leg at the gas pump. With record-high gas prices, we as Americans, need to question the integrity and intention of Joe Biden and Josh Shapiro. The Biden administration’s advice to Americans struggling with rising energy prices – which took hold before Russia invaded Ukraine – has been to switch to electric cars. This is like telling homeless people to just buy a house. If people can’t afford to fill their gas tanks, how will they buy electric vehicles, which sell new for an average of over $50,000? The truth is that Biden attacked our energy industries from the first day he took office because it was always part of his agenda, as dictated to him by the extreme environmental left, but now he doesn’t want to deal with the predictable consequences. We see steadily rising fuel prices, which, again, began before Russia attacked Ukraine, and the resulting impact on inflation. This hurts everyday Pennsylvanians as they struggle to meet their family budgets. Pennsylvania’s purposeful kneecapping of our own energy industries is an act of self-harm, which also feeds the national problem. Pennsylvania could be a leader in energy production, which would help America drop its reliance on foreign sources of oil once again. But Shapiro and his Harrisburg allies won’t allow it because they are beholden to the Radical environmental lobby and they don’t care if they step on us in the process. When I’m governor, we will unleash Pennsylvania’s energy resources and help our country achieve energy dominance once again. If Shapiro is let near the governor’s office, he will just be a miniature version of Joe Biden. Thank you, | | Lou Barletta Republican Front-Runner Governor of Pennsylvania | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =

Peter, This is ridiculous. Kyrsten Sinema really had the audacity to attack Joe Biden on immigration a few days ago — even though 1) she supports the filibuster which stands in the way of immigration reform and 2) she won’t even meet with the immigration activists and advocates who got her elected. **[Enough is enough. Voting rights. Climate action. Affordable health care. When Kyrsten Sinema cast one of the tie-breaking votes to keep the filibuster, what she really did was vote against each and every one of these urgently-needed policies. But when we’ve demanded answers for why she aligned with Mitch McConnell and the GOP to block Biden’s agenda, has she responded? Of course not — she’s avoided her constituents at all costs, and spent her time behind closed doors with her wealthy donors. clean_body: This is ridiculous. | | | Peter, This is ridiculous. Kyrsten Sinema really had the audacity to attack Joe Biden on immigration a few days ago — even though 1) she supports the filibuster which stands in the way of immigration reform and 2) she won’t even meet with the immigration activists and advocates who got her elected. Immigration reform. Voting rights. Climate action. Affordable health care. When Kyrsten Sinema cast one of the tie-breaking votes to keep the filibuster, what she really did was vote against each and every one of these urgently-needed policies. But when we’ve demanded answers for why she aligned with Mitch McConnell and the GOP to block Biden’s agenda, has she responded? Of course not — she’s avoided her constituents at all costs, and spent her time behind closed doors with her wealthy donors. (Last weekend, it was margaritas and tacos at a Phoenix hotel with a $2,500-per-person minimum!) With Kyrsten Sinema, the hypocrisy just never stops. But we can make it stop by continuing to build the grassroots momentum behind her future primary challenger. Thanks for pitching in today. ---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z77ani100c6ifa025s84usvt6si2tv9brbndm7ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ieaoj6cjh2bs)
---
|
---

| Friend, When I was considering running for office, I certainly didn't anticipate myself and 18 other honorable police officers would be indicted by a Leftist DA with an agenda. **Now I'm facing a politically charged indictment and fighting a runoff campaign.** Even after all of us were cleared by an internal investigation for our involvement in riot control two years ago, and our Chief himself said we did nothing wrong, we've been indicted. In his continued war on police, George Soros funded District Attorney Jose Garza has come after us for doing exactly what our department leaders asked us to do and what citizens asked—to risk our lives to protect our fellow citizens from Antifa and rioters bent on arson and destruction. DA Garza promised in his campaign to go after law enforcement officials even when they are risking their lives protecting Austin from being burnt to the ground. He is keeping that deadly promise. DA Garza is using his office to try to influence my election. The riot was two years ago, and he times his indictments of officers right before the election. Now we're in a runoff and our fight continues. I need your support to send a message to politically charged DA's and support the rule of law.
---

| | | [**Donate Today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zob6b6tc32t4kr5tkf2oie1ao97cck2vgblmbdho_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ieaoj6cjh2bs)
---

| Garza is prosecuting police, and my opponent called for the elimination of the police associations which help fund our defense against Garza and other Soros DA witch-hunts. **One frivolously indicts police and the other tries to strip away our ability to defend ourselves in court.** Garza’s goal is to silence the people who object to his stopping prosecution of crime. He demonizes police, he puts no value on keeping people safe, and he harms our communities. He demands that police abandon their oaths and allow criminals to roam freely on the streets. The question is not how this prosecution will turn out. We will be acquitted. The question is: **When police are treated like this, who will want to become police officers?** It's imperative that we unite against overreaching government agents pushing radical agendas and undermining the safety of society. [**Today, I ask you to join our fight by donating to our runoff campaign.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdoc8t89099e58spu11jr47rncejqskjh1vvq9v0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ieaoj6cjh2bs)
---

| | | [**Fight For Rule of Law**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zctaumq0526la55rmbtqv0oi7rpucpt1bp041dm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ieaoj6cjh2bs)
---

| This runoff extends our campaign through May and leaves us needing more resources to spread our message and show the strength of support the American people have for law enforcement. Unfortunately, the war against rule of law isn't just in our own backyards. It's in Chicago, New York, and worse, it's spreading. If we wait to stand for law enforcement it will be too late. Standing together NOW is essential to combatting the radical anti-law enforcement ideas of the far left. It's imperative we win in May. [**Can I count on your support?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1755n494nfplfl50sig4eiepcn3affgkpk9a6ug_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ieaoj6cjh2bs) Thank you, Justin Berry
---

What have I been missing out on?Elissa Slotkin for Congress | | | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967412/335108258/-1008132194?refcode=email20220314&amount=28&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDY0My1lNGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIHTfJZkCtwb7A4WyuV29b_JWHGHlTAisE0uyUFWBOs=)
| | | Team, Recently,**I officially launched my reelection campaign in Michigan’s new 7th district with my “Snow Boots on the Ground” campaign kickoff.** The new district is almost 3,000 square miles, made up of Ingham, Eaton, Clinton, Shiawassee, and Livingston counties, plus Milford and South Lyon in Oakland County and 200 folks in Argentine Township in Genessee County. My priority was to get out into the areas that I don’t currently represent, introduce myself to the voters that have not seen my name on their ballots before, and learn about these new communities and the issues that impact them everyday. During my travels, I was able to stop by some of the great small businesses in MI-07 (shout out to Flour Child Bakery in Grand Ledge for their impressive bagel selection). Everywhere I stopped, folks filled me in on other local businesses throughout the new parts of the district that I need to check out. **So, if you live in the new 7th district or you have a favorite local spot in Eaton, Clinton, Shiawassee, or Southwest Oakland – I want to hear from _you._ **What are the restaurants, mom-and-pop stores, bakeries, coffee shops, and any other local hotspots or hidden gems I’ve been missing out on?**[Let me know here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967413/335108259/-665126834?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDY0My1lNGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIHTfJZkCtwb7A4WyuV29b_JWHGHlTAisE0uyUFWBOs=&emci=7209d9c4-e39f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6534d643-e4a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1113958)** **And, if you want to help me as I continue to get out in the new district, consider chipping in below.** Anything you can give helps me continue to host supporter events, recruit volunteers ([which you can sign up to be here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967414/335108260/-824324278?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDY0My1lNGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIHTfJZkCtwb7A4WyuV29b_JWHGHlTAisE0uyUFWBOs=&emci=7209d9c4-e39f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6534d643-e4a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1113958)), and work to earn the votes of folks in the new 7th district! | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967415/335108261/-856332854?refcode=email20220314&amount=28&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDY0My1lNGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIHTfJZkCtwb7A4WyuV29b_JWHGHlTAisE0uyUFWBOs=)
---
I** ** look forward to your recommendations! Elissa

clean_body: What have I been missing out on?Elissa Slotkin for Congress | | | | = | | | Team, Recently,I officially launched my reelection campaign in Michigan’s new 7th district with my “Snow Boots on the Ground” campaign kickoff. The new district is almost 3,000 square miles, made up of Ingham, Eaton, Clinton, Shiawassee, and Livingston counties, plus Milford and South Lyon in Oakland County and 200 folks in Argentine Township in Genessee County. My priority was to get out into the areas that I don’t currently represent, introduce myself to the voters that have not seen my name on their ballots before, and learn about these new communities and the issues that impact them everyday. During my travels, I was able to stop by some of the great small businesses in MI-07 (shout out to Flour Child Bakery in Grand Ledge for their impressive bagel selection). Everywhere I stopped, folks filled me in on other local businesses throughout the new parts of the district that I need to check out. So, if you live in the new 7th district or you have a favorite local spot in Eaton, Clinton, Shiawassee, or Southwest Oakland – I want to hear from you. What are the restaurants, mom-and-pop stores, bakeries, coffee shops, and any other local hotspots or hidden gems I’ve been missing out on? And, if you want to help me as I continue to get out in the new district, consider chipping in below. Anything you can give helps me continue to host supporter events, recruit volunteers (), and work to earn the votes of folks in the new 7th district! | = I look forward to your recommendations! Elissa | | About Elissa Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on and | | Contact Elissa P.O. subject: We tried to stop him...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION
body:
These gas prices are simply out of control, Friend. | | | [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=cd684b0019&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
|
Friend -

This is Oklahoma Attorney General John O'Connor.

_You don't need to hear it from me_ \- **gas prices across the nation are skyrocketing,** and it's making life tougher for all Americans.

**_From Day One, Joe Biden has put America Last._ **His war on domestic energy production and our oil and gas industry has killed American jobs and emboldened our adversaries. Taking orders from liberal elites and left-wing activists has real-world consequences, and we're all paying the price.

Having trouble filling the tank? Democrats in D.C. and Hollywood refuse to recognize Biden's role in creating an American Energy Crisis.

Republicans understand that Biden's approach is failing American drivers, workers, and families. That is why [1](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=6bbc81800e&e=edf8a4d16d)[4 Republican Attorneys General sued the Biden Administration last year](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=56cd2d6031&e=edf8a4d16d) to end his foolish oil and gas moratorium on new leases - a policy Biden refuses to reverse as national gas prices approach _$5 a gallon._
**It's simple - Americans cannot afford the Democrats' extreme anti-energy agenda.**

_Republican Attorneys General need your help to ensure we have the tools to defeat far-left Democrats this November and continue holding Joe Biden accountable for the damage he's done._

[**Friend, please chip in $10, $25, or just $5 today to support our mission and put AMERICA First.**](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=6126ef090c&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| | Thank you for taking a stand with Republican Attorneys General.

---
| | Respectfully,
---
| John O'Connor
Oklahoma Attorney General

name: MarcyKaptur.com
subject: Our greatest asset
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Marcy secured federal funding for 9 separate projects across Northern Ohio.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967586/335109307/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220314District2_N_MKC_7DO_5_G_N_logo_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhYzg1Yy1lNmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waqNKoJ_o2kAxeyPSOubtdtpFV-h6u0Jd25Ng_I3ghc=) Team,

Marcy Kaptur has lived in and worked for the betterment of the district she represents her whole life. She fights for us every day.
Recently, Marcy secured federal funding for **9 separate projects** across Northern Ohio. While the GOP schemes to flip this district **and consolidate their power,** Marcy is always looking to invest in and **_empower_ the people of Northern Ohio.**

[**_While Marcy fights for her district, the GOP cynically fights to regain control of the House. In order to hold onto this district, and _the House majority_ , we must hit our fundraising goals. We need to raise $5,000 by 11:59 pm tomorrow to stay on track for March. Will you help us get there with a $5 donation today? _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967589/335109310/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220314District2_N_MKC_7DO_5_G_N_l1_TESTA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhYzg1Yy1lNmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waqNKoJ_o2kAxeyPSOubtdtpFV-h6u0Jd25Ng_I3ghc=) [DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967591/335109313/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220314District2_N_MKC_7DO_5_G_N_b1_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhYzg1Yy1lNmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waqNKoJ_o2kAxeyPSOubtdtpFV-h6u0Jd25Ng_I3ghc=) The floodgates have opened, and special interest money is starting to **deluge our race.** Mike Pence’s PAC has already announced a **$10 million ad spend** targeting Democrats like Marcy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967594/335109315/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220314District2_N_MKC_7DO_5_G_N_L1_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhYzg1Yy1lNmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waqNKoJ_o2kAxeyPSOubtdtpFV-h6u0Jd25Ng_I3ghc=) The GOP knows the path to the Majority goes through Northern Ohio – that is why they are targeting Marcy. Marcy knows her constituents are real people, _her friends, and neighbors_ , and they deserve a representative **who puts their interests first.**

[**_This is not going to be an easy fight, but it is a necessary one. And with you on our team, it is a battle that we can, and must, win. We are calling in the cavalry: we need your help. Will you contribute $5 today to help us smash our fundraising goal in March and win in November?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967597/335109318/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220314District2_N_MKC_7DO_5_G_N_l2_TESTA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhYzg1Yy1lNmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waqNKoJ_o2kAxeyPSOubtdtpFV-h6u0Jd25Ng_I3ghc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967600/335109321/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220314District2_N_MKC_7DO_5_G_N_EL5_TESTA&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhYzg1Yy1lNmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waqNKoJ_o2kAxeyPSOubtdtpFV-h6u0Jd25Ng_I3ghc=)**

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: Mission critical
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I was overseas, there was zero room for error. One mistake was the difference between life and death. Accuracy was everything -- weapon inspections, targets, deadlines, goals -- it all was critical on our mission. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=727b1dff1fd345319828e21726968b1f&_e=1VgcuYVuO560CaCB_0U1RaUvj5UyzHFfejL1FvBq6kd2dZmiCeioxjZrN4xZGTL3CPJt3XbnnmPw0dVut1sTJjaWfj5ZwBFB9Er5uLIuh_laXKuKdPuGMZ6ylnONFYdyEjcQ3MAnqTYb1kwwy3wL3PpNRHxDMxeg0mFMGJlD7Z_m4ngNrQ-oP6ARsguUacnXNMJt8oTinprPHy4VDT7tvMMXmYAKm_A5Mx_FSPWdPk9JCjvBsUdltGgTPLJz35VlwdcQK5KJjN7Y1x0R09DUUCcsVdH5I_7LKXjXloYSgZq99d5ZrwhvkfZbrs8z6Yc6BYVmTCUk7zh0HhC5E-iTHl4x64hSQYy1bmuCDVV-QAOflI1Uqx6dO9ej4W96njq7)

---
Peter,

I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders.**When I was overseas, there was zero room for error._One mistake was the difference between life and death._**

Accuracy was everything --_weapon inspections, targets, deadlines, goals_ -- it all was critical on our mission.

Like my time overseas, on my mission today I have zero room for error. While the consequences aren’t life or death, they surely feel just important. **I’m talking about my mission to secure one of the most competitive seats in Congress this November.**

**In 2020, we failed on our mission.** The consequence: an incompetent Congresswoman who supports open borders, on-demand abortion, and steep taxes. But Peter, we can’t afford to fall short again.

[** SUPPORT TYLER KISTNER FOR CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=727b1dff1fd345319828e21726968b1f&_e=1VgcuYVuO560CaCB_0U1RaUvj5UyzHFfejL1FvBq6kd2dZmiCeioxjZrN4xZGTL3CPJt3XbnnmPw0dVut1sTJjaWfj5ZwBFB9Er5uLIuh_laXKuKdPuGMZ6ylnONFYdyEjcQ3MAnqTYb1kwwy3wL3PpNRHxDMxeg0mFMGJlD7Z_StymGGO7yOp82jvk9LnJfb4Glqc7nASFY6X52CZR_K-BrX1OcRfyZxENfqAe5oW87Isz4dm55IpiLIlLe3bjmIzYMrm5azmTJsU-_XkIP6Ikwr0vLyhu23JstIoyr6f0rHrfAubZKOwrneloIIMxz8WNWsFXmPaOcDXjdiSzVf6Xub_cbt1TIhornfghsSQDRYoITtMD7Y7HUZoxxhNsS)
**WE HAVE ZERO ROOM FOR ERROR!**

We have to keep up the pace with the million’s worth of dark money that the liberal elite are pouring into this race against me. [**If we’re going to take this seat back in 2022, I need your immediate support on my mission today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=727b1dff1fd345319828e21726968b1f&_e=1VgcuYVuO560CaCB_0U1RaUvj5UyzHFfejL1FvBq6kd2dZmiCeioxjZrN4xZGTL3CPJt3XbnnmPw0dVut1sTJjaWfj5ZwBFB9Er5uLIuh_laXKuKdPuGMZ6ylnONFYdyEjcQ3MAnqTYb1kwwy3wL3PpNRHxDMxeg0mFMGJlD7Z9Zvg_THHL5t4nQQZK9u1-mfHz6d6tXjnLy6QIVE4vagoVP1uDsTT3lsFpSyNoiC4lYNPdtIu4lQ4QUHEmHhvG8Lyq7-bvJ28hpEfIuTXgXyzErecUG_7s9hPrOtjMutUzTitHaMLdscuxdTRPFxBZxp92bvyP8XA9ByY09VYmSwRKamtNIoPFcOEok3yVGIIFRUocKzWm4IXJ9fJFtWHNc)

[** SUPPORT TYLER KISTNER FOR CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=727b1dff1fd345319828e21726968b1f&_e=1VgcuYVuO560CaCB_0U1RaUvj5UyzHFfejL1FvBq6kd2dZmiCeioxjZrN4xZGTL3CPJt3XbnnmPw0dVut1sTJjaWfj5ZwBFB9Er5uLIuh_laXKuKdPuGMZ6ylnONFYdyEjcQ3MAnqTYb1kwwy3wL3PpNRHxDMxeg0mFMGJlD7Z9re6kw4w3Yy-gjLUnR-s079DKvC8i01z33HOeohjG73Ke9TJJO2xG7O4fg97wSqqeBN2sMlp3qCkaDprFOSoVESKfTJBnPf_ggQ6H-gebgRiRZya7sLPP0N-MM3QkvOCKz1SZJmdEWg0Nb0oiB709BzJT7rSD7_X30bwTkYIjL0F5YBSs7A5fSs3QKFIkfEVu3p_y1a5ik1SePwHtvexgy)
When I first joined the Marine Corps., I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and that oath will never expire. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country. _**Failure is not an option in this race.**_

[**I’m calling on you, to help defend our Nation in this critical moment. Please don’t let me and the team down.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=727b1dff1fd345319828e21726968b1f&_e=1VgcuYVuO560CaCB_0U1RaUvj5UyzHFfejL1FvBq6kd2dZmiCeioxjZrN4xZGTL3CPJt3XbnnmPw0dVut1sTJjaWfj5ZwBFB9Er5uLIuh_laXKuKdPuGMZ6ylnONFYdyEjcQ3MAnqTYb1kwwy3wL3PpNRHxDMxeg0mFMGJlD7Z_uRRFqz75Gyt2UQ0nXLxmz_blQfWpd202E9bqET1G-QJzi5IPuwC0ZUE---vhs27XJchl3F1JsNWI9TpC7sgt7X0KPSIV1o9uT0UAHMnNudLxSmZwBAwZ7ns6qsuvc5hL5C8oaAbBzZh0XnRbc1n0v8S07oCpNNhWe42UkplmyFmkM70yCaMzr6gKNLeyaNgWEtfAAWMdEInUQHXe7cFjd) If I learned one thing from my failure in 2020, it’s that _failure isn’t final._

body:
| | |
---

**This is a _pivotal_ moment.**

Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson broke barriers to become the first-ever Black woman nominated to the Supreme Court. Now her HISTORIC confirmation hearings are just days away, and we can’t take anything for granted.

**Republicans and their Fox News allies are already SLAMMING Judge Jackson with the most despicable attacks imaginable,** so we NEED to know if grassroots Democrats are ready to stand in her corner!

Our campaign strategists are standing by for your answer -- _but we're still MISSING 67 responses from Pennsylvania!_ **Please tell us now:**

**FACT:** The U.S. has MORE wealth inequality than any other major developed nation in the world.
Yes. You read that correctly.
To make matters worse — income and wealth inequality has only been exacerbated during the pandemic, leaving a handful of billionaires in control of our economy while the working and middle-class suffer.
And here’s the kicker: Most politicians in Washington are afraid to address this economic crisis BECAUSE THEY ARE BOUGHT AND PAID FOR BY THE SUPER-RICH.
It’s time to change that.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Can you take a minute to let us know what you think Democrats could be doing better?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Democrats in Congress have failed to pass major legislation to expand
Medicare, address the climate crisis, or raise the minimum wage to at
least $15. President Biden has not used his executive power to cancel
student loan debt or drastically improve our immigration system.

There is no excuse for these failures. And with the upcoming midterm
elections, Democrats are in danger of losing our majorities in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/survey/jdem-priorities-2022-survey/?source=em20220314-22389&t=1002&akid=22389%2E1203867%2Ezo-uK6 ]So, Peter, we
want to hear from you today about what you think is most pressing for
Democrats to do right now, before it’s too late. Can you take just two
minutes for our survey?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/survey/jdem-priorities-2022-survey/?source=em20220314-22389&t=1003&akid=22389%2E1203867%2Ezo-uK6 ]Take the survey »

Democrats passed an expanded Child Tax Credit last year to reduce child
poverty. Then, they let the expanded tax credit expire and poverty spiked.
Democrats increased subsidies available to some under the Affordable Care
Act last year. But those will expire at the end of this year, just before
Republicans could move into control of Congress.

We know that incremental, temporary measures are not enough. We need to
pass Build Back Better and fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal,
student debt cancellation, immigrant justice, and so much more.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/survey/jdem-priorities-2022-survey/?source=em20220314-22389&t=1004&akid=22389%2E1203867%2Ezo-uK6 ]Can you let us know what’s most important to you that Democrats have
failed to deliver on? It’ll only take two minutes of your time.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1005&akid=22389%2E1203867%2Ezo-uK6 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1006&akid=22389%2E1203867%2Ezo-uK6 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220314-22389-footer&t=1007&refcode2=22389_1203867_zo-uK6&akid=22389%2E1203867%2Ezo-uK6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=22389%2E1203867%2Ezo-uK6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

**This is urgent, friend: ****I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control – but I'm falling short of my mid-month fundraising goal at the worst possible moment: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967869/335109987/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2616-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWJiMmUwYi1lN2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9lYaWhUTmeArpPlLBcDPr-AAoKunLEJuzUw6nARMzA=)

It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again.

clean_body: Peter, As the war in Ukraine continues, the situation around the world is getting even worse. And Joe Biden is still barely lifting a finger. I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again - America needs a Commander in Chief who isn’t afraid to stand up to our enemies. But since we can’t trust Joe Biden to keep America safe, we need to build a Republican majority in Congress who will. As a West Point graduate and Army Intelligence Officer, I served in Ukraine learning just how men like Vladmir Putin operate - and now, I’m ready to take that knowledge to Congress to take on our enemies. Thank You, Jeremy Hunt \--------forwarded email-------- Peter, When I served as a U.S. Army intelligence officer in Ukraine, I saw just how ruthless and corrupt Vladimir Putin and his thugs can be. But despite Russia’s threats, I NEVER doubted my decision to help train our allies to defend themselves against Russian aggression. Now, we have a President who’s too weak to even look Vladimir Putin in the eye - and if he won’t stand up to him, we need a Republican tough majority in Congress who will. I’m leading the charge for a new generation of conservative veterans who will bring back American strength, and I need you on my team to win. Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. | |

This week, we have a chance to stop yet another COVID spending bill, and to help amplify Rand Paul’s efforts to end travel mask mandates!

**In this week’s call-to-action**
* Stop Throwing Money at COVID!
* Help Rand Paul stop travel mask mandates
* Other active AlignAct campaigns

_Remember, when you use our AlignAct campaign, you can contact all of the Senators with just a couple of clicks – it will literally take you one to two minutes to do_

|
---

[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

**Help Rand Paul stop travel mask mandates**

Sen. Rand Paul is planning to force a vote on his resolution to repeal travel mask mandates on public transportation when the Senate is back in session. We have an action item targeting the White House, demanding an end to these same travel mask mandates. Let’s support Rand Paul’s efforts in the Senate by amplifying his resolution and hammering the White House with the message.

[**Even if you’ve already used this AlignAct campaign before, you can use it again.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-K5wb81II1FAZm-dzHbSmg) This time when you call, mention Rand Paul’s resolution to give his effort a boost.

Friends, Today is a big day for our people-powered campaign: **Aruna and I just filed the paperwork to officially get on the primary ballot for Governor and Lieutenant Governor here in Maryland!** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967988/335110419/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220314filing_WM_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTlmM2Y5NC1lOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JN0E8dXSSOkA0WnEW25_1LjMSPM5BUdIo0ORScxaBuM=)
_My daughter, Mia, joining me and Aruna to officially file to be on the ballot!_[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967989/335110420/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220314filing_WM_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTlmM2Y5NC1lOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JN0E8dXSSOkA0WnEW25_1LjMSPM5BUdIo0ORScxaBuM=)
---
Since I announced my campaign last June, the outpouring of support from people all over our state has been incredible, and it’s what made today possible.
Now, we’re looking at less than 3 months until the primary election, and it’s an _extremely_ crowded field. That’s why it’s critical that we continue to keep up our momentum between now and then if we’re going to stand out from the crowd and go on to the general election in November.
With the first financial quarter of 2022 coming to a close at the end of March, we need to ensure we put up big grassroots fundraising numbers to show our movement is only growing.
[**Can you chip in $20.22, or whatever you can afford, to fuel our campaign, win the primary, and send me and Aruna to fight for you in Annapolis in 2022?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42967990/335110448/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220314filing_WM_60da_xx_l1&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTlmM2Y5NC1lOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JN0E8dXSSOkA0WnEW25_1LjMSPM5BUdIo0ORScxaBuM=)
**** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friends, Today is a big day for our people-powered campaign: Aruna and I just filed the paperwork to officially get on the primary ballot for Governor and Lieutenant Governor here in Maryland! | = My daughter, Mia, joining me and Aruna to officially file to be on the ballot!= Since I announced my campaign last June, the outpouring of support from people all over our state has been incredible, and it’s what made today possible. Now, we’re looking at less than 3 months until the primary election, and it’s an extremely crowded field. That’s why it’s critical that we continue to keep up our momentum between now and then if we’re going to stand out from the crowd and go on to the general election in November. With the first financial quarter of 2022 coming to a close at the end of March, we need to ensure we put up big grassroots fundraising numbers to show our movement is only growing. = **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for helping make this moment possible, friend. Let’s keep it up! Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
