All we’ve accomplished is because of grassroots supporters like you!
Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42968013/335110531/-1392507730?refcode=em_fr_220314mmd_mmd_lbr_actives_7_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzlmM2Y5NC1lOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DB27BjJfzgcPGi7pqVTV0jVL_Thz5Twd_F4iJC3hE_k=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42968014/335110532/-1392507730?refcode=em_fr_220314mmd_mmd_lbr_actives_7_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzlmM2Y5NC1lOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DB27BjJfzgcPGi7pqVTV0jVL_Thz5Twd_F4iJC3hE_k=) I wanted to start off by saying thank you. Between traveling to Washington and visiting with Delawareans across all three counties, it’s not common that I get to take a deep dive into the grassroots donors who power my campaign.

People like Rebecca from Newark who gave $15 or Stephen from Rehoboth Beach who gave $25 truly are the backbone of this campaign.

[**Today, I’m asking you to join these small-dollar donors and chip in to my reelection campaign, but let me explain why! If you don’t need an explanation, click here to give →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42968016/335110534/-1392507730?refcode=em_fr_220314mmd_mmd_lbr_actives_7_ng_n_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzlmM2Y5NC1lOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DB27BjJfzgcPGi7pqVTV0jVL_Thz5Twd_F4iJC3hE_k=)

We’re coming up on our mid-month fundraising deadline, and since we’re facing an FEC filing deadline later in March, my team and I have been working extra hard to hit all of our fundraising numbers.

For the first time ever, our campaign is at the top of the ticket this year. There are no Presidential or Senatorial races that can help turn out voters, so Democrats are counting on my team to do some heavy lifting and excite voters in all three counties.

**To do that, I cannot afford to fall short of any fundraising goals, especially as we approach the first FEC deadline of the election year!**

**[So, can I count on your support today to help us close our $5,392 fundraising gap by Wednesday? With your help, we’ll be able to do our part in keeping the House blue in November!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42968017/335110535/-1392507730?refcode=em_fr_220314mmd_mmd_lbr_actives_7_ng_n_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzlmM2Y5NC1lOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DB27BjJfzgcPGi7pqVTV0jVL_Thz5Twd_F4iJC3hE_k=)** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** | | ****[$15 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42968018/335110536/-1392507730?refcode=em_fr_220314mmd_mmd_lbr_actives_7_ng_n_EL15&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzlmM2Y5NC1lOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DB27BjJfzgcPGi7pqVTV0jVL_Thz5Twd_F4iJC3hE_k=)****

# If you are sick of career politicians, please donate RIGHT NOW to this campaign!

| | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001954y_z0u30UBxO80rEK9oLu2b1RTPQkjpQ7mmdkyvmO_cMN9vePlitP3A2p4BNEmC7IiwT7sqxI4Ilk1zTO0HZA_sDVQj893nhPeFsTo9fEypgPItY_WxeiDFbhrhGP3sBy7Uj3yg4Agus0pKf6BaFFQeSxGkm_fWmbF3Sx1U502jhotISQtga2C-iiwmrqJ&c=5Ji6o5Y2lnCXXwne0pvD7MOxb2swVvaIQHQxVJjia7vV8kTJF20DCw==&ch=tBNo5GzhDseeHVjqlRzrulICAfA8NEu8JxF-co3ITECzGtDh9C2INQ==)

##

## My story is similar to the stories of those who know the American Dream as more than a cute political talking point. Those of you who have been forged in the crucible of adversity know how important difficulties in life are to developing character. Let me share with you what that means to me.

First, you must know that the terror of socialism and communism was burned into my psyche from a tender age. My mother, brother, and aunt came to America from Eastern Europe (former Yugoslavia). They lived under and fled from communism.
Growing up, I listened to stories of how people in other parts of the world lived and I was taught why America is the greatest nation on Earth.

---

### March 8 - Meridian, ID

The Plan is "Politics NOT as usual." This is a time for the Patriots to take a stand before it's too late.

# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---

clean_body: Mark your calendar! | | | | | | | March 14, 2022 | | | | Officially filed to be on Repulican Ballot May 17th. | == | If you are sick of career politicians, please donate RIGHT NOW to this campaign! | | == | My story is similar to the stories of those who know the American Dream as more than a cute political talking point. Those of you who have been forged in the crucible of adversity know how important difficulties in life are to developing character. Let me share with you what that means to me. First, you must know that the terror of socialism and communism was burned into my psyche from a tender age. My mother, brother, and aunt came to America from Eastern Europe (former Yugoslavia). They lived under and fled from communism. Growing up, I listened to stories of how people in other parts of the world lived and I was taught why America is the greatest nation on Earth. | | == | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | March 8 - Meridian, ID The Plan is "Politics NOT as usual." This is a time for the Patriots to take a stand before it's too late. | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | == | == | | | | | Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful. | | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho. | == | | == | | | | == | Ed Humphreys == P.O. name: Adam Schiff
subject: asking you directly:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | |
[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-cgE~zrf~)
It's Adam Schiff.

We're in the midst of an historic election year that will decide the fate of our Democratic House Majority.

****[At this pivotal moment, I need to be clear: This mid-term election can determine the path our country takes for generations to come.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~EpTLbrw~)****

If Trump and Republicans have their way, they'll continue to tear the fabric of our democracy, stall any sort of real action on behalf of the American people, and enact more tax cuts for their wealthy donors.

But there's another way.** We're not powerless to stop the GOP's destructive agenda. We aren't.**

Democrats nationwide are fighting to defend voting rights, strengthen our democracy, fight climate change, protect reproductive freedoms, invest in people, build an economy that works for everyone - and so much more.

And while I'm proud to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with my Democratic colleagues, I know we can't win this fight alone.

We need committed grassroots supporters like you behind us every step of the way to defend our House Majority and our ability to make the progress our country demands. We need you.

**[That's why I'm asking for your support: Will you chip in $3 to the DCCC before midnight? Their Mid Month Deadline is just 24 hours away.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfgDrX9f-)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T4~)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
---

Thank you,

Adam
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46539668&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjIwMTUyNTA1NgS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46539668&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjIwMTUyNTA1NgS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Friend,

**[_We’re almost halfway through March and still $18,917 short of our crucial mid-month fundraising goal._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42968065/335110813/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk759-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzg4ZTYyNy1lOWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_nv4o1na2lnTY9u-628gESuIBulOj7fWqB65BPiaZsc=)**

We know you're hearing from many different campaigns today, but we want to take a moment to explain why this race — and our $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal — really matter:
* These fundraising goals represent the real benchmarks we need to hit to defend Maggie's seat this November. And in a purple state like New Hampshire, missing our fundraising goals means inviting more GOP dark money into this race against Maggie — which could be the difference between winning and losing.

* Mitch McConnell needs just ONE seat to take back the Senate, and now that political experts are labeling Maggie Hassan's race a toss-up, she's one of the GOP's top targets.

* More money has been spent going after Senator Hassan’s campaign than any other vulnerable Senate Democrat this cycle. Right-wing groups have already poured MILLIONS into attack ads, and they’re just getting started.

We’ll be frank: there's a lot on the line in this race. **If Maggie Hassan loses in November, Democrats will lose control of the Senate**. That's why we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us stay on track.
**[_The clock is ticking, friend. clean_body: We know you're hearing from many different campaigns today, but we want to take a moment to explain why this race really matters. | | | = Friend, = We know you're hearing from many different campaigns today, but we want to take a moment to explain why this race — and our $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal — really matter: These fundraising goals represent the real benchmarks we need to hit to defend Maggie's seat this November. And in a purple state like New Hampshire, missing our fundraising goals means inviting more GOP dark money into this race against Maggie — which could be the difference between winning and losing. Mitch McConnell needs just ONE seat to take back the Senate, and now that political experts are labeling Maggie Hassan's race a toss-up, she's one of the GOP's top targets. More money has been spent going after Senator Hassan’s campaign than any other vulnerable Senate Democrat this cycle. Right-wing groups have already poured MILLIONS into attack ads, and they’re just getting started. We’ll be frank: there's a lot on the line in this race. If Maggie Hassan loses in November, Democrats will lose control of the Senate. That's why we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us stay on track. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Maggie | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =**. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Team Fetterman
subject: This might just be the most beautiful map of Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Do you know what this means?
#
Derek, do you know what this map means?
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45312?refcode=em20220314-4969&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4969%2E434096%2EVvKSWu)
_Every single dot represents the location of a grassroots supporter of John Fetterman for U.S. Senate:_
**That’s right, Derek. The working-class movement we're building together to make John Fetterman our next U.S. Senator has members in all 67 PA counties.**
We've also got friends all over the country who are in it to win it with John. If this looks like a striking amount of Steelers Gold to you, it's because there's actually a Fetterman donor from _over 50% of all general U.S. ZIP codes._
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45312?refcode=em20220314-4969&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4969%2E434096%2EVvKSWu)
But here's the thing, Derek: According to the records we have on file, you haven't contributed to support our grassroots campaign yet. **We'd LOVE if you'd be willing to represent 18326 on this map of our grassroots support.** So with our March mid-month deadline less than 48 hours away, we gotta ask:
[**_Will you please make very first $5 donation to our grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate right now to help us reach our $25,000 goal before Tuesday night?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45312?refcode=em20220314-4969&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4969%2E434096%2EVvKSWu)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45312?refcode=em20220314-4969&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4969%2E434096%2EVvKSWu)**
Thank you SO much for donating during this mid-month push and joining our big, beautiful, POWERFUL map of supporters. Your gift will fund our work across Pennsylvania to send John to fight for us in the Senate.
–Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220314-4969-footer&t=23&refcode2=4969_434096_VvKSWu&akid=4969%2E434096%2EVvKSWu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

subject: Chris is on the ballot!

Hey Derek — I just got back from Harrisburg to drop off all the petition signatures we collected and filed the paperwork to get Chris on the ballot.
**Chris is officially on the ballot to run for Pennsylvania’s 17th Congressional District.[Donate to support our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42961043/335077059/619327859?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220314filing_CH_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzE1NTQ1ZC1jOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NLg44lUqdM6-tXbvlhNApJwqDo8qcRZ-DoSsyEPo48s=)**
Thanks to supporters like you, we are one step closer to sending a worker’s champion to Congress this November. But there’s still a lot of work left to do.
In a race as competitive as ours, it’s going to take a strong people-powered movement to compete with self-funded Republicans who are pouring tons of money to buy elections all over Pennsylvania.
**[Will you pitch in $10 or more today to help us defend our House majority, keep PA-17 blue, and fight for our common good? Every contribution makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42961044/335077060/619327859?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220314filing_CH_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzE1NTQ1ZC1jOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NLg44lUqdM6-tXbvlhNApJwqDo8qcRZ-DoSsyEPo48s=)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcv5q22vsofmffpeet1gcj5ge2blaujq2fmanb6o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbobecb2m3g74t9l6crr9pbn6jg62tb7c9in6tj46grm4dtmcdhj7dbn6eqeecln6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj39p5l6hjreob661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jm4p70s3i6coh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkk8kk47n1usdohi73g1q16smdpcam6muobaqllg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ie1o74cph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9fslem60c5ghi9c9kq89m0qsq9ldkjmqj75o4ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ie1o74cph2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zijfe2rig5b84urdn1cnl2oouk2elufbfubqh988_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c9ie1o74cph2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

So I hope you’ll join me on Wednesday — [**_chip in any amount, submit your questions, and let’s build a Florida for All._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42968864/335114030/1995188602?refcode=20220314_EV_EM_AMA_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjlmMTU2Yi1lY2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qlSm_o6G73My-3mAKe9rHnZNow1XfnW0gu0WHzCRXdw=)

Charlie Crist

name: The A-Team
subject: We all deserve a slice of 🥧
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42969085/335115234/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTZhM2ZiZS1lZWEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zb_Csn9tnwUn-Ir3nqKBHedzhBQLX-ipw8uXizA0n9o=&emci=2addf1ed-afa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=956a3fbe-eea3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8410825)
---
Hi folks,

Happy Pi Day! As folks around the country and the world celebrate (hopefully with a lot of pie), we'd like to take a moment to fill you in on some pie of our own.

Specifically, who's getting a slice and who isn't. Right here in Maryland, income inequality has been steadily getting worse, causing disparities in health outcomes, education, and overall quality of life. Just look at some of these stats:
* In Maryland, the top 1% of earners take home 15.3% of all the total state income
* The top 1% make 17.8 times more than the bottom 99%
* Across the state, the top 20% of earners saw their income grow to 49.1% of the statewide total, while the bottom 20% of earners account for just 3.3%

Because, here in Maryland, the truth is, some people are eating a lot of pie, and some people barely get any. It's not just Maryland, either.

Attacks on unions and the right to organize, a stagnant minimum wage, and rising living costs have made income disparity in the U.S. worse than most industrialized nations. In the past 30 years, the wealth gap has more than doubled between the nation's richest and poorest families.

The people of Maryland and this country deserve better. They deserve a leader like Angela, who knows the struggles of working people and will put those struggles front and center as your next representative in congress.

**Folks, Angela is the candidate who will make sure everyone gets a slice of the pie.**

She is the type of leader who won't back down, who is unafraid to challenge the status quo and get things done.

As a Freshman Maryland State Delegate, Angela wrote and passed more bills than any member of her Chamber during her tenure, all while holding down a full-time job in addition to her Delegate position and raising her 5 children as a single mom.

clean_body: | Hi folks, Happy Pi Day! As folks around the country and the world celebrate (hopefully with a lot of pie), we'd like to take a moment to fill you in on some pie of our own. Specifically, who's getting a slice and who isn't. Right here in Maryland, income inequality has been steadily getting worse, causing disparities in health outcomes, education, and overall quality of life. Just look at some of these stats: In Maryland, the top 1% of earners take home 15.3% of all the total state income The top 1% make 17.8 times more than the bottom 99% Across the state, the top 20% of earners saw their income grow to 49.1% of the statewide total, while the bottom 20% of earners account for just 3.3% Because, here in Maryland, the truth is, some people are eating a lot of pie, and some people barely get any. It's not just Maryland, either. Attacks on unions and the right to organize, a stagnant minimum wage, and rising living costs have made income disparity in the U.S. worse than most industrialized nations. In the past 30 years, the wealth gap has more than doubled between the nation's richest and poorest families. The people of Maryland and this country deserve better. They deserve a leader like Angela, who knows the struggles of working people and will put those struggles front and center as your next representative in congress. Folks, Angela is the candidate who will make sure everyone gets a slice of the pie.** She is the type of leader who won't back down, who is unafraid to challenge the status quo and get things done. As a Freshman Maryland State Delegate, Angela wrote and passed more bills than any member of her Chamber during her tenure, all while holding down a full-time job in addition to her Delegate position and raising her 5 children as a single mom. = = Angela's ready to deliver for the people of Maryland; let’s help her get there. –The A-Team PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455 District Heights, MD 20753 240-293-2552 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. You can .

Voting for my election has started. We only have a couple of weeks before this is all over . Everything you give now will help me connect with voters in these crucial final weeks >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_031422_AttackEmail]
As the clock ticks down, my opponents have started making desperate attacks against me.
I’ve been fighting to keep pollution out of my neighborhood and other communities like it since before I was even elected to City Council. No one should be able to buy their way out of protecting our coastlines, keeping our air clean, and removing toxins from our neighborhoods.
Big Oil knows that if we continue to fight against their influence that they’ll be held responsible for their pollution. So to try and stop us, they’ve been funneling money into my opponent’s campaign and outside attack ads.
We won’t let them buy an election. Chip in now to show our competitors that their attack ad stunt won't get them anywhere >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_031422_AttackEmail]
Thank you so much!
-- Georgette

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: first quarter of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This is the first opportunity we’ll have to show the strength of our movement in 2022.
#
Peter,
March of an election year is an especially critical time. Once the month is over, we have to report Pramila’s fundraising numbers for the first quarter of the year (January - March). This is the first opportunity we’ll have to show the strength of our movement in 2022.
When Pramila’s fundraising numbers go public, all eyes will be looking at what we’ve raised so far this year. Reporters will judge the strength (or weakness) of Pramila’s fundraising. As head of the Congressional Progressive Caucus during a critical election year, electing more progressives and protecting the Democratic majority is crucial. And corporate special interests will look to see what they’re up against.
**We really can't afford to come up short — not with so much on the line in this midterm election year. That’s why our team set an important goal to raise $20,000 by tomorrow at 11:59 p.m. Can you chip in towards this important goal for Pramila?**
[**Peter, can you contribute $27 (our average donation this quarter) or anything at all today? Pramila is personally watching these numbers as we hit the middle of the month, so please give whatever you can right now.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10921?refcode=em20220314-1103&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1103%2E420207%2ENEM5x1)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10921?refcode=em20220314-1103&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1103%2E420207%2ENEM5x1)**
Every donation counts at this critical time, whether it’s $3, $27, or $100.
Thank you for your support,
Lauren
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220314-1103-footer&t=21&refcode2=1103_420207_NEM5x1&akid=1103%2E420207%2ENEM5x1)**

clean_body: This is the first opportunity we’ll have to show the strength of our movement in 2022. Peter, March of an election year is an especially critical time. Once the month is over, we have to report Pramila’s fundraising numbers for the first quarter of the year (January - March). This is the first opportunity we’ll have to show the strength of our movement in 2022. When Pramila’s fundraising numbers go public, all eyes will be looking at what we’ve raised so far this year. Reporters will judge the strength (or weakness) of Pramila’s fundraising. As head of the Congressional Progressive Caucus during a critical election year, electing more progressives and protecting the Democratic majority is crucial. And corporate special interests will look to see what they’re up against. We really can't afford to come up short — not with so much on the line in this midterm election year. That’s why our team set an important goal to raise $20,000 by tomorrow at 11:59 p.m. Can you chip in towards this important goal for Pramila? Every donation counts at this critical time, whether it’s $3, $27, or $100. Thank you for your support, Lauren Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager Pramila for Congress | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

subject: Judicial Watch: Hearing Set for Lawsuit Challenging California’s Racial, Ethnicity, LGBT Quotas for Corporate Boards
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that a hearing is set for Monday, March 14, in its taxpayer lawsuit challenging the state’s racial, ethnicity, and LGBT quotas for corporate boards of directors (Robin Crest, et al. v. Alex Padilla, in his official capacity as Secretary of State of the State of California (No.20ST-CV-37513)).

A trial in the matter is scheduled for May 2, 2022, == ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today that a Maryland court has set a trial date for its lawsuit against the State of Maryland that challenges the state’s 2021 Congressional redistricting plan. In moving forward with the case, the court denied the motion of the State of Maryland and its election officials to dismiss Judicial Watch’s lawsuit against them. The trial is scheduled for March 15-18, 2022. ---|--- | | | | = | = Months after a California sheriff got sued for reporting undocumented criminals to federal authorities, an illegal immigrant with a criminal history murdered four people in the veteran law enforcement official’s jurisdiction just days after being released from jail. The brutal crimes occurred in Sacramento, California where Sheriff Scott Jones was recently sued by a leftist civil rights group for transferring illegal alien offenders to Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) for removal rather than release them back into the community under state sanctuary laws known as the TRUTH Act and the California Values Act. = ---|--- | | | | == | == Gotham’s new mayor is getting kudos for standing up to radicals on guns and crime and schools, but when it comes to election integrity the Left is taking him to the cleaners. Unchecked, it’s an electoral death sentence for Mayor Eric Adams and fair elections in New York City. The war on election fairness is being waged on two fronts — one in broad daylight, and the other from the shadows. In both cases, the vehicle for the radical takeover of New York is the city’s failed Board of Elections. == ---|--- | | | == Fox News “U.S.-China collaboration on the Global Virome Project is an opportunity to lead innovation in science, collaborate with China, and potentially contribute to scientific breakthroughs,” said the summary of the Global Virome Project in the email that was part of 92 pages obtained by the conservative group Judicial Watch in a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit with the National Institutes of Health. == Fox News Judicial Watch obtained the records, first obtained by Fox News Digital, via a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request. The emails draw attention to records between the State Department and National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), run by Dr. Anthony Fauci, that suggest U.S. officials were aware of the Chinese Communist Party withholding key information on the coronavirus before the pandemic outbreak. = The Epoch Times The U.S. Secret Service (USSS) says it can’t locate years of records on communications regarding agents guarding Hunter Biden, the son of President Joe Biden. Chris Farrell, director of investigations and research for Judicial Watch, told The Epoch Times that it’s “highly improbable” that the USSS lost the records in question. = = = = = = = | CLIPS == | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962466/335084154/176967131?refcode=email&ms=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmY5MTU0ZC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYXW7xVjABfmW1Jo6GttyNheIod7OSbXlbej5u_Srs=) Friend, As I travel across Ohio, I see firsthand how fired up people are to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. The energy is growing every day and I know folks are ready for a change here in our state. Just take a look at the phenomenal slate of candidates running to serve our state:
* Jeff Crossman for Attorney General
* Taylor Sappington for Auditor of State
* Chelsea Clark for Secretary of State
* Scott Schertzer for Treasurer

**I know we can win these races, but Jeff, Taylor, Chelsea, and Scott are up against a massive GOP fundraising machine. We need resources ASAP to help counter the attacks and win these races.** **[That’s why we’re launching an emergency 24-hour $20,000 goal to help us kickstart their campaigns. Make a donation right now to help us flip Ohio blue>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962467/335084155/176967131?refcode=email&ms=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmY5MTU0ZC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYXW7xVjABfmW1Jo6GttyNheIod7OSbXlbej5u_Srs=)** **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962468/335084156/176967131?refcode=email&ms=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmY5MTU0ZC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYXW7xVjABfmW1Jo6GttyNheIod7OSbXlbej5u_Srs=)** Raised by a single mom, Jeff worked nights to pay his way through college and law school. He knows that for most Ohioans, nothing is given and everything is earned. **That’s why I know Jeff will fight for all Ohioans as our next Attorney General.** As Nelsonville Auditor, Taylor started an investigation on day one which led to the largest theft and fraud bust in Nelsonville history. And he’s breaking barriers as the first openly gay candidate for statewide office in Ohio. **He balanced the books and caught the crooks in his hometown, which is exactly what he’ll do for all of Ohio as Auditor of State.** Chelsea grew up in rural Ohio as a 6th generation farmer, which instilled in her the values of perseverance, grit, and advocacy. As a small business owner, she learned about entrepreneurship in a way that you only can from behind the wheel. **Now, she’s ready to put that knowledge to work as Ohio’s next Secretary of State.** Scott grew up in Marion, Ohio and served his community as a teacher for 13 years. He knows that when the people in power in Columbus spend their time playing politics, it’s people in towns across Ohio who pay the price. That’s why Scott is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for you. **You deserve a treasurer you can trust, and that’s exactly what you’ll get with Scott.** **[I know we have what it takes to win these races, but only if Jeff, Taylor, Chelsea, and Scott have the resources to compete against their GOP opponents. Please, make a donation to help us raise $20,000 in the next 24 hours>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962469/335084157/176967131?refcode=email&ms=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmY5MTU0ZC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYXW7xVjABfmW1Jo6GttyNheIod7OSbXlbej5u_Srs=)** **[DONATE](ttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/220314-downballot-moneybomb?refcode=email)** Thanks for your help. We’re building a strong grassroots team to elect leaders Ohioans can trust to do what’s right. Your donations have a direct impact on our ability to do just that. Let’s keep it rolling. John
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962470/335084158/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmY5MTU0ZC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYXW7xVjABfmW1Jo6GttyNheIod7OSbXlbej5u_Srs=)** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962471/335084159/817536172?recurring=true&refcode=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmY5MTU0ZC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYXW7xVjABfmW1Jo6GttyNheIod7OSbXlbej5u_Srs=)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962477/335084165/-1406512299?refcode=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.36f9154d-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmY5MTU0ZC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThYXW7xVjABfmW1Jo6GttyNheIod7OSbXlbej5u_Srs=)

body:
We can’t afford to take anything for granted
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962624/335084510/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220314-1-a&refcode2=53c9cee4-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=GCY+yN5L1GZlta0C1RF6XcIdSVhNiRfjHPTBqP4FGp/WNlh9REiswL41cvtuyMgB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2M5Y2VlNC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C10nhauiJ3apD1puS7OonYipbkR4hR6LEjrLzkpthfY=)
Friend,
I'm reaching out today because our team has launched an important mid-month fundraising drive to make sure we stay on track to keep this Maryland Senate seat blue in November.
I apologize for being so direct, but we need your help to keep the momentum up and make sure we reach our goal.
Every donation we receive not only helps fuel our re-election campaign, but also strengthens our movement to build a clean energy future, end the influence of Dark Money in politics, and stop big special interests from drowning out the public interest.
March is the first FEC deadline month since I filed the paperwork to get on the ballot — and when it's done we are required to report how much we've raised.
But even more important than the total amount is the number of donations we receive. Because that’s the number that shows the strength of this grassroots movement.
So when our numbers go public, we cannot afford to come up short. That's why I have to ask:
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — before our team's mid-month fundraising drive ends tomorrow at midnight? We need two big days to keep our momentum on track this month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962625/335084512/-149995803?source=em220314-1-a&refcode2=53c9cee4-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=GCY+yN5L1GZlta0C1RF6XcIdSVhNiRfjHPTBqP4FGp/WNlh9REiswL41cvtuyMgB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2M5Y2VlNC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C10nhauiJ3apD1puS7OonYipbkR4hR6LEjrLzkpthfY=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42962626/335084513/-149995803?source=em220314-1-a&refcode2=53c9cee4-cfa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=GCY+yN5L1GZlta0C1RF6XcIdSVhNiRfjHPTBqP4FGp/WNlh9REiswL41cvtuyMgB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2M5Y2VlNC1jZmEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C10nhauiJ3apD1puS7OonYipbkR4hR6LEjrLzkpthfY=)**
Every big issue we care about is on the line in this year's midterms. We can’t afford to take anything for granted — and we can’t do this without you. Thanks in advance for chipping in today if you can.
Onwards,
Chris

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Speaker Pelosi’s Weekly Grassroots Volunteer Update: Equal Pay Day with Small Business Committee Chair, Congresswoman Nydia Velázquez 8:30p ET / 5:30p PT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

As we are continuing our celebration of Women’s History Month by honoring our amazing Democratic Women’s Caucus, we are also marking “Equal Pay Day” this year on March 15, 2022.

That date symbolizes how much into the new year women in America had to work, on average, to be paid as much as men were paid in 2021 because of the gender pay gap — on average.

That caveat is important, of course, because the disparity in earnings is even wider when comparing what Black, Latina, Native American, Southeast Asian, LGBTQ, immigrant, and disabled women earn compared to what white men earn — on average.

With us for this very important discussion tomorrow evening, Small Business Committee Chair Nydia Velázquez, who is also a senior member of the Financial Services Committee. We will talk about her work uplifting women on the job, saving small businesses across America, and empowering women to access investment capital and to lead in their communities.

Register here to join us on this topic and for an update on the news here and around the world on Tuesday night at 8:30p ET:

https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_E6Er4C4eTqeirRMxAJSXJg

I look forward to being in community with all of you tomorrow.

Warmest regards,
NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c48fbc67-eaa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/8ee476b1-f3a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWU0NzZiMS1mM2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-NtS--88ujA-_39gwx9ByfD30ynHBGeQ2w41vKzPJ88=&id=117907000 .
Nancy Pelosi for Congress
700 13TH STREET NW

Washington, DC 20005

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Transformative investments in our future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Our legislature adjourned Thursday night.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/KaG2s3Ww6LS8/dTFOVFVhWjl0ZnZuakpiTGFkK25NRDF0K0oxRGtQc3ZtUkltU0RnbjZ5TE1kQk1SVFdYTmkvNFRjQm5JMXBLbXlqbDU5N3k2Z0NCbUtRMTJsaldiK3JsMWhzNHpSMlZpeTk1bXppdm5XTkk9S0/VWZyendFem1JY215ckp1QzJvekwzNGQ1bjVYb29MakFtVGNqWDM4MG03az0S1) Friend -- Last week, we concluded Washington's legislative session. In a moment, I'm going to recap all that we accomplished together. But first, I have a quick request. **We haven 't been able to fundraise for the last three months, so it's critical that we make up for lost time. This year's legislative session was short, but I'm proud to say that we packed a lot of historic progress into the last few months:
* We passed our Move Ahead Washington package, a once-in-a-generation investment in transportation and ending the climate crisis. It advances our clean fuel standard, electrifies our ferries, and improves safety infrastructure for bikers and pedestrians.
* We capped the price of insulin at $35 for a one-month supply -- because life-saving medication should always be accessible.
* We made major investments in salmon recovery.
* We took action to ban high-capacity magazines to make Washingtonians safer.
* And we led with our values, affirming abortion access in Washington and expanding eligibility for our free lunch program.

We had big goals for a short session, and we achieved them. None of these accomplishments would have been possible without folks like you giving your time, money, and voice.
I could not be more grateful for this team -- and frankly, our work is just getting started. The U.N. just released the next major IPCC climate report, which warns the world that we'll be facing the consequences of the climate crisis even sooner than expected -- and that we aren't taking action fast enough.
That means that it's time for our movement to double down on our work to save humanity from the worst of the climate crisis. Now that we can fundraise again, we're setting an ambitious goal over this next week to kick-start this next phase of our work together.
[**_Friend, will you help us reach our goal of 500 grassroots donations over this next week? Please, chip in $10 right now to power our climate work together._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/gp3jhAgkdwC~/dTFOVFVhWjl0ZnZuakpiTGFkK25NRDF0K0oxRGtQc3ZtUkltU0RnbjZ5TE1kQk1SVFdYTmkvNFRjQm5JMXBLbXlqbDU5N3k2Z0NCbUtRMTJsaldiK3JsMWhzNHpSMlZpeTk1bXppdm5XTkk9S0/VWZyendFem1JY215ckp1QzJvekwzNGQ1bjVYb29MakFtVGNqWDM4MG03az0S1)
Very truly yours,
Jay

[CHIP IN NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhbzjvRTr/dTFOVFVhWjl0ZnZuakpiTGFkK25NRDF0K0oxRGtQc3ZtUkltU0RnbjZ5TE1kQk1SVFdYTmkvNFRjQm5JMXBLbXlqbDU5N3k2Z0NCbUtRMTJsaldiK3JsMWhzNHpSMlZpeTk1bXppdm5XTkk9S0/VWZyendFem1JY215ckp1QzJvekwzNGQ1bjVYb29MakFtVGNqWDM4MG03az0S1)

body:
I’m proud to join in solidarity with workers demanding better working conditions and wages across the state.
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42963495/335091418/1058120998?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220314_p_s_labor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjlhNjNmZi1kM2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFobWcZHTd3rcCIb2bSfX43os2L1xjaydMMynXzp60g=&emci=2747f487-cba3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=229a63ff-d3a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684840)

---
| | Team, When people go to work, they should have the right to fair wages, benefits, a safe and healthy workplace, and stable work hours. Unfortunately, this isn’t always the case. We’ve seen what happens in the face of growing corporate greed: workers get taken advantage of, and left behind while their employers rake in record profits. That’s why I’m proud to stand with workers fighting for dignity, a good wage, and benefits across the Commonwealth. [_**If you’re with me, add your name now to stand with Massachusetts workers.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42963497/335091420/-2108816363?refcode=em_20220314_p_s_labor&ms=em_20220314_p_s_labor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjlhNjNmZi1kM2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFobWcZHTd3rcCIb2bSfX43os2L1xjaydMMynXzp60g=&emci=2747f487-cba3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=229a63ff-d3a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684840) Last week, I joined the Massachusetts Building Trades Council and the North Atlantic States Carpenters on the picket line outside the Marriott Copley Hotel. Earlier, I was proud to join in solidarity with Machinist Local 447 and workers on the picket line in Dedham in support of a fair contract. And a few weeks ago, I met with two Starbucks workers fighting with Starbucks Workers United in Boston. We need leaders who will stand with workers — especially when they’re fighting up against big corporations and unfair working conditions. We’ve seen the impact of the collective action that unions can provide, and I support the efforts for fair contracts and labor standards across Massachusetts and the country. [_**Add your name to say it’s time to deliver good working conditions and a family-sustaining wage to all workers, no matter the industry.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42963498/335091421/-2108816363?refcode=em_20220314_p_s_labor&ms=em_20220314_p_s_labor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjlhNjNmZi1kM2EzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFobWcZHTd3rcCIb2bSfX43os2L1xjaydMMynXzp60g=&emci=2747f487-cba3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=229a63ff-d3a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684840) Let’s fight for real change together — because when workers fight, they win. Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: I’m proud to join in solidarity with workers demanding better working conditions and wages across the state. | | | | | Team, When people go to work, they should have the right to fair wages, benefits, a safe and healthy workplace, and stable work hours. Unfortunately, this isn’t always the case. We’ve seen what happens in the face of growing corporate greed: workers get taken advantage of, and left behind while their employers rake in record profits. That’s why I’m proud to stand with workers fighting for dignity, a good wage, and benefits across the Commonwealth. Last week, I joined the Massachusetts Building Trades Council and the North Atlantic States Carpenters on the picket line outside the Marriott Copley Hotel. Earlier, I was proud to join in solidarity with Machinist Local 447 and workers on the picket line in Dedham in support of a fair contract. And a few weeks ago, I met with two Starbucks workers fighting with Starbucks Workers United in Boston. We need leaders who will stand with workers — especially when they’re fighting up against big corporations and unfair working conditions. We’ve seen the impact of the collective action that unions can provide, and I support the efforts for fair contracts and labor standards across Massachusetts and the country. Let’s fight for real change together — because when workers fight, they win. Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. | Team, this week could be the most consequential week for voting rights in Arizona for decades. The AZ GOP is attempting to end almost all voting rights in Arizona, and the _AZ Supreme Court is reviewing the case THIS WEEK._

Protecting voting rights is important, so the **Arizona Democratic Party, in partnership with the DNC, DSCC and DCCC, intervened in the lawsuit late last week!** Now, we’re looking to build citizen support for protecting these voting rights.

**[Team, we’re looking for 2,000 people to sign on RIGHT NOW and say they support Arizona Democrats’ efforts to save early voting, PEVL, and more in Arizona.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnng6W7jRaf_MT40ubuVF_E0FnrTi-G9NX63hkQMC5Kkb2lBVGWmXeAE8teaUccq0RharF3otg3EVdc1ftdPdEYuTEWr9JB5knOvj8GmZAPVsYY0iZRWUqiAwxYe-15My8WHpgal3obKQTJQIcwNk4udFUyw-VF6AOJjT3DywmOiGGrJbUmU8oCFJz1e_Kqxz8GiNCcIf6LK6quyz1I2QcstIb6HLPgCeawPqTuhgguAMBbgH90m3tP-qzu2ytjcfreyZBajy_cKJQdxWpYFodX0Nr8c9lL43p7li3nwZthinrP-62qFeHUTIcQ0_u_IdhRBNoa7aEwFwhyhmn4otS7DqBODj7E6yNnmbl4H-coPuhHSHLGqq_g4uwV2FQ_Ot0hxTUbsQOw8Kl6DduMPbNdxVfWz5hb51sUqPPZ0vphcM86_RnFquXMcpZkLDsTxqPQE01sOa9wSy1xiuDD5tQYI/3kc/JbMONwF_QAiFPtSGRMLulg/h1/JTBfRjHWghJx3-OSN1krE-A9fZ5ddI_ArHl7AlINUXI)** [
ADD YOUR NAME](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnng6W7jRaf_MT40ubuVF_E0FnrTi-G9NX63hkQMC5Kkb2lBVGWmXeAE8teaUccq0RharF3otg3EVdc1ftdPdEYuTEWr9JB5knOvj8GmZAPVsYY0iZRWUqiAwxYe-15My8WHpgal3obKQTJQIcwNk4udFUyw-VF6AOJjT3DywmOiGAW00o2e4FYpOVN1Oae6m63HCzR5BjILJbAlWhx038xd64Awh5fZZcjzy4eJU5N_PDrjPDpp6w8d5_2jSx9l_iUwIdgnt6xV8jBBxkz6D0SMeF0AJ4eXDSU1qLgpyArqAPKnOd1QL9yEfmIyRwD5BYJoHcOK2l7c7OafLw2PAInt6dhAtG-sny5cJG3wpNaO-0QhCGcNe25sBzNKS816x5ZJ5mFVXvvRD73OcvA5MQcyIj86OAQpWQ3QHwsiA86fd4MPbFflGYBbpcIDBx84cerNwwJdKV-ucwO_K2t5PpNA/3kc/JbMONwF_QAiFPtSGRMLulg/h2/90ZpF0T0O0_1yvrQ0liAozpK-cWT0t3oC-5lQQzx9qs)
If the AZ GOP is successful, early voting, PEVL, mail-in voting – **_practically anything that is not in-person voting on election day – will be banned._**

While we fight this lawsuit at the Arizona Supreme Court, we need to show massive public support for voting rights. If this lawsuit is successful, it’s likely the GOP will use similar lawsuits all over the U.S. to try and end early voting in every single state.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen?=
subject: I'll Be Honest
body:
Folks, I'll be honest... | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=4456708d72&e=4712f71bea)
---
| Folks,
I'll be honest, I'm running in a tough district against an opponent who will do or say ANYTHING to win. He's taken every side on every issue possible. As long as he can score political points against President Biden, Ronny will tweet it!

In an ideal world, this race wouldn't be so tough. Unfortunately, too many MAGA fanatics like Ronny wormed their way into Congress and they're hellbent on making this extremist Republican Party the new normal.

I'm not going to take this insanity lying down. I'm going to fight for a healthy democracy and for common sense policy. I need your help to continue advocating for that decent work, though.

[Can you chip in $5 to send a message to Ronny Jackson that his days are numbered? ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=7d393f03c4&e=4712f71bea)

Thanks so much,

Kathleen Brown
Democrat
TX-13
---

clean_body: Folks, I'll be honest... | | | | | | Folks, I'll be honest, I'm running in a tough district against an opponent who will do or say ANYTHING to win. He's taken every side on every issue possible. As long as he can score political points against President Biden, Ronny will tweet it! In an ideal world, this race wouldn't be so tough. Unfortunately, too many MAGA fanatics like Ronny wormed their way into Congress and they're hellbent on making this extremist Republican Party the new normal. I'm not going to take this insanity lying down. I'm going to fight for a healthy democracy and for common sense policy. I need your help to continue advocating for that decent work, though. Thanks so much, Kathleen Brown Democrat TX-13 | | "Donate!" | "Support Decency in Congress" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © Kathleen for Congress, All rights reserved. Fellow American,

I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces – the Marine Raiders.**When I was overseas, there was zero room for error._One mistake was the difference between life and death._**

Accuracy was everything --_weapon inspections, targets, deadlines, goals_ -- it all was critical on our mission.

Like my time overseas, on my mission today I have zero room for error. While the consequences aren’t life or death, they surely feel just important. **I’m talking about my mission to secure one of the most competitive seats in Congress this November.**

**In 2020, we failed on our mission.** The consequence: an incompetent Congresswoman who supports open borders, on-demand abortion, and steep taxes. But Fellow American, we can’t afford to fall short again.

[** SUPPORT TYLER KISTNER FOR CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ec11316dd26d47e792a9ed92200a1c38&_e=a2V82SQxatNcSDKUTGRqYWvpvdyH3uPDiEMtFG0LxyMjLIJJzsyPMOvjb1QAp2shbV0f47JfYR1c74F05OH5BeEgweiNktLBk1UuyaYqYUacW2N5Fga8vBJrKX0Tu3SsonqYLRIMorIeV4NkTAQRqZr_wUXm9CirS8zdiA2qvvQqu70cb5PE5qfK43G481tVSHrLvG612lTvm4pbkWEhmEM3CU3tXnC8Ht54KMVgZJNVLuaqhkmOddtRz_Jxn8PfuL6FsWeWKpbvqI4olu5DQmEW-p7tk6PDkn-_KBi375GLIG-RmyBc7zpBwNYkqPfLfUCig2Piuf8yrBVAWnOHydBfsMJaZePYYk4turKA_KaIQRR8a8gmIN8GHPja6vEv)
**WE HAVE ZERO ROOM FOR ERROR!**

We have to keep up the pace with the million’s worth of dark money that the liberal elite are pouring into this race against me. [**If we’re going to take this seat back in 2022, I need your immediate support on my mission today.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ec11316dd26d47e792a9ed92200a1c38&_e=a2V82SQxatNcSDKUTGRqYWvpvdyH3uPDiEMtFG0LxyMjLIJJzsyPMOvjb1QAp2shbV0f47JfYR1c74F05OH5BeEgweiNktLBk1UuyaYqYUacW2N5Fga8vBJrKX0Tu3SsonqYLRIMorIeV4NkTAQRqZr_wUXm9CirS8zdiA2qvvT5-KusBQwYsYUgyWEkhB3mKYCIKo3EvjKozalC2AkkiG21aBH6U0y-Tehqv5OPe1uc8873_g4FXLARXc-uJCrUBMdtBfxw4PrJfc4G0c_MQcLjsSQnPdUtG6SolE74G9H4ng3vIhamjx1o5ZQSWcX5KX1I8FkMlsDxHQRc1g5p_eulpsxb4ep4KTXnr0Kqjc92G5XIb959kNGhHZsElK0C)

[** SUPPORT TYLER KISTNER FOR CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ec11316dd26d47e792a9ed92200a1c38&_e=a2V82SQxatNcSDKUTGRqYWvpvdyH3uPDiEMtFG0LxyMjLIJJzsyPMOvjb1QAp2shbV0f47JfYR1c74F05OH5BeEgweiNktLBk1UuyaYqYUacW2N5Fga8vBJrKX0Tu3SsonqYLRIMorIeV4NkTAQRqZr_wUXm9CirS8zdiA2qvvStr8ijPrJ9htifIfGej5a9Nq21rICbA5ueDyIcquRBKv7SjwnaQAiLLLJgRDoPHRa1141Ih910LjmFIAFLY-wIlOEWxxTXEbeum7jdCLrp9vzS_oI62VZVf8Y4Tk34XBvbTnnU0zC0cL7mEPkl1EdGz2R2FzaSpl4HIqcVOSWW1Nr1WynedYE9eZqc_OnBy28Hx5dG14jEKYUhPqkeOtpc)
When I first joined the Marine Corps., I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and that oath will never expire. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country. _**Failure is not an option in this race.**_

[**I’m calling on you, to help defend our Nation in this critical moment. Please don’t let me and the team down.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ec11316dd26d47e792a9ed92200a1c38&_e=a2V82SQxatNcSDKUTGRqYWvpvdyH3uPDiEMtFG0LxyMjLIJJzsyPMOvjb1QAp2shbV0f47JfYR1c74F05OH5BeEgweiNktLBk1UuyaYqYUacW2N5Fga8vBJrKX0Tu3SsonqYLRIMorIeV4NkTAQRqZr_wUXm9CirS8zdiA2qvvTy_dWPlttdAkI4xKMzcF8JmBs-0u4GbWgvo-z7KRnoRgVu3O5y0KcdXioGi9y6Wahz5cY58iKjdY7Pk1a_h9x_atvSEI6Hx9IFLqRQHnaxuy6dd0MtHQw5nAdK1NoE1Q-UKA6DOgvqWiXtHcs9lAlofaFqtxFR5jtJYxZQQzh1FD_ul21XMkjsTTajYerQzGaSMyvvPTmtv1mqzNyLCy1S) If I learned one thing from my failure in 2020, it’s that _failure isn’t final._

Let’s take our country back, together.

| **_Tyler Kistner_**
* * *
Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future.

clean_body: This is a people powered campaign | | | Dear Team, Establishment candidates start their campaigns by calling in favors from every wealthy colleague, CEO, lobbyist, and Corporate PAC in their network, and that’s exactly what Danny Davis did last quarter when he raised $60,000 from 32 people, and another $68,500 from 37 Corporate PACs. That is a huge amount of power concentrated in a very small number of people & corporations. Our campaign is people powered not corporate powered, and I’m proud to share that we have received over 7,000 individual contributions averaging $48 each. We are accountable to the people, and thousands are pitching in. ** you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We have chosen the harder path by being a campaign that refuses corporate money. But we know it is the right thing to do. We are fighting for a better future of our district and that starts with drawing a line about who gets a say. I believe that the people closest to the pain, should be closest to the power. That means choosing people over corporations, and building a coalition thousands strong. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Bochetto for Senate
subject: Bochetto Files Petitions with Strong Support
body:
The nominating petition period for U.S. Senate candidates ends tomorrow, March 15th. Thousands of patriotic Pennsylvanians have supported my campaign because their votes cannot be bought with money from Hollywood or Communist China.

|
---
Peter -- The nominating petition period for U.S. Senate candidates ends tomorrow, March 15th. Thousands of patriotic Pennsylvanians have supported my campaign because their votes cannot be bought with money from Hollywood or Communist China. Like me, they are sick and tired of the woke mob denigrating our culture. They're sick and tired of soft-on-crime politicians letting criminals run amok. They want energy independence and good-paying jobs instead of reliance on terrorist and communists. Perhaps most of all, they want authenticity, not tv personalities or career politicians. They want a Senator from Pennsylvania, for Pennsylvania, who will fight to defend our way of life, and that is why I am running. **If you would like to show your support, now is the time!** Since we have exceeded the required number of petition signatures by more than three times, _**will you contribute $3, $30, or even $300 dollars to our campaign right now?**_ [](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFULDvFQHgtUZnpAZW9LK18S1XtC6E9JzsjRStvyZwwfQ&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_reminder&n=1) Thank you for your support!
Bochetto for Senate · PA 19102, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_reminder&n=2).

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Please, let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I’ve got a tough reelection fight ahead
| | |
---
Listen –
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to help me defend this Senate seat. But first, let me explain why this request really matters.
As you may know, my 2016 Senate election was one of the closest in history. I won by 1,017 votes and unseated a Republican incumbent in the most expensive Senate race New Hampshire had ever seen.
**And now, the full force of the GOP is coming back to New Hampshire to flip this toss-up seat red and take back the Senate majority. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have already spent over $7.5 million attacking me – more than they've spent against any other Senate Democrat up for reelection. **
We can't match the Republican mega-donors and their million-dollar checks – but we can show the strength of our campaign with people like you chipping in $5 or more whenever you can.
But recently, our grassroots donations have tapered off – leaving our campaign vulnerable to GOP attacks. And with our mid-month deadline just around the corner, I'm starting to get worried.

body:

---
| | Dear Friends,

**Oregonians are not only experiencing the quick surge of prices for essential goods; but now rapid and record increases at the pump.** Citizens across the state are paying the price** ** for international**** issues in foreign lands and the highest inflation in years.** ** However, our leadership here can take steps to help alleviate at least some of the financial burden being experienced**. **

**This is why I have called for an immediate gas tax holiday that would equate to a savings of $7.60 savings on a 20 gallon tank.** Oregon's high tax rates (8th highest in the country) could easily withstand a suspension of this tax and help Oregonians who are suffering throughout the state**.** Kate Brown, Oregon Department of Transportation, and all local governments have the responsibility to step in now to ease the burden on its citizens and and take action.

**As governor, I will embody leadership that doesn't sit on its hands when hard working citizens are suffering. I will take immediate and decisive action and not ignore my fellow Oregonians when they are experiencing such hardships.** But that will only be possible with your generous donation today. [Your support will ensure we have the resources necessary to keep up our hard work in Oregon. ](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=bfc1a305a8&e=7e91be8cad)

---

Thanks for your support and being an integral part of our team.

Jessica Gomez

clean_body: We need to beat her | Hey there, Did you see this message from Yesli? We cannot begin to explain how important this goal is to meet. Abigail Spanberger is attempting to buy back her seat in Congress so she can continue to pass her party’s socialist wish list. Yesli is working harder than ever to stop her, but she needs your help. | Are you ready to join the fight to defeat Spanberger? Just think of all the troubles the Democratic party has brought the American people in their first year in power. We have to stop them before it’s too late. Thank you for your time, Annie, Team Vega \-----Forwarded Message----- Fellow Conservative, Our last deadline before the end of the quarter is this Tuesday at midnight. My team is working harder than ever to meet our fundraising goal. My opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has deep ties to the Radical Left’s dark money allies and is attempting to win back her seat in Congress by buying it. That’s the difference between her and me, she relies on billionaires to buy her seat, and I rely on hard-working everyday Americans. I know I can beat her, but if I don’t catch up in fundraising, she will blow me out of the water. Friend, I am humbly asking for your help. We made such a big impact when we elected Governor Glenn Youngkin, but this caused Radical Left politicians like Abigail Spanberger to turn to their party's deep pockets to maintain control of the House. God Bless, Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. * | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.

name: Travis Brimm, CheriBeasley.com
subject: Sorry to be blunt, but we need a surge of support for Cheri today.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Our fundraising has been slower than we expected so far this month.
#

I am sorry to be this blunt, but I need to ask you to donate $3 or whatever you can today to help us close a fundraising shortfall. If you’re able to give right now, here’s the best link:
[**https://CheriBeasley.com/Official-March-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220314-1-MA&refcode2=539.357359.HU4npn&t=1&akid=539%2E357359%2EHU4npn)
Look, we always want to be honest with you. So the truth is that our fundraising has been slower than we expected so far this month, and I don’t want to have to cut our goals or budget right now.
We’re nearly halfway through the month, but we’ve only raised about a third of what we need to reach our goal before the official FEC deadline on March 31.
This is a critical goal for us to hit too. After this deadline, we will be required to report our fundraising numbers publicly — the first full quarter since Cheri became Democrats’ presumptive nominee in North Carolina.
That puts all eyes on us, so we cannot miss. But the only way we can get there is if we can quickly get a surge of support to put us back on track.
[**So please make a $3 donation or any amount that you can to help us pick up our fundraising pace before the official FEC deadline. We have a real chance to flip this seat and expand the majority but only if we’re in this together.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220314-1-MA&refcode2=539.357359.HU4npn&t=2&akid=539%2E357359%2EHU4npn)

clean_body: Joe Biden will END oil and gas no matter the cost to YOU. | Friend, Of Biden’s laundry list of incredible failures, one of his greatest is no doubt destroying our nation’s energy independence achieved under President Trump. What we are witnessing today is not a transition to alternative energy, it’s a transition to poverty. We’re spending $250 MILLION more per day on gas than we were just one month ago. The Democrat’s ability to ruin our great country can never be underestimated, and it’s exactly why we can’t afford to waste a single minute in our fight to flip the House this year. As a proud Texan, I know firsthand just how vital the fossil fuel industry is not only to keep the lights on, but to provide a living for so many of my neighbors. But Joe Biden and the Left are hellbent on destroying an industry that both directly and indirectly has supported roughly 9.8 million jobs – 5.6% of total U.S. employment. That’s why I can’t stress enough the stakes of our race for Texas’ NEW congressional seat. As 1 of the 5 seats we need to flip the House from Pelosi’s control, everything is on the line. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Can you please make your first contribution to help me win this primary and get to the U.S. Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
This is our last chance to show the strength of the coalition we've built together
#

Friend,
I'm reaching out to urgently ask you to make your first contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate. Will you please let me explain why your donation is so important?
We are facing our final quarterly FEC reporting deadline at the end of this month. It's one of the last times our fundraising totals will go public before voters begin casting their ballots in our primary election.
This is our last chance to show the strength of the coalition we've built together over the last year. Our opponents and pundits across the country are watching.
If we're going to win this race and make sure working families finally get ahead, we need all hands on deck to hit our goals before this month's deadline.
So I'm personally asking:
[Can you please make your first $3 contribution to help me win this primary and get to the U.S. Senate? Your support is critical to the success of our movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42964210/335094661/-358086307?refcode2=fabac765-d8a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220314-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWJhYzc2NS1kOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDoOpUrg6XrtPu8r23k9NCmX4PtuJS0GBWF7cBgZOLM=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42964211/335094662/-358086307?refcode2=fabac765-d8a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220314-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWJhYzc2NS1kOGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDoOpUrg6XrtPu8r23k9NCmX4PtuJS0GBWF7cBgZOLM=)**
Thanks for all that you do,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 3254
Philadelphia, PA 19107
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
