[ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Thanks, Tim [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below! [ ]Donate Monthly [ ]Donate Once Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio Tim Ryan for Ohio P.O. Box 189 Niles, Ohio 44446 United States [ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ ][IMG] You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Team Lira
subject: HUGE deadlines coming up
body:
Peter,

This month marks the end of the first fundraising quarter of 2022.

That means we will be hitting a huge End of Quarter goal in just a few weeks — and right now, we’re running a bit behind.

To stay on track for that we need to raise at least $10,000 over the next week. It may seem like a big goal, but if everyone reading this chips in whatever you can, we will definitely be able to reach it — can you make a contribution now?

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220314?refcode=em20220314]

Peter, this is a marathon, not a sprint, and that means we need to make sure we are planning ahead and building up momentum long before election day.

This $5,000 towards our End of Quarter goal is going to help us make sure we have what it takes to go up against Tony Gonzales in November — so we need our supporters to start pitching in now!

Help us raise $10,000 in the next week so we can stay on pace towards hitting our goal at the end of the month. Any amount you can chip in goes directly towards getting John in office to represent TX-23. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220314?refcode=em20220314]

Let’s get to work,
Team Lira

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.
Email is the most important way we keep in touch with our supporters. But, if you'd you need to remove yourself from our email list, you can unsubscribe here: unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fda233e0-eda3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/ffa233e0-eda3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEyMzNlMC1lZGEzLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bsvnlaApA4_Ymdp-DBzTvTaIy0KBPiw4KbrzwzzuLNQ=&id=129132840

name: Erica Smith for Congress
subject: 3 people from your city
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
We need just 3 supporters from your city to step up and we’ll be able to reach our mid-month goal.
#
We’re just 48 hours away from our critical fundraising deadline and we just found out something big. **
Our finance team has crunched the numbers, and we found that **if** **just three people from your city donate $4.80 we’ll be on track to reach our fundraising goal before midnight on March 15th.**
[**Can we count on you to donate $4.80 and be one of the three critical supporters we need from****your city?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44434?t=1&akid=992%2E3698%2ETA8gQ2)
**[Donate $4.80](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44434?t=2&akid=992%2E3698%2ETA8gQ2)**
We’re up against a far-right insurrectionist Republican, and an anti-choice, corporate-backed Democrat. But we’re not worried about their corporate money because we’ve got the people on our side, and we’re proud to be fighting this race the right way — without a dime of corporate, fossil fuel or super PAC money.
However, we also know we’ll have to work 10x as hard to ramp up our fundraising program without million-dollar donors in our back pocket.
Erica is proudly the ONLY pro-choice candidate in this race and she’s fighting for progressive climate policy, universal healthcare, and rural communities like the one Erica grew up in.
Your $4.80 will go directly to sending Erica to Congress so North Carolina can have a representative **from the community who will fight**** _for_****the community.**
[**Let’s bring change to North Carolina together. We need folks from across the country to step up including in**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44434?t=3&akid=992%2E3698%2ETA8gQ2)**[your city. Please, contribute $4.80 right now before we reach our mid-month deadline at midnight on March 15.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44434?t=4&akid=992%2E3698%2ETA8gQ2)**
In solidarity,
Finance Team
Erica Smith for Congress

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220314-992-footer&t=5&refcode2=992_3698_TA8gQ2&akid=992%2E3698%2ETA8gQ2)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=992%2E3698%2ETA8gQ2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=992%2E3698%2ETA8gQ2)

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US

name: Angel Montalvo for Congress 2022
subject: Angel Montalvo - Rising Tide Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Montalvo for Congress
body:
Hello Friend,
March has been an active month for the world and for our campaign. We have about 5 months before the primary on August 23rd. Thank you to all our volunteers who participated in our canvass this past Saturday and Sunday in Allapattah! Continue to read below for some more upcoming events and news on what is currently going on in our state regarding
legislation.

Haven’t signed up to volunteer yet? [HERE](https://forms.gle/8HY4A42pTdMY1MLB7) is the link for signing up, if you haven’t already. Feel free to share with your networks!

Upcoming Events
**
**

Our outreach for petitions is still essential as we organize our communities leading up to the primaries! Petition packets are available upon request for volunteers. You can find that petition form[ HERE](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zQhjsdkD9zYAr1PdWYEeCLKCiZ2pK05q/view?usp=sharing).

1. Print out the petition and sign as designated
2. When you’re done you can either hand it in to us in person, or mail! Reach out to [us@montalvoforcongress.com](mailto:us@montalvoforcongress.com) for mailing information.

This weekend’s canvass launch will be at Curtis Park, located at 1901 NW 24th Ave, Miami FL, 33125 @ 12 PM.

Interested in joining other canvasses? [RSVP HERE](https://forms.gle/yJNNLTmPVNbaVTse8).

Weekly Review
________________________________
I participated in a Q&A Session with two organizations I have worked with directly in the past, our local Extinction Rebellion chapter as well as the Labor Community Alliance of South Florida:

______

In 2018, for an entire season I lived and worked on a farm as an intern in Corbett, Oregon. As I learned about our industrial agricultural practices, I became increasingly horrified to learn how dire our situation is. We have to decide now whether humanity will live on a hospitable planet or go extinct. At this point we all know this yet in my life I find it nearly impossible to speak with others about it in any meaningful way. I learned about Extinction Rebellion while I was in Oregon on a broadcast of Democracy Now with Amy Goodman that covered one of their nonviolent direct actions. It was striking that people, mostly very young people, were getting arrested to bring attention to the issue. I did some research and before long was on a Zoom call (pre-Covid) with a group of international organizers with Extinction Rebellion.

For the sake of everything we love and hold dear, we will take on the fossil fuel industry. We need representatives in the United States Congress with the courage to tell the truth, we are in a climate emergency. [Extinction Rebellion Miami](https://www.facebook.com/ExtinctionRebellionMiami)
______

Growing up there wasn’t really political talk in my home. I really had to seek out sources of information to get a grasp of what was going on, mostly relying on Jon Stewart’s Daily Show for a palatable perspective.

This is why organizations like the Labor Community Alliance are so important. They offer their wealth of knowledge and experience to young organizers who can’t make heads or tails of what is happening and what to do about it. When I first got involved with organizing and advocacy they showed me the way and underscored the importance of labor organizing while doing so. [Labor Community Alliance of South Florida
](https://www.facebook.com/groups/919660881446886)-Angel Montalvo

Current Events

[HB 1557](https://www.flsenate.gov/Session/Bill/2022/1557): ([CNN](https://news.wttw.com/2022/03/08/florida-legislature-passes-bill-prohibiting-some-classroom-instruction-about-sexual)) — “Lawmakers in Florida gave final approval Tuesday to a bill that would ban certain instruction about sexual orientation and gender identity in the classroom, sending the controversial bill to the desk of Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis, who has signaled his support for the measure.

Florida’s GOP-controlled Senate passed HB 1557, titled the Parental Rights in Education bill, in a 22-17 vote. The state House had approved the bill late last month.”
________________________________
[HB 7](https://www.flsenate.gov/Session/Bill/2022/7): “The Florida state Legislature approved a bill Thursday that aims to stifle conversations about race and gender in the school and workplace, and end the great scourge of our time: thoughtful considerations of privilege and racist oppression in America.
The Florida Senate passed a bill modeled on an effort Gov. Ron DeSantis called the “Stop WOKE (Wrongs to Our Kids and Employees) Act” on a party-line vote Thursday. DeSantis is expected to sign the bill, which he unveiled last December with a speech in which he warped the famous Martin Luther King Jr. quote, about being judged not by the color of your skin but by the content of your character, into an attack on critical race theory (CRT).”
“The intent of the bill, however, is clear. Similar to others around the country, it’s aimed at tackling CRT, “critical race theory,” an academic theory about America’s legal system that the right has turned into a bogeyman that’s allowed them to target diversity trainings and school curricula about racism both past and present.” ([VICE](https://www.vice.com/en/article/wxdbwb/stope-woke-act-florida-crt-bill))
________________________________
[HB 5](https://www.flsenate.gov/Session/Bill/2022/5): “Abortions after 15 weeks would be banned in Florida under a bill Republican senators sent to Gov. Ron DeSantis late Thursday, capping a bitter debate in the statehouse as a looming U.S. Supreme Court decision may limit abortion rights in America.
DeSantis, a Republican, has previously signaled his support for the proposal and is expected to sign it into law.”
“This week, Sen. Lauren Book, a Democrat who turned the pain of being sexually abused by her nanny into a career of helping other survivors, tearfully revealed she was also drugged and raped by multiple men when she was a young teenager. She implored senators to allow exemptions for rape, incest or human trafficking.” ([ClickOrlando](https://www.clickorlando.com/news/florida/2022/03/04/florida-republicans-near-15-week-abortion-ban/))
________________________________
[HB 537](https://www.flsenate.gov/Session/Bill/2022/537): “HB 537, sponsored by Republican Rep. Jim Mooney, would ensure the terms of any security deposit alternative agreement are fully disclosed before a lease is signed and provide tenants with a guarantee that they may cancel the payment plan and instead provide a security deposit mid-lease.” ([Florida Politics](https://floridapolitics.com/archives/500825-house-passes-security-deposit-alternative-bill/))
On March 12, 2022, this bill was “Indefinitely postponed and withdrawn from consideration.”
________________________________
Want to learn about more bills that are one signature away from being signed into law? Click [HERE!](https://www.clickorlando.com/news/local/2022/03/09/these-bills-are-one-signature-away-from-becoming-florida-law/)
________________________________
“The construction site that sent a stream of foam blocks floating across Biscayne Bay this weekend faces a small fine from Miami-Dade County. A spokesperson for Miami-Dade’s Division of Environmental Resources Management said the agency was delivering a dumping citation with a $500 fine on Monday to Missoni Baia, a waterfront project in the Edgewater neighborhood. Condos at the Oko Group’s 57-story tower sell for $1.5 million and more. DERM spokesperson Tere Florin said the debris was a version of Styrofoam, a material the county banned at parks for its pollution potential, but that the developer appeared to clean up most of the mess on land and by boat on Saturday. ([Miami Herald](https://www.miamiherald.com/news/business/article259399069.html))
____________________________________
Fundraising: [https://bit.ly/ContributeMontalvo4Congress](https://bit.ly/ContributeMontalvo4Congress)
Website: [https://www.montalvoforcongress.com/](https://www.montalvoforcongress.com/)
Instagram: [https://bit.ly/3BIgS5S](https://bit.ly/3BIgS5S)
Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/MontalvoForCongress](https://www.facebook.com/MontalvoForCongress)

Paid for by Montalvo for Congress

Lauren Book, a Democrat who turned the pain of being sexually abused by her nanny into a career of helping other survivors, tearfully revealed she was also drugged and raped by multiple men when she was a young teenager. She implored senators to allow exemptions for rape, incest or human trafficking.” () : “HB 537, sponsored by Republican Rep. Jim Mooney, would ensure the terms of any security deposit alternative agreement are fully disclosed before a lease is signed and provide tenants with a guarantee that they may cancel the payment plan and instead provide a security deposit mid-lease.” () On March 12, 2022, this bill was “Indefinitely postponed and withdrawn from consideration.” Want to learn about more bills that are one signature away from being signed into law? Click “The construction site that sent a stream of foam blocks floating across Biscayne Bay this weekend faces a small fine from Miami-Dade County. A spokesperson for Miami-Dade’s Division of Environmental Resources Management said the agency was delivering a dumping citation with a $500 fine on Monday to Missoni Baia, a waterfront project in the Edgewater neighborhood. Condos at the Oko Group’s 57-story tower sell for $1.5 million and more. DERM spokesperson Tere Florin said the debris was a version of Styrofoam, a material the county banned at parks for its pollution potential, but that the developer appeared to clean up most of the mess on land and by boat on Saturday. Dear Friend,

When I was growing up, I wanted to be the first person in my family to graduate from college. But at almost 20 years old, I dropped out of school, and my husband and I welcomed our first child, Brandon. -- And a few years later we were blessed with another son, Bradley. I spent the next 15 years raising my two boys -- waiting tables -- tending bar, -- and doing anything I could to provide for my family. And I was able to earn my college degree 20 years later. I know the challenges facing every Maryland parent. And I know that if you don’t feel like your family is safe, nothing else matters.
---

With Governor Hogan, we backed the police. When other states were defunding the police, we invested an additional $500 million to support law enforcement and crime victims across Maryland.
But we have a long way to go. The far-left Democrats defunded the police in Baltimore. And they elected a prosecutor who won’t enforce the law. It’s resulted in record crime, a wave of murders, and a city in crisis.
When I am governor, I will make Maryland safe. _**Because without safety, nothing matters**_ _**.**_

My policy is simple: support law enforcement and hold criminals accountable. Treat criminals like criminals and police like heroes.
If we follow that policy, we can keep Maryland safe.
[Will you join me?](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86xpukcdvdqteHJ0aIl94fqvjkr-2FCcX0FwEf-2FL4XY2T-2FM4otEpvcjsWVPkgTcrM7xL-2BEnZbGa9nkdKWxpMTK1DnA-3D-3D8cM6_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6MUFIjhnwJ-2B0xhD7b8N7oyIeIC396J7LX6aYH8YOuL7aKHhsD1-2FpWUVprHMLhctA2980hNchlnDXcB5cgrMRcPwuDV3sGctVPnndS1f9ZC47H6qH1aLLD2Y4E4x4RKqsvktA-2BiNO36OAUDk5FlnCAyBH771IlGBtgqD8NZM-2BL5D6M-2BMPnP5S7SJkt6cgzm76-2FEhbQ0vl2ATHKSxTCSMwTf3f3lgRt-2FKciKRdLH3C3KfG1GTPSnuLe7CfNCIYCR-2BfaZ5KY4iVON5EvRFGLn9-2BThsQd5mYpSU0TtDgMMYygPZg4jUUfGseNzMo2xIX8RLK0Uo35FsgG-2FeZa-2BvAN-2B3dGOhvJjS-2BnSXL7gwJ0yPgX7MCkogcar9Ek-2BiI-2FWCuKdPoe7lW68MCgv6slrZt7qDLAxeP4UUSD1d5EdV5QDyxdHWJiH6AzySGxhwAR-2BZ5mR8wWE2JSLpt2tswvErxs5PQvJhjV1FCzwb1KXub6ZqgKtY20EbWZZPlWbsveWGyi503n2jmtDbKzUxlIyn0UWrJguG7FaK7jItYhlFZ-2FCrxe1ReWQdqA1ARWVubh1Dfba0R5XJvJoUeKB6yPSE6W8j1RTDBP1G2omI8OMrttDxIsxyyXPRs-2B6SdiWnSdQf6jykSU5tsn28UCM2OzstepRYNmvRWJRaHVd1ldf2KANvLk2S-2F2O81h3YFhXAjb5p1ClbPXdEOxAzMEIH-2FF2oKIEQJRLq8GNXrB-2F6pHdCu1jqrSOCZTEsNpV2d7tdDI2yvG35HEzlC164wW8JU-2Fy9C0ijiGyO6oz1ynDsfFYT-2F3WKb4UKo3ifGuZLtb5ZCotSVKluqb)
